He is an extraordinary supporter of first responders and public safety officials and stands against attempts to defund and dismantle the police. He will always promote public safety proposals that keep communities safe. On behalf of the largest public safety association in Minnesota, we are proud to support Paul Gazelka for Governor.” Minnesota's law enforcement knows I have their back. Do you have mine?
[**_Will you help me support our law enforcement with your donation of $100, $75, $50, or $25 now?_**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=236156bb20ca4ad3afa41ebcca249f5b&_e=0mSsTVc2Cmapx72ce4uBXUnurZzCtKUgRAuKmOM2qeiDnPXQTNP2QcVgYWDeQeinHLiLRcuXlud0XUhA74nOU8xbVGqWjOJwASgZDXExMIiWVvmQMiQRrZgch7kC7K5Cz6l4mkIN7lD3keCc7CLgC2BOadLtbrjnbCCnk2kYIQlY-QTVH1grdVH2Xd0CTYuIyhjGUOF7ZbUx06tQs1ftc8UV_cW4MaO0W-G8DSzB28Ti_TqAMLgX2mrLLZJqMQ2t5Nf2d2eg_CORfdKrefkLwyB3z3HsVvOjLy7y8GP2qewxcqQaPgjbV_GP9yUd1_xGWCaEXJmZ0H90lOztS1Zc9DBEInp_rabVIxnUx7sXYG8%3D) [**Help Me DEFEND Law Enforcement**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=236156bb20ca4ad3afa41ebcca249f5b&_e=0mSsTVc2Cmapx72ce4uBXUnurZzCtKUgRAuKmOM2qeiDnPXQTNP2QcVgYWDeQeinHLiLRcuXlud0XUhA74nOU8xbVGqWjOJwASgZDXExMIiWVvmQMiQRrZgch7kC7K5Cz6l4mkIN7lD3keCc7CLgC4VZy3FDll5Ild3P5V-bkfqTo_bgyHZDBKco0qCuTlCC7-6mprTVYyMCa61F-5WUSUqQBbjHrdAHjJIXPxBnWAfNMquT1JJZ36Q0LCIQnB84_OHQ1_7y56mFPGeylo377u98h_53d1YJfi_s9OamUG0-JzzZcvtbRmGLPMCX053Mtt23RGe6p1RASRYnbqySCGc7lESgqLrT8MrRnfHEY0w%3D) I am humbled by this endorsement, and I don't want to let Minnesota's brave law enforcement down. name: Team AOC
subject: Tackling a crisis of faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Members of Congress should not be able to use privileged information to buy and trade individual stocks that they know will perform well.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220411-2940-header&t=1&akid=2940%2E2526796%2EyS16Dw)
We must do everything we can to restore the American people’s faith in our institutions. **That starts with making sure that no one can abuse their position in Congress to make huge profits from the stock market.**
It's why Alexandria has worked with her colleagues for _years_ to ban members of Congress from trading individual stock. She along with Reps. Krishnamoorthi and Neguse and Senator Merkley introduced a bill three years ago to ban stock trading because members of Congress should not be able to use privileged information to buy and trade individual stocks that they know will perform well.
The _Ban Conflicted Trading Act_ has been gaining traction – and last week, **Alexandria and her colleagues officially added an amendment to also prohibit member’s spouses, senior staff, and members serving on corporate boards from trading stocks as well.**
**The fact is, members of Congress and their ability to trade stocks is a direct conflict of interest.** Members have access to briefings that require security clearances and enormous amounts of nonpublic information that can be used to buy or sell stocks.
Members then proceed to vote on key pieces of legislation while taking their own market interests into consideration.
This bill is about holding ourselves to a higher standard, and ensuring that Americans don’t have to worry about their interests competing with their member of Congress’ stock portfolio. **Now is the time to bring this bill to the House floor for a vote.**
Alexandria never shies away from fighting for what is right. **She won’t stop until this bill is passed and will continue to advocate for integrity and fairness in Congress.**
[Alexandria is fighting to hold Congress to a higher standard everyday. Can you chip in $3 – or whatever you can afford – so that Alexandria can continue her leadership in Congress?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220411?refcode=em20220411-2940-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2940_2526796_yS16Dw&akid=2940%2E2526796%2EyS16Dw)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220411?refcode=em20220411-2940-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2940_2526796_yS16Dw&akid=2940%2E2526796%2EyS16Dw)**
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220411?refcode=em20220411-2940-P_FND_EGR_LEG&t=22&refcode2=2940_2526796_yS16Dw&akid=2940%2E2526796%2EyS16Dw)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220411-2940-P_FND_EGR_LEG&t=23&akid=2940%2E2526796%2EyS16Dw)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=2940%2E2526796%2EyS16Dw) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=2940%2E2526796%2EyS16Dw) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=2940%2E2526796%2EyS16Dw)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=2940%2E2526796%2EyS16Dw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=2940%2E2526796%2EyS16Dw)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

body:

# Read what they tried to Censor.
Dear Patriots,

It was important to me to put out a formal and TRUTHFUL statement in response to President Trumps endorsement of Brian Mast. Especially when he stated that Mast is "strong on the Second Amendment". The link to the press release is below. However, when I went to PAY to have the release pushed out to the media, I could not find a company that would run it because of the CONTENTS of the release. There is nothing in the release that can not be substantiated with fact and proof and it is of course MY formal response.

https://www.issuewire.com/melissa-martz-hopes-president-trumps-endorsement-of-pedophilia-promoting-gun-grabbing-rino-brian-mast-was-a-mistake-1729861468354559

Please take the time to share this link were you can. We ultimately went with a subpar and free outlet for release. Thank you for your help in getting the truth out. We all deserve to know the truth and we all deserve the right to speak it.

I will keeping fighting to preserve liberty and our Republic.

Stay Free,

Melissa Martz

* * *
The WisGOP hosted a March Metric Madness competition allowing county parties and Republican groups to battle for the most voter contacts this month. **Congratulations to our winner, the Wisconsin Young Republicans, and the runner-up, the Kenosha County GOP, who also knocked the most doors as a percentage of their total county turnout!**********
****
****
* * *
****
****
**Washington County Victory Parties**
Washington County conservatives celebrated a sweep of victories for conservatives running for local office!
**Florence County Lincoln Day Dinner**
Florence County Republicans hosted their annual Lincoln Day Dinner with over 150 attendees and Congressman Tom Tiffany, state elected officials, and statewide candidates as special guests.
**3rd Congressional District Caucus**
Derrick Van Orden and candidates joined 3rd Congressional District Republicans for their annual Caucus that boasted over 250 attendees! The Trempealeau County GOP was also awarded County of the Year.
**Washington County Door-Knocking**
Washington County school board candidates knocked on doors to bring their message directly to voters.
**La Crosse Get Out the Vote Event**
Third Congressional District candidate Derrick Van Orden rallied supporters ahead of voter contact for local elections.
**Green County Monthly Meeting**
Green County Republicans hosted their monthly meeting in Monroe, where they gained some new members!
**Washington County Get Out the Vote Rally**
Senator Johnson rallied conservatives in West Bend ahead of the Spring Election.
_(no photo available)_
**Shawano County Get Out the Vote Events**
Shawano County Republicans held GOTV events ahead of the Spring Election, which helped result in successes from county board, to school board, to mayoral elections.
* * *

clean_body: Catch up on our latest events! | April 11, 2022 In our newest roundup, check out the latest updates from the Republican Party of Wisconsin on local events happening throughout the state! Upcoming Events: 4/12: 4/14: 4/16: 4/22: 4/23: 4/23: 4/23: 4/23: 4/23: | "FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU" The WisGOP hosted a March Metric Madness competition allowing county parties and Republican groups to battle for the most voter contacts this month. Congratulations to our winner, the Wisconsin Young Republicans, and the runner-up, the Kenosha County GOP, who also knocked the most doors as a percentage of their total county turnout!****** ** Washington County Victory Parties Washington County conservatives celebrated a sweep of victories for conservatives running for local office! Florence County Lincoln Day Dinner Florence County Republicans hosted their annual Lincoln Day Dinner with over 150 attendees and Congressman Tom Tiffany, state elected officials, and statewide candidates as special guests. 3rd Congressional District Caucus Derrick Van Orden and candidates joined 3rd Congressional District Republicans for their annual Caucus that boasted over 250 attendees! The Trempealeau County GOP was also awarded County of the Year. Washington County Door-Knocking Washington County school board candidates knocked on doors to bring their message directly to voters. La Crosse Get Out the Vote Event Third Congressional District candidate Derrick Van Orden rallied supporters ahead of voter contact for local elections. Green County Monthly Meeting Green County Republicans hosted their monthly meeting in Monroe, where they gained some new members! Washington County Get Out the Vote Rally Senator Johnson rallied conservatives in West Bend ahead of the Spring Election. (no photo available) Shawano County Get Out the Vote Events Shawano County Republicans held GOTV events ahead of the Spring Election, which helped result in successes from county board, to school board, to mayoral elections. name: =?utf-8?Q?Christian=20Nascimento?=
subject: Madeleine Dean is Desperate
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Friends of Christian Nascimento, All rights reserved
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1099211375f0/madeleine-dean-is-desperate?e=0a4d873a55)
---
| | [ ](https://cn4pa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d1d8e72981035507cd4628e7&id=f3f93657bf&e=0a4d873a55)
---
| | **Liberal Madeleine Dean Just called
the Republican Party, 'A CULT'** _WE NEED YOUR HELP TO FLIP THIS SEAT_!
Democratic leadership is failing America and desperate liberals like Madeleine Dean have already reduced their candidacies to inarticulate insults and shameful political theater.

**On Saturday night during a cable news broadcast, Dean said that _Republicans, “have no agenda, they’re simply the mouths of a cult_.” **

It's particularly rich to hear this malarkey come from Dean, an Obama-Biden liberal who has spent her political life kneeling at the altar of Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and defund the police activists like Kadida Kenner.

**Dean is the embodiment of what tears apart our great commonwealth and nation. It's time for thoughtful conservative leadership in order to save our country, win this seat, and** **FLIP IT RED!**

With the red wave coming, this is our chance to win this race and take back the House Majority. Will you help by contributing $10, $25, $100, or whatever you can RIGHT NOW? [](https://cn4pa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d1d8e72981035507cd4628e7&id=c9103c8f7d&e=0a4d873a55) If it feels like the late 70s all over again in America, that’s not by coincidence. Politicians like Madeleine Dean have created this mess, and now – after months of catastrophic polls – it’s clear they’ll do and say anything and everything to deny responsibility.

Their agenda has purposefully cut off domestic oil production, paid people not to work, spent trillions on wasteful, expanded government programs, released criminals back onto the streets, pointlessly restricted individual freedoms, and demonstrated weakness to the world.

As a result, inflation is devastating families, violent crime and drugs are sweeping through our cities, gas prices are crippling our economy, and a red army is once again violently trying to redraw Europe.
**The monumental failures of Democrats in Pennsylvania and across the country means Dean and her liberal comrades will continue to do and say desperate things to distract voters from their failures.**

**What voters have deserved all along are real solutions to the tough problems we face – not big government socialism and woke mob values.**

**Unfortunately, that’s all that liberals like Dean have to offer.** [](https://cn4pa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d1d8e72981035507cd4628e7&id=3c1ae1ea43&e=0a4d873a55) If you agree, _**then I need you with me. This is our chance to turn things around.**_

Let’s make it happen by banding together and growing our grassroots movement to unseat my Democrat opponent.

Let’s take back Pennsylvania AND our nation!

For Pennsylvania,

Christian Nascimento
Republican Candidate for Congress, Pennsylvania
---
| | | | | | | [](https://cn4pa.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2d1d8e72981035507cd4628e7&id=9dfe72c056&e=0a4d873a55)
---

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: The Right to Keep and Bear Arms
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, the right to keep and bear firearms is an inalienable human right. Democrats are trying to restrict it as much as possible.
Hi Peter, **Our right to bear arms is the Second Amendment in the Bill of Rights. The Founding Fathers made this right the Second Amendment because they believed it was the next most important inalienable right behind freedom of speech.** This is why I will always stand up to protect the Second Amendment. It is unconstitutional for the government to restrict your rights.The purpose of government is to protect rights, not restrict them.[**Help show your support for Second Amendment rights by donating to our campaign. We must take back the House in 2022 if we want to provide a check on the Democrats' power.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjjikul-idtjvlhlh-r/) Thank you,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjjikul-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjjikul-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjjikul-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zjjikul-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zjjikul-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

body:
Stacey Abrams needs us now
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=1799%2E878179%2EopRFzZ)._
---
This is a hard email to write. **We just MISSED our CRUCIAL $7,000 goal to defeat Republican Governors like Brian Kemp.**

But we talked to our accountants, and they gave us one last chance: If we can raise the final $2,521 by midnight, we can avoid making any cutbacks! [Listen, we can't afford setbacks like this if we want to flip Governor's seats across the country. Please, chip in $5 right now to defeat MAGA Governors like Brian Kemp and flip Georgia BLUE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8508?t=7&akid=1799%2E878179%2EopRFzZ) | [DEADLINE EXTENDED: Chip in $5 before midnight to help fund our campaign to defeat Republican Governors like Brian Kemp »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8508?t=8&akid=1799%2E878179%2EopRFzZ)

**DESPITE** Stacey Abrams SLASHING Brian Kemp's lead DOWN in the polls...

**DESPITE** the Republican Party spending HUGE amounts of money to make sure Democrats don't humiliate them in November...

**& DESPITE** asking for your support EVERY. SINGLE. DAY...
[**We STILL missed our goal to defeat Republicans like Brian Kemp by $2,521. We need YOUR help to close the gap! Rush $5 RIGHT NOW to help us flip Georgia BLUE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8508?t=9&akid=1799%2E878179%2EopRFzZ)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1799%2E878179%2EopRFzZ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1799%2E878179%2EopRFzZ).**

name: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Proof
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Peter, You may think that the media finally reporting on Hunter Biden's Laptop is good news - I don't. Let me be clear. I believe everything that's on Hunter's laptop is true. It proves the Chinese funneling money to Joe Biden, aka "The Big Guy" as we suspected all along. **But ask yourself, "Why, now?" What after 2 years the media suddenly cares?** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60102848:JlVQquoNG:m:1:3103520637:84FEAAE25081BEE4E9BC21FD15D0E48A:r "Join the Fight")It's simple. They're trying to get ahead of the story now so that they can dismiss it as "old news" when the other shoe drops before November's election. But we can't wait a minute longer. Biden is a criminal and it's time to do something about it. **[That's why I filed a bill in Congress demanding the Impeachment of Joe Biden aka "the Big Guy" and I need your help to keep the pressure on Congress.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60102848:JlVQquoNG:m:1:3103520637:84FEAAE25081BEE4E9BC21FD15D0E48A:r "That’s why I filed a bill in
Congress demanding the Impeachment of Joe Biden aka “the Big Guy” and I need your help to keep the pressure on Congress.")** **[Can I count on you to donate $25, $50, or $100 today?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60102848:JlVQquoNG:m:1:3103520637:84FEAAE25081BEE4E9BC21FD15D0E48A:r "Can I
count on you to donate $25, $50, or $100 today?")** The Left and their allies in Big Tech and the media have long stopped caring about the truth. That was painfully evident the first time we found out about Hunter Biden's laptop. When the New York Post reported on Hunter's laptop, the Deep State unleashed its fury to discredit the story. 50 ~~intelligence operatives~~ Deep State hacks called it Russian disinformation, Facebook censored the story, and Twitter even banned the New York Post's account outright. Just like they've done to me and President Trump, they blocked the truth! If we don't impeach Biden soon, we'll never find out the full story and the Left's effort to protect Grandpa Joe is going to work. **[That's why I need your help to keep the pressure up on Congress to impeach Joe Biden. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $250, or $500 today?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60102848:JlVQquoNG:m:1:3103520637:84FEAAE25081BEE4E9BC21FD15D0E48A:r "That’s why I need your help to keep the pressure up on Congress to impeach Joe Biden. Can I count on you to chip in $100, $250, or $500
today?")** They know I'm right which is why the Leftists are doing all they can to block my attempts to impeach Joe Biden. They will stop at nothing to shut me up to keep me from exposing the truth. That's why Big Tech has repeatedly banned my accounts from Twitter and Pelosi works hard to keep a microphone out of my hands on Capitol Hill. DC swamp monsters are even funneling campaign donations to both my Democrat and GOP challengers. It's like they know exactly how much the Chinese control Joe Biden through their bribes that they've funneled through Hunter. **[They're throwing everything AND the kitchen sink at me. That's why I need freedom-fighters like you to dig deep and help me continue the battle to impeach the criminal sitting in the Oval Office with your $100, $250, or $1,000 donation today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60102848:JlVQquoNG:m:1:3103520637:84FEAAE25081BEE4E9BC21FD15D0E48A:r "They’re throwing everything AND the kitchen sink at me.
That’s why I need freedom-fighters like you to dig deep and help me continue the battle to impeach the criminal sitting in the Oval Office with
your $100, $250, or $1,000 donation today.")** **Bottom line, they 're scared to death that all of it will come out if Biden does get impeached. That's why it's imperative that you help me continue this fight.** I'm ready to expose the facts and impeach Joe Biden, but I can't succeed without your help. **[Please join my efforts today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60102848:JlVQquoNG:m:1:3103520637:84FEAAE25081BEE4E9BC21FD15D0E48A:r "Please join my efforts today.")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) | | [IMPEACH JOE BIDEN!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60102848:JlVQquoNG:m:1:3103520637:84FEAAE25081BEE4E9BC21FD15D0E48A:r "IMPEACH JOE BIDEN!")
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**

It's Donald Trump Jr.
**Let me be blunt: Our nation 's future is on the line and immediate action is needed.**
Nancy Pelosi's favorite Super PAC just unleashed $100 MILLION in toss-up races across America. NO ONE could have imagined this much Liberal fundraising was even possible!
I knew I had to reach out directly to you. I recorded this urgent voice memo because we desperately need your help. My father has worked around the clock to make America great again, but it will all be for NOTHING if we keep letting the Democrats outraise us.

Will you abandon us at this critical moment?
For America,
Donald Trump Jr.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: We’re rushing support to Ukraine. You can help.
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do. We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9884%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ERho1AQwtOy3KMq9he0Zpw&sysid=1)
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28010%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3hcpcoXlTk19BcIxnzhjqQ&sysid=1)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28011%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bhiBYG3NR674rXAjFdmL9g&sysid=1)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28013%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3gaQctxL6PXdRWuN1ChiBw&sysid=1)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28014%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7jniDqLeUEZWSVzg6xNJog&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c28013%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3gaQctxL6PXdRWuN1ChiBw&sysid=1)
| | | _Copyright(C) 2022 Mercury One, Inc., All rights reserved._ Mercury One, Inc.
P.O. Box 140489
Irving, TX 75014 Mercury One is a trusted 501(c)(3) non-profit | EIN no. 45-3929881

---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9884%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ERho1AQwtOy3KMq9he0Zpw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9884%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ERho1AQwtOy3KMq9he0Zpw&sysid=1)

body:

Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER. >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv47rnh2ik08btj1r6pfjpde0o1kam540qqljj80_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor5c1h2bs)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter. >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjl7r1t84kjha5a2oj7s1dtf40oegl95u6bhspl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor5c1h2bs)**_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlrq1pvrvjdjov5v30hd571cdag515p8bvm8ckio_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor5c1h2bs)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

I just have one simple question for you:

**WILL YOU JOIN ME?**

**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter. >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd1sp9b0mckh3ualac78ml4kbug1q3sktqvltk08_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor5c1h2bs)**

Thank you & God Bless America.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoabdl8uorkgh06hk65d6tnih3qtalgt57bs18vo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor5c1h2bs)
Sarah Palin

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8ousq25dbneq4rq87a4rdc6kv9a07egn8e95sh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sb4ckrjctr0emonbcb7c9qmfdr6e2rj2ddjmph72orlelj3asj1mhjjed5ks4rjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l6ko74dr664pb6p1nm2qmash5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zertvvgj3286jlap8lr6l2u82dn62nefn32le9k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaomr5f30qmbnqvm7t2c1h3u6k09enjqbedjgsa8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z718bp629st4oggfdtq5hc90eokaku8vo23o5iog_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za663io1ok89elv7tqlfc90rjtb6emkictfghvb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi4j4imfknps3gtatvjt0t3sbfqqi6m4mk3rus9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zus9r9otlin86g6ep17jjfmrv941akt7dfiapgk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7qut3ghq8kkqcbmkf3lb5ftk43rb423dge3c360_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpj13itd21kf6mik6slho312cgmkge1p31244ts8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhjghk03ssis032komu8g0ssr899nfq93iqv95l8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpmh41kil65k21m3rmd7e6hbu9uc58cm0hgmnro8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6rqs2ocu9papo3fdmmqjduo4s83tkppno5fd0sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stimeor6clh2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb9a6gnjk9qt5j9ra3qpfk2lo8gc3jkji8o4snjo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cjjmapr3cpim49fg)

subject: Will you share your thoughts on inflation?
body:
Inflation is on the rise in America. And there's no sign of it slowing down. In February, consumer prices rose 7.9 percent - the highest annual inflation rate increase since January 1982.
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osc3qUqHNq)
_Please see a special message from our sponsor:_
---
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59948943:sc3qUqHNq:m:1:2532013465:0D91B05EF3C8ABEF894C658F0BDF6DF0:r)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Inflation is on the rise in America. And there's no sign of it slowing down.
In February, consumer prices rose 7.9 percent--the highest annual inflation rate increase since January 1982.
Economic historian John Steele Gordon discussed inflation in a recent issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty. And he noted that adding trillions more to the national debt is not the solution. In fact, it will only make the problem worse.
Nevertheless, support for socialism and other ideologies destructive of the free market also appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among younger Americans.
That's why you're receiving this email today.
Hillsdale College seeks to understand more clearly what Americans think about our nation's economy and the inflation we're experiencing. And I'm hoping you can help by completing our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59948943:sc3qUqHNq:m:1:2532013465:0D91B05EF3C8ABEF894C658F0BDF6DF0:r)**
The survey will take you only a few minutes to complete. But the results will help us develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about free market economics.
This educational effort is critical to reining in the growing appetite in Washington, D.C., to print more money to pay for ever-expanding government programs.
We think education is the surest way to reverse this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is vital as we expand our efforts to defend liberty nationwide by reaching and teaching millions.
So please don't wait.
Share your opinions on inflation and the state of our nation's economy by completing the **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59948943:sc3qUqHNq:m:1:2532013465:0D91B05EF3C8ABEF894C658F0BDF6DF0:r)**.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
P.S. Inflation in the United States is on the rise. We need your opinions to develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about this growing threat to liberty.
Please complete our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59948943:sc3qUqHNq:m:1:2532013465:0D91B05EF3C8ABEF894C658F0BDF6DF0:r)**
---

Please see a special message from our sponsor: | | | | | Dear fellow American, Inflation is on the rise in America. And there's no sign of it slowing down. In February, consumer prices rose 7.9 percent--the highest annual inflation rate increase since January 1982. Economic historian John Steele Gordon discussed inflation in a recent issue of Imprimis , Hillsdale College's digest of liberty. And he noted that adding trillions more to the national debt is not the solution. In fact, it will only make the problem worse. Nevertheless, support for socialism and other ideologies destructive of the free market also appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among younger Americans. That's why you're receiving this email today. Hillsdale College seeks to understand more clearly what Americans think about our nation's economy and the inflation we're experiencing. And I'm hoping you can help by completing our National Survey on Inflation in the United States using the secure link below: The survey will take you only a few minutes to complete. But the results will help us develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about free market economics. This educational effort is critical to reining in the growing appetite in Washington, D.C., to print more money to pay for ever-expanding government programs. We think education is the surest way to reverse this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is vital as we expand our efforts to defend liberty nationwide by reaching and teaching millions. So please don't wait. Share your opinions on inflation and the state of our nation's economy by completing the National Survey on Inflation in the United States using this secure link: . Warm regards, Larry P. name: Pro Life Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbifvpfpumrlfuv5tbs8fiblfqm0pim2f1hqdq7o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uqpbfdhheoo68d9lesq73dlme8qr9ctlmgpr4srnc8pn4ctn62ob7d1jepie1o37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlciqjadtiedj38o5jc9jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cjjm6pj0c9gm49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7f01vhqdoinqrnfru5dfqbq9uiuhmv7sjhrkcr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sthmco32c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0dlr5fd3vmfm5is4mfs3pie1dub5khol8g1lgrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sthmco32c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5vmef5heu80ppnhikafscg0rea02qvc2mjt5u1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sthmco32c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z7358etmub5mdoirnokl33mn31bn1bhg4kot7190).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq7t3f4sogbc7uic9eif7f67bglb1nvdf8g2999g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sthmco32c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Please join our Veterans for Diehl Coalition to honor those who have served our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
Thank you for your service
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
I'm making respect, support, and care for our military veterans a top priority in my campaign.
Military service runs deeply in both my family and in KathyJo's. Both of my grandfathers served in the Army, and my uncle was killed in Vietnam. KathyJo's uncle was the first Marine from Brockton to be killed in Vietnam.
Unfortunately, veterans in Massachusetts aren't getting the respect and support they deserve. I was one of the first statewide candidates to call for changes at the Soldiers' Home in Holyoke after dozens of veterans died during the pandemic. I'm also troubled by the closure of VA facilities in our area, which makes it more difficult for veterans to access essential health care. I also recognize the challenges veterans face finding affordable housing and getting hired after they reenter the civilian workforce. Our state needs to do more to help.
Patriotism and gratitude are essential components of who we are in the Commonwealth, and it's our obligation to show our appreciation to those who have served and continue to serve our country in uniform. We are forever grateful to you and your family for your hard work and sacrifice to defend our freedom.
No matter how or where you served, I am committed to making sure Massachusetts honors your service by making resources available and accessible to you here at home.
Are you a veteran who supports these essential initiatives for our veterans and active service members, and who wants to get involved in my campaign for Governor? If so, please let us know by joining my Veterans for Diehl Coalition:
---
|
---
| | [Learn More About Veterans for Diehl](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zU4NE3YuTamfagfbO-_v6BxVTI3MwVL77kzJ3OVzZy0FTFUWu0SLyKEHpBmXozAFvIIg17wnXFR0OGW7TOEKyUAnal_279prFeL-q9w4BQG9dq34qaSLVL8-JBNeEZCjkfYuuBiauqqYUkySs6EsFtpVVDmOwZJYtx2_zv_njVM=&c=bl8A2Azz_NB_vJLlXHkwMKy4Z1T44geEw6KqBO09wrEOxMvDbAEi0A==&ch=je_Dr1i3S4fPD8lqstSphBAQb4x7N8LyVzc7duN76iFY7qjsSVORmg==)
---
|
---
| Thank you for your service.
Sincerely,

name: Cindy Rose
subject: They left me no choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Last minute... |
You and I haven't met.

But if you're a patriot who's outraged by the horrors of Critical Race Theory and "transgenderism" being forced upon our kids in public schools, I hope you'll lend me a few minutes of your time.

My name is Cindy Rose and I'm a 100% unapologetic conservative running for my county school board in Frederick County, Maryland.

I'm a proud mom to five kids and a grandma to five more, with another on the way. Three of my children graduated from Frederick County Public Schools, while my youngest child and two of my grandkids are still there.

I should be giving my family all the time in the world. Instead, I'm busy planting yard signs and knocking on my neighbors' doors to beg for their votes.

Because the truth is, it's now or never.

You and I either take back our schools or we'll surrender our kids to be brainwashed by the radical Left. You and I either preserve freedom for the next generation or we lose America for good.

[That's why I hope you will please consider making a gift to the 1776 Project PAC today to elect conservatives like me to take back school boards across the country from the radical Left.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60110479:60MQsloUN:m:1:3317145305:BAAA86F393886C5C73A1CC0BEA271004:r)

To the Left, our children are nothing more than future foot soldiers for their Marxist and socialist agenda.

They think they have final say in how our children are raised, and they get to decide what values to teach them.

But it's not a teacher, principal, or administrator's job to decide our children's belief system, sexuality, or gender... AND IT NEVER WILL BE!

I'll be honest with you. The last thing I thought I'd ever have to do in my life was run for office. But I love my family, my community and my country.

I've been an activist in the politics of education for years, so I know full well how the radical Left has been poisoning our schools with their indoctrination programs for decades.

They're teaching kids that white people, and only white people, are racists. That people of color are perpetually oppressed.

In the county next door to mine, they're telling kids the phrase "Make America Great Again" is a step below lynching and hate crimes.

They're teaching kids younger and younger with explicit and obscene sexual content that no child of any age should ever hear.

All while they're grooming kids to become "transgender" and lining library shelves with pornographic books.

And if you call them out for any of this, they'll lie and say it isn't happening, call you a conspiracy nut, or worse, have the Department of Justice label you a "domestic terrorist."

This isn't who we are or what we stand for as Americans.

We aren't hateful. We are tolerant, integrated, and in agreement that malicious racial theories of all kinds should stay out of the classroom.

So why does the Left keep trying to divide us and teach our children to hate each other?

Because they are trying to socially engineer a generation by instilling hate for America, the Constitution, and the values that have made us great in the most impressionable generation.

[And if you agree with me with must put a stop to this before it's too late, I hope you'll act with a gift of $25 or more to the 1776 Project PAC today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60110479:60MQsloUN:m:1:3317145305:BAAA86F393886C5C73A1CC0BEA271004:r)

You are really needed now more than ever.

The 1776 Project PAC is supporting me, along with three other sane conservative candidates in my county, to take back a majority on our school board...

...That's not even to mention the roughly 300 other school board races the 1776 Project PAC is targeting across the country this year.

The bad news is, the Left has been building entrenched majorities on school boards for decades. They have the teachers' unions and billionaires like George Soros propping them up.

**But the good news is, for every school board race they've been involved in, the team at 1776 Project PAC has an astonishing 75% win rate!**

**And it costs them only $3,000 to elect one conservative school board member... a mere fraction compared to any other political campaign!**

So you can see, the gift you make now, no matter how large or small, can make an immediate and lasting impact for freedom and our children's education.

Maybe that's why patriots like Laura Ingraham and Donald Trump Jr. have endorsed the 1776 Project PAC. **Maybe that's why Tucker Carlson has said you should write them a check.**

I'm proud to have 1776's endorsement. But for me to win, for other conservatives running for school board to win, I need you and they need you to make it possible.

[America is the last, best hope on Earth. Your donation of $25 or more, given right now to the 1776 Project PAC, will put patriots who believe those words back on our school boards.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60110479:60MQsloUN:m:1:3317145305:BAAA86F393886C5C73A1CC0BEA271004:r)

Michelle Obama said the quiet part out loud a few years back...

_" That's why we start with the kids...so we can affect who they'll be forever."_

As much as it scares me to say, she's right.

It's going to take dedicated patriots like you and me to make sure sane, America-loving conservatives are the ones affecting our children's future.

Because our children's future is our country's future. And if we still want a country in 50 years, we're going to have to fight harder than ever right now.

Will you let me know if I can count on you?

Sincerely,

**Cindy Rose
Conservative Candidate,
Frederick County Public Schools**

P.S. Thank you so much for taking the time to read my message. I'd like to share one more thing about why I got involved in education in the first place.

Years ago, my medically-fragile child was forced to sit in a sweltering hot bus just because he lacked the "proper paperwork." No child should ever have to endure that.

Every day we send our kids off to school with the trust that they will be taken care of, but this tragically isn't always the case.

But this exposes one critical fact... the Left is simply too busy pushing their ideological agendas and brainwashing our children to truly care about the actual wellbeing of our kids.

That's why they covered up a sexual assault by a "transgender" student in Loudoun County, Virginia, and a rape in Alexandria.

We have to stop the madness and insanity. Right here. Right now.

[So please, stand with me and the 1776 Project PAC in taking back our school boards with a gift of $25 or more today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60110479:60MQsloUN:m:1:3317145305:BAAA86F393886C5C73A1CC0BEA271004:r)
[ TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS DONATE NOW ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60110479:60MQsloUN:m:1:3317145305:BAAA86F393886C5C73A1CC0BEA271004:r)

---

body:

---

---
Friend,

I hope you don’t mind me dropping into your inbox today — I’m Charlie Crist, and I’m running for governor to defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis. **[(If you’re already fired up to kick him out of office, you can click here to make a secure contribution today.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44035425/339816918/234651256?refcode=20220411_f_2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTNiYmM5MC01YmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J75PBsBBfmwVkLNgdM4lVL1ocxuYe83AWYyDGrjrWxY=)**

I announced my campaign in May 2021 because I believe we must build a Florida for All. And I say a Florida for **_All_** , because right now, Ron DeSantis is building a Florida for **_Ron_**. He’ll do anything and everything to boost his political fortunes, even if it means signing abhorrent policies into law like the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, which banned discussion of LGBTQ+ people and issues from Florida’s classrooms.

Put simply, **Ron DeSantis is cruel. Ron DeSantis is a bully. Ron DeSantis has got to GO!**

And according to a recent _POLITICO_ article, Democrats believe that our campaign has the best chance of defeating DeSantis. So here’s my promise to you today: we’re going to make it happen.

But I can’t do it alone. Gov. DeSantis has an army of far-right, billionaire donors at his beck and call, and they’ve already poured millions into his campaign coffers. [**_To counter this flood of money, I’ll need your help. Please chip in what you can to my campaign._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44035426/339816919/1278717326?refcode=20220411_f_2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTNiYmM5MC01YmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J75PBsBBfmwVkLNgdM4lVL1ocxuYe83AWYyDGrjrWxY=)

If we fail to defeat DeSantis in November, I worry about the future of Florida. One autocracy expert even said, “Ron DeSantis is turning Florida into his own mini-autocracy.”

By definition, a governor who’s only in it for himself will never put people first — and Floridians deserve a leader in Tallahassee who has _their_ best interests at heart.

Charlie Crist

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8v51edrn0i38bd0d200mr1ani53o0o6q6empqs0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onn6uojddhimpon4dtk6sr6ecr3m5im5d1lmmr38t3mcip6epblemor8dtl62p7eduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb4mkqjfcjmcooj1cr66uobapbi46h22sh2s8i66ob4sthm6or2cph2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zblhd66t4a00msb20n7ftl638s9q715ma81o88a0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sthm6or2cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zod4uq64sue8bgk932g3eal05ffuat547n0kmtio_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sthm6or2cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj6jo13gfrf7kh23qv3rf31lkrtblgffsuntob10_rp22sh2s8i66ob4sthm6or2cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. body:
---
| | | | | |

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: No prayer on Good Friday?
body:
It's been over 45 days since we sent the Spreckels Union School District a letter demanding immediate injunctive relief for the twisted gaslighting they did to Jessica Konen's 12-year-old daughter...

|
I apologize for being so abrupt, but I urgently need your help.

Unelected bureaucrats and corrupt politicians in Washington D.C. are threatening to shred the First Amendment to pieces by deciding when, where, and how you can exercise your God-given freedoms.

And my team of attorneys at the Center for American Liberty is trying to stop them with a critical lawsuit being heard this week at the Court of Appeals in Washington, D.C.

But with less than a week to secure a crucial victory in court before Good Friday, I'm relying on you and every other American patriot who cares about the unalienable rights enshrined in our constitution to help me today.

[**Will you please help us defend religious liberty by supporting our emergency appeal against the United States Capitol Police Board today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111251:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)

Let be briefly explain what this lawsuit is all about.

For the past 32 years, a local pastor - Reverend Patrick Mahoney - gathered his faithful parishioners on the steps of the United States Capitol on Good Friday to give thanks to God and to pray for our nation.

[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111251:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)
That was until last year when unelected bureaucrats intervened and shut the whole thing down.

For the first time in three decades, Rev. Mahoney was DENIED a permit to worship in public.

Then, a few months later, he applied for a permit to hold a prayer vigil at the U.S. Capitol on the anniversary of September 11 to pray for healing for our nation.

Again, his permit was DENIED.

_Never mind the fact that simply being required to get a permit to exercise the right to pray in public is a gross violation of the Constitution ..._

The feckless, unelected bureaucrats at the United States Capitol told Rev. Mahoney and his peaceful worshipers that they couldn't pray on the public grounds outside the Capitol.

But the Capitol Police Board didn't stop far-left Congresswoman Cori Bush from camping out on the Capitol steps for several days in protest.

[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111251:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)
The Capitol Police Board even granted a large organization a permit to protest with massive stage, sound equipment, and media presence.

And when asked, the Capitol Police Board admitted that they granted these and at least one other permit application at the request of a member of Congress.

There was never a real concern for "public safety."

**The U.S. Capitol Police Board denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray in public because he didn 't have the support of AOC, Nancy Pelosi, or any other member of Congress.**

THAT'S UNCONSTITUTIONAL.

It's not up to unelected bureaucrats or politicians to pick and choose who can speak, pray, or assemble in public.

That's why the Center for American Liberty is suing the United States Capitol Police Board on behalf of Rev. Patrick Mahoney for unconstitutionally denying him and his parishioners the right to exercise their First Amendment freedoms.

[**Will you help us win our lawsuit and hold these violators of the Constitution accountable with a tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111251:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)

The reason I need your help is because the Center for American Liberty - the public interest law firm I founded a few years ago to defend the liberties of Americans left behind by civil liberties legacy organizations - is a non-profit organization with limited means.

So, the only way we can afford to pay for this lawsuit and others like it is with the help of patriots like you.

**This lawsuit is going to cost $50,000. But that 's a small price to pay to protect our freedoms.**

I'm asking for your help because our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board represents so much more than just one man's right to pray in public.

This lawsuit represents your right, my right, and every American's right to exercise their freedom of speech, freedom of religion, and freedom of assembly...

...no matter what you have to say, when you want to say it, and how you express it.

Even if you never personally experienced it, I'll bet you know someone who was told that they couldn't go to church or leave their homes over the past few years under the totalitarian edicts of far-left governors in the name of "public safety..."

... while those very same elites attended lavish dinner parties at Michelin starred restaurants and turned a blind eye to abject anarchy by their far-left activist base.

And if they aren't held accountable for their hypocrisy and illegal restrictions, they'll continue to spur up "crisis" after "crisis" to gain further control of your life.

The constitutional rights of every American are on the line with our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board.

[**Please help us win this critical lawsuit by making a tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111251:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)

For Freedom,

[
](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111251:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)
Harmeet K. Dhillon

P.S. Like I mentioned, we have less than a week to win this case before Good Friday.

Earlier this week, the district court ruled against our original request for a preliminary injunction.

But I'm not taking "no" for an answer.

The Bill of Rights states plain as day that, "Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof..."

And the Center for American Liberty is feverishly working to preserve that guarantee for you, your children, and your grandchildren.

[**I hope that I can count on you to help us defend that right by contribution $35 or more to our emergency appeal against the U.S. Capitol Police Board today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111251:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)

Thank you in advance for your support!

[ DONATE ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111251:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111251:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)
---
[**Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111251:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)

The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
| (C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60111252:JcE9kloyN:m:1:3317145305:1C4CBE608176BE8076F0C1D88FDA698D:r)
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: Tucker Carlson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44036655/339822461/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDA2YmE3Ny02MGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoxbxYMXUQ92brjpXG49TyICvh7j_gS-dFpL28eb75Q=&emci=dc985944-2aba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e406ba77-60ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44036661/339822468/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDA2YmE3Ny02MGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoxbxYMXUQ92brjpXG49TyICvh7j_gS-dFpL28eb75Q=&emci=dc985944-2aba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e406ba77-60ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton.
As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.”
And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. **Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump.**
As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices.
Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president.
Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. **My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation.
**The polls show we can win.** The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**We need to raise another $250,000 before our critical mid-month deaadline, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before our mid-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44036667/339822474/-42398318?refcode=em20220412am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDA2YmE3Ny02MGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BoxbxYMXUQ92brjpXG49TyICvh7j_gS-dFpL28eb75Q=)

clean_body: Hello, As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton. As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.” And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump. As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices. Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president. Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug. If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation. The polls show we can win. The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. We need to raise another $250,000 before our critical mid-month deaadline, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Fox News’ propaganda cannot go unanswered. But it takes significant funding to run a full-scale campaign and take on all of Grassley’s and McConnell’s lies. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so whatever you can give today will go a long way. I am so thankful to have you on the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
