name: Should we Put AMERICA FIRST again?
subject: Joe Biden got this WRONG!
body:
Peter,
Joe Biden keeps saying he wants to “build back better.”

**But if President Trump was in office, we wouldn’t have to build back anything at all!**

When President Trump Put AMERICA FIRST, our country flourished - but now, Joe Biden just has us building back broke.

We know how WE feel about Joe Biden’s agenda, but we want to know what you think.

[**Let us know which you like better: Joe Biden’s “Build Back Better” Agenda or President Trump’s AMERICA FIRST vision!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=c5dfc9e369e049fc857eb2673801358e&_e=AY2GLeylYM93dwCArt7TtmttNGxjvc1mX_6NxX5h8sQ4dNGoTOs3jMiJuWVL7j4czTEjmv5Eq_t248JYClUkA2T87XxwQQOfSLm5rDxyBo2dTuSWCzSRyy_7BBj_G9CB44lk-2nWPdzhm00xexaWlkfMoVZQC9HXgLkaTeyrGjOyTWUZOj7Zkx32NwWOA7UB2CU2Js6y0eWZb0UGMmR7JvpiF-3t23SGtEwuiXr2h6bMSBVfi54aXk8CJ_M9coGUXKRifvgWCcQWyi9q5fXt5K07B2Mv3VFvNIviVNmGMPBC6VBPMIKOxZ8VekyKw1V2vQVxu72j-LDYIRe6I8H7IyEi1A5MpaSLUvz0bIkSUMBigekAt8qByF0bycXKySyH45WLSYXt0lyeQSrBgYLZ8KeYV41c3Tb2y7HvOMVCKs4%3D)

name: Val Demings
subject: I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44054224/339887936/-74008005?refcode=20220412_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTk5MDk0Yy04MGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khv2YZ5-wXilT6K1qX259hBXWyLlIYgqbHRhiAssn0s=) Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: **I cannot win this without you.** [**That's why I'm asking you to become one of the donors to my campaign for Senate by splitting a contribution between me and Serve America right now. Every dollar you can spare will help us build the strongest grassroots operation to defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44054225/339887937/-74008005?refcode=20220412_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTk5MDk0Yy04MGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khv2YZ5-wXilT6K1qX259hBXWyLlIYgqbHRhiAssn0s=) Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. **So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine.** The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. [**I stand on the side of our democratic institutions, on the side of everyday working Floridians – but I need your help to win this race. Will you split a contribution of $20 or more to Serve America and me to defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44054226/339887938/-74008005?refcode=20220412_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTk5MDk0Yy04MGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khv2YZ5-wXilT6K1qX259hBXWyLlIYgqbHRhiAssn0s=) In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: **6,112 donations, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend?** [**Split a contribution between Serve America and me of $20 or more right now – whatever you can spare to fuel our battleground Senate race – so we can defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44054227/339887939/-74008005?refcode=20220412_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTk5MDk0Yy04MGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khv2YZ5-wXilT6K1qX259hBXWyLlIYgqbHRhiAssn0s=) From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44054228/339887940/272679854?refcode=20220412_Demings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTk5MDk0Yy04MGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khv2YZ5-wXilT6K1qX259hBXWyLlIYgqbHRhiAssn0s=) clean_body: | | | = Friend, I'm Val Demings, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to defeat Marco Rubio and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida. Just 10,033 votes (0.2 percentage points) decided Florida's last Senate race – so I'll tell you the plain truth: I cannot win this without you. = Every day, I carry with me that I am a descendent of enslaved people, people who knew that they would not make it, but dreamed and prayed that one day I would. Their prayers carried me to this day – carried me through a life of public service as a social worker, as a law enforcement officer, the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's police chief, and as the proud representative of Florida's 10th Congressional district. So hear me when I say this: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the ’60s, have an amazing story of opportunity like mine. The prayers of my parents propel me forward, even now, giving me the strength and courage it takes to do what's right. To impeach and prosecute a corrupt president. To never stop fighting for gun safety reform. To push for truth, accountability, justice. = In my decades of public service, I've worked with some truly incredible individuals – champions of civil rights like my friend John Lewis, who said, "Each generation must do its part to create an even more fair, more just society." We're at an inflection point for our democracy that will decide if we live up to John Lewis' dream, friend. The modern-day Republican Party is committed to the exact opposite of what Congressman Lewis stood for. Marco Rubio and Senate Republicans grow more extreme by the day, more committed to a dangerous, anti-democratic agenda. Putting party over the future of our democracy, over the wants and needs of Florida's working families. You have my word, that when it comes to winning this race and delivering better leadership for Florida, I will fight like never before. Because when your friends and neighbors put their trust in you to be their voice, you work for them – and that's just not what we're seeing from Sen. Rubio. But it's only together that we'll have a shot at winning – so here's what I'm counting on: 6,112 donations, before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Are you in, friend? = From the bottom of my heart, friend, thank you for being on my team. —Congresswoman Val Demings = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

subject: Inflation Nation
body:
No New Taxes |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=36149f8fca&e=598f6aa24c)

| | Friend,

**40-year high inflation and record-high gas prices are a Biden Tax on all hard-working Georgians.**

Instead of reversing the disastrous socialist policies that have created this crisis, the Democrats are doubling down with new spending and pledging to raise taxes.

Let me be clear, the American people cannot afford new taxes.

After Democrat lockdowns crushed our businesses, we are struggling to recover due to the Biden economy. _Raising taxes will crush the people and the businesses of Georgia even more._

When I am elected, I pledge to fight to lower taxes, NOT raise them **[If you do not want a Biden Tax Hike, Join My Team Today!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=d817acaaee&e=598f6aa24c)** Together, we will put an end to the failed Biden agenda and put this economy and country back on the right track.

Republicans will lower taxes, get government out of your way, and Save America.

David Curry

name: Team Kilmer
subject: One step closer to making the RECOMPETE Act law.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
All Americans deserve economic opportunity.
Peter --

Growing up on the Olympic Peninsula, Derek saw firsthand what happens when an economy is struggling. When the timber industry took it on the chin, a lot of his friends' parents lost their jobs, and it had a lasting impact on him. That's why today he's working to protect workers and communities so that no one gets left behind in our economy.

It's time to provide communities with the resources and help they need to create jobs. Last year, Derek introduced the RECOMPETE Act along with over 50 bipartisan Members of Congress. This legislation would establish a new grant program to invest in communities that have faced long-term economic challenges.

The House just passed a pilot program of the RECOMPETE Act. And Derek is working to make this essential legislation law to create more economic opportunities for more people in more places.

**[Will you join Derek in supporting the RECOMPETE Act? Add your name now as a co-sponsor to support getting this bill passed into law without delay>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/2fscVpZcnSei4FBdVD1xl_M4BeJPggJQ1mw_rvX38ZQ=/2FX3j8lDXAYC8o5nVDbmuY2I4-YZ3KEyJrSLtHx-pug=?ms=em22_220412_recomp_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&refcode=em22_220412_recomp_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&source=em22_220412_recomp_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220412_recomp_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Right now, 1/6 of the U.S. population lives in economically distressed communities. Many of these communities are left behind, lacking adequate economic opportunities.

Derek is committed to creating an economy that works for working people and making sure that all Americans have access to good-paying jobs. That's why he is fighting so hard to get the RECOMPETE Act passed into law.

**[Now he needs your help to make sure that everyone has the opportunity to thrive-- regardless of their zip code. Add your name here and join Derek by pushing for the swift passage of the RECOMPETE Act into law.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2fscVpZcnSei4FBdVD1xl_M4BeJPggJQ1mw_rvX38ZQ=/2FX3j8lDXAYC8o5nVDbmuY2I4-YZ3KEyJrSLtHx-pug=?ms=em22_220412_recomp_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&refcode=em22_220412_recomp_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&source=em22_220412_recomp_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220412_recomp_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}})**

Together we can secure opportunities for all Americans.

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/2fscVpZcnSei4FBdVD1xl_M4BeJPggJQ1mw_rvX38ZQ=/6yY_VsQeI3TAopDbzhDHIM-ir5RJp67Lc-RX3_0d_5U=?refcode=em22_220412_recomp_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220412_recomp_adv_gq_act___tk_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: A difficult decision to help us flip this Senate seat from red to blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
A few weeks ago, I made a tough call to help us flip this Senate seat from red to blue.

Already, Ron Johnson has gone up on TV with two new ads, and Republican groups are expected to go “all-in” to help him — and they’re doing it knowing that our campaign is in the strongest position to defeat him.

So, I gave my campaign manager the green light to authorize a large investment in paid media so we can compete with the GOP and get our message out to as many Wisconsin voters as possible. To be frank with you, this investment was approved even though it made our budget much tighter than we would have wanted.

I felt comfortable making this difficult decision because I was willing to bet that this grassroots team would get us back on track and ensure we had the financial resources to take such a calculated risk. You came through. Big time.

With your help, we were able to keep our TV ads running through March. Now, we’re trying to stay up in April. I’m told we need to raise about $10,000 online per day to compete with Ron Johnson on the airwaves, and we’re about 22% short of where we need to be for today. **Can you help us fill that 22% gap with a donation to our campaign? If 79 people contribute to this message today, we can get back on track in no time. Look, I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs. In fact, I never have. You should know that the vast majority of our donations come from messages like this one. This grassroots team has always risen to the occasion, and that’s how I know we have what it takes to win this seat.

Republicans might outspend us, but they sure as heck won’t outwork us — which is why I’m counting on folks like you to help us build a campaign strong enough to combat their attacks in the weeks ahead.

Thank you,

Sarah Godlewski

clean_body: A few weeks ago, I made a tough call to help us flip this Senate seat from red to blue. Already, Ron Johnson has gone up on TV with two new ads, and Republican groups are expected to go “all-in” to help him — and they’re doing it knowing that our campaign is in the strongest position to defeat him. So, I gave my campaign manager the green light to authorize a large investment in paid media so we can compete with the GOP and get our message out to as many Wisconsin voters as possible. To be frank with you, this investment was approved even though it made our budget much tighter than we would have wanted. I felt comfortable making this difficult decision because I was willing to bet that this grassroots team would get us back on track and ensure we had the financial resources to take such a calculated risk. You came through. Big time. With your help, we were able to keep our TV ads running through March. Now, we’re trying to stay up in April. I’m told we need to raise about $10,000 online per day to compete with Ron Johnson on the airwaves, and we’re about 22% short of where we need to be for today. Can you help us fill that 22% gap with a donation to our campaign? If 79 people contribute to this message today, we can get back on track in no time. Every dollar matters as we gear up to fight back against Republican attacks and flip this Senate seat blue: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Look, I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs. In fact, I never have. You should know that the vast majority of our donations come from messages like this one. This grassroots team has always risen to the occasion, and that’s how I know we have what it takes to win this seat. Republicans might outspend us, but they sure as heck won’t outwork us — which is why I’m counting on folks like you to help us build a campaign strong enough to combat their attacks in the weeks ahead. Thank you, Sarah Godlewski = Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. With your help, we can flip this seat. Chip in to join us: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: 7 reasons I’m the Pro-Trump candidate
body:
I am the pro-Trump candidate. But what does that actually mean for you?
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hp8LV4BPLx-eeF7ezx7ukM9upXgTONZr3HxFjzX8C6BdqzmMD9agqkM4-w6omueId4F4FLlACpJS-SU5GHmAun1cFJjPk9Xg-UsV6nWsQb8Us4w55ZbCVgfWV_WgU_HBhwTAH7waTkYC37WZ2VuYHrQQQNRvxgfhVpK4nYzj9QOinhjwKM5O3A==&c=AeJJFEDPHWMgvD-b08-qDrCOtsb1qy3ROqwKKvqpO1HVEYjpM8aIVA==&ch=Eu9eDGmL6YE70fgAumo7QzpQw58CM1-B2UEN9NEHR2guMHavlubo0Q==)
---
| Peter,
I am the pro-Trump candidate. But what does that actually mean for you, Peter?
1\. I'm a businessman--not a politician.
When I was 37, I started my small business. Unlike politicians who are out of touch with reality, I know how important local jobs are to a community. [Click here to support someone with local values >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hp8LV4BPLx-eeF7ezx7ukM9upXgTONZr3HxFjzX8C6BdqzmMD9agqkM4-w6omueId4F4FLlACpJS-SU5GHmAun1cFJjPk9Xg-UsV6nWsQb8Us4w55ZbCVgfWV_WgU_HBhwTAH7waTkYC37WZ2VuYHrQQQNRvxgfhVpK4nYzj9QOinhjwKM5O3A==&c=AeJJFEDPHWMgvD-b08-qDrCOtsb1qy3ROqwKKvqpO1HVEYjpM8aIVA==&ch=Eu9eDGmL6YE70fgAumo7QzpQw58CM1-B2UEN9NEHR2guMHavlubo0Q==)
2\. I am 100% pro-life.
My mother was adopted, so this issue is close to my heart. If you send me to the Senate, I will vote to defund Planned Parenthood and end late-term abortion. [Click here to fight for the unborn >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hp8LV4BPLx-eeF7ezx7ukM9upXgTONZr3HxFjzX8C6BdqzmMD9agqkM4-w6omueId4F4FLlACpJS-SU5GHmAun1cFJjPk9Xg-UsV6nWsQb8Us4w55ZbCVgfWV_WgU_HBhwTAH7waTkYC37WZ2VuYHrQQQNRvxgfhVpK4nYzj9QOinhjwKM5O3A==&c=AeJJFEDPHWMgvD-b08-qDrCOtsb1qy3ROqwKKvqpO1HVEYjpM8aIVA==&ch=Eu9eDGmL6YE70fgAumo7QzpQw58CM1-B2UEN9NEHR2guMHavlubo0Q==)
3\. I will fight for the 2nd Amendment.
I am a Constitutional Conservative, and I will never waver in supporting our Second Amendment rights. It is one of the most important fundamental rights we Americans have, and we must stand up to those who seek to strip us of that right. [Click here to protect the 2A >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hp8LV4BPLx-eeF7ezx7ukM9upXgTONZr3HxFjzX8C6BdqzmMD9agqkM4-w6omueId4F4FLlACpJS-SU5GHmAun1cFJjPk9Xg-UsV6nWsQb8Us4w55ZbCVgfWV_WgU_HBhwTAH7waTkYC37WZ2VuYHrQQQNRvxgfhVpK4nYzj9QOinhjwKM5O3A==&c=AeJJFEDPHWMgvD-b08-qDrCOtsb1qy3ROqwKKvqpO1HVEYjpM8aIVA==&ch=Eu9eDGmL6YE70fgAumo7QzpQw58CM1-B2UEN9NEHR2guMHavlubo0Q==)
4\. I am firmly against leftist indoctrination in the classroom.
Critical Race Theory has no place in schools. We should teach our kids to look inside a person and not divide the classroom by race. We need to fight against the politics of division and hatred coming from the Left. [Click here to make America the Great Melting Pot of the world >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hp8LV4BPLx-eeF7ezx7ukM9upXgTONZr3HxFjzX8C6BdqzmMD9agqkM4-w6omueId4F4FLlACpJS-SU5GHmAun1cFJjPk9Xg-UsV6nWsQb8Us4w55ZbCVgfWV_WgU_HBhwTAH7waTkYC37WZ2VuYHrQQQNRvxgfhVpK4nYzj9QOinhjwKM5O3A==&c=AeJJFEDPHWMgvD-b08-qDrCOtsb1qy3ROqwKKvqpO1HVEYjpM8aIVA==&ch=Eu9eDGmL6YE70fgAumo7QzpQw58CM1-B2UEN9NEHR2guMHavlubo0Q==)
5\. I will fight for border security.
We must control our borders to exist as a sovereign nation. More importantly, our border crisis has increased drug and human trafficking. We need to stop drugs from entering our country and fight for those who are helpless. [Click here to build the wall and fight the horrors of human trafficking >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hp8LV4BPLx-eeF7ezx7ukM9upXgTONZr3HxFjzX8C6BdqzmMD9agqkM4-w6omueId4F4FLlACpJS-SU5GHmAun1cFJjPk9Xg-UsV6nWsQb8Us4w55ZbCVgfWV_WgU_HBhwTAH7waTkYC37WZ2VuYHrQQQNRvxgfhVpK4nYzj9QOinhjwKM5O3A==&c=AeJJFEDPHWMgvD-b08-qDrCOtsb1qy3ROqwKKvqpO1HVEYjpM8aIVA==&ch=Eu9eDGmL6YE70fgAumo7QzpQw58CM1-B2UEN9NEHR2guMHavlubo0Q==)
6\. I believe in election integrity.
There is a problem when half of the country doesn't trust the election results. I will advocate for reforms to ensure our elections are secure--starting with voter ID and an end to ballot harvesting. The American people should have faith in our electoral system. [Click here to fight for your vote's security >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hp8LV4BPLx-eeF7ezx7ukM9upXgTONZr3HxFjzX8C6BdqzmMD9agqkM4-w6omueId4F4FLlACpJS-SU5GHmAun1cFJjPk9Xg-UsV6nWsQb8Us4w55ZbCVgfWV_WgU_HBhwTAH7waTkYC37WZ2VuYHrQQQNRvxgfhVpK4nYzj9QOinhjwKM5O3A==&c=AeJJFEDPHWMgvD-b08-qDrCOtsb1qy3ROqwKKvqpO1HVEYjpM8aIVA==&ch=Eu9eDGmL6YE70fgAumo7QzpQw58CM1-B2UEN9NEHR2guMHavlubo0Q==)
7\. I will end government waste.
Our national debt is out of control. Politicians have spent too much of our tax dollars on wasteful programs, and Joe Biden wants to waste at least $6 trillion more. It's time the government stops wasting your tax dollars, Peter. [Click here to help end government waste >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hp8LV4BPLx-eeF7ezx7ukM9upXgTONZr3HxFjzX8C6BdqzmMD9agqkM4-w6omueId4F4FLlACpJS-SU5GHmAun1cFJjPk9Xg-UsV6nWsQb8Us4w55ZbCVgfWV_WgU_HBhwTAH7waTkYC37WZ2VuYHrQQQNRvxgfhVpK4nYzj9QOinhjwKM5O3A==&c=AeJJFEDPHWMgvD-b08-qDrCOtsb1qy3ROqwKKvqpO1HVEYjpM8aIVA==&ch=Eu9eDGmL6YE70fgAumo7QzpQw58CM1-B2UEN9NEHR2guMHavlubo0Q==)
Thank you,
Mike Gibbons

---

body:
In just 35 days’ time, it will be primary election day here in Oregon (May 17th) and we’re diligently working to make sure that we’re ready for it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=3256cac74b2f426e8330f77157c0c248&_e=0It-nixh0Lhqx0I4Gy9w696jcLJa2ObFsyey3weviEckIhCuMjX9tlaMgTf8edAx4mzTtLIrL7ol95flCYWCCsMLd6rzs92KVy-S4A8xXysdVRl3qP708xS5-lMmq1_F9nBHm8AeC3raWVGm17Rz0LG1qSncRrz5xC1ivGE2wGlsWYe5j_ypeBeDVGzAdZ7K02R60ENirHsllYskM1hGeAqYEEewlvqTE-tnq4MPK0WwiEr20eB9UiYhdMku3oD-xcgUZSR-2IH040T2VsmUUmYp5ZbXB2tFLd_wa7L15p5VNbdbyWGATQmCEWpn8GAaVnvG7A06BNaUqkkkMLXXDC9U23ABueA1hgNU2Yx-wbwKu0vkWY3xn-G1FkpS3FIh7E7g5DXo9Y9Qn9R2H87m3WGjkHgUBv52iwPvfHQ9JEmuGI5-kFrZlNGeK6u2dSXsi7QVE70Q2svK8HqOdIo4Tg%3D%3D)

_
_
Peter,

In just 35 days’ time, it will be primary election day here in Oregon (**May 17th**) and we’re diligently working to make sure that we’re ready for it.

Before we can gear up for the general election showdown - which is sure to be a nail biter of a race - I must first secure the Republican nomination.

With that in mind, I want to provide you with a few reasons right now as to why investing a couple bucks into my campaign is a good idea, especially if you’re someone who wants to take back the House from the crazed Democrats in November.

1. If I become the nominee – Democrats are going to target this district with millions. Recently Nancy Pelosi’s super PAC made a commitment to spend **$3 MILLION to prop up Oregon Democrats** - including my future opponent.
2. In 2020, Pelosi spent more than **$5 million** shoring up the campaign of my former opponent - ensuring his reelection.
3. This is the first time in nearly 3 decades that there is**no incumbent running** for this seat, meaning it’s anyone’s race to win/lose.

**In the next 35 days my campaign manager and I have set a goal of raising $13,584 in online donations.** To break that down, we need to be raising $377 per day through May 17th to hit that mark. That comes out to $15 per hour, every hour.

**[Here is my ask: I’m looking for two conservatives to each make a donation of $7.50 in the next hour.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=3256cac74b2f426e8330f77157c0c248&_e=0It-nixh0Lhqx0I4Gy9w696jcLJa2ObFsyey3weviEckIhCuMjX9tlaMgTf8edAx4mzTtLIrL7ol95flCYWCCsMLd6rzs92KVy-S4A8xXysdVRl3qP708xS5-lMmq1_F9nBHm8AeC3raWVGm17Rz0LG1qSncRrz5xC1ivGE2wGlsWYe5j_ypeBeDVGzAdZ7K02R60ENirHsllYskM1hGeAqYEEewlvqTE-tnq4MPK0WwiEr20eB9UiYhdMku3oD-tb-j_6U1nnexieYaE8N6Tge1WWjdCjQyHkKp4fWGO_fqrp0mPHF3oZJKYpE_mmtrdyl5LECvZ68BQrdILN-ft0RgE8QCFXN64DU1mriC8UQQvJNIoQAzt6nIedA9P9FxvZ9jL3d4UJPm4AfJAnYnjWQKfLbRWsvtQv1UUW4ioHlzTs4hah6TcfVsozDO_selkZncyyqq47OX3RQvJaMGBw%3D%3D)** All it takes is two conservatives donating $7.50 every hour to hit our daily goal of raising $377.

clean_body: In just 35 days’ time, it will be primary election day here in Oregon (May 17th) and we’re diligently working to make sure that we’re ready for it. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | Peter, In just 35 days’ time, it will be primary election day here in Oregon (May 17th) and we’re diligently working to make sure that we’re ready for it. Before we can gear up for the general election showdown - which is sure to be a nail biter of a race - I must first secure the Republican nomination. With that in mind, I want to provide you with a few reasons right now as to why investing a couple bucks into my campaign is a good idea, especially if you’re someone who wants to take back the House from the crazed Democrats in November. 1. If I become the nominee – Democrats are going to target this district with millions. Recently Nancy Pelosi’s super PAC made a commitment to spend $3 MILLION to prop up Oregon Democrats - including my future opponent. 2. In 2020, Pelosi spent more than $5 million shoring up the campaign of my former opponent - ensuring his reelection. 3. This is the first time in nearly 3 decades that there isno incumbent running for this seat, meaning it’s anyone’s race to win/lose. In the next 35 days my campaign manager and I have set a goal of raising $13,584 in online donations. To break that down, we need to be raising $377 per day through May 17th to hit that mark. That comes out to $15 per hour, every hour. All it takes is two conservatives donating $7.50 every hour to hit our daily goal of raising $377. HELP ME HIT MY DAILY GOAL I appreciate you! And I very much look forward to updating you on our fundraising progress over the next 35 days. Thankful for your help, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress HELP ME HIT MY DAILY GOAL | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Niki=20Conforti?=
subject: Is a Recession Looming?
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/94ab41cf2451/conforti-for-congress-7059261?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Now, on top of everything else we have had to deal with, we can just add a potential recession to the pile.

The once thought 'transitory' inflation has gone on for so long and has woven its way into the fabric of the economy that the best way to fix it is with extreme measures and higher interest rates. The Fed has increased interest rates once and is expected to do so several more times this year. This will put more strain on the economy. We are already seeing indicators surfacing in the bond market that recession is on the horizon.

According to the WSJ, the economists they survey put the chances for a recession in the next year at 28%. That is a 10% increase in just a couple of months and more than double what the consensus was a year ago.

Sean Casten and Marie Newman are supporting this administration's failed policies that are squeezing the American people. As if things aren't bad enough with the increased costs of living and higher energy prices, now we are faced with an economic slowdown that will only make things worse!

If you want your US Congressional Representative to stand up for your rights and fight for policies that will benefit the American people - Vote Conforti for Congress June 28th!
Please consider donating to the Conforti for Congress campaign. [Click here](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=8132e881e0&e=25f4fa3311)
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District
---
| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=7705473b1e&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=f74599ab04&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=a0ffc99562&e=25f4fa3311)!

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This is how we fight back in Texas

There’s a big election coming up. Warren Democrats endorsed four Democratic U.S. House candidates in Texas before last month’s primary election. One of them, Greg Casar, won the nomination outright in the first round of voting. **And three more made it through to the runoffs on May 24: Jessica Cisneros, Jasmine Crockett, and Michelle Vallejo.** These candidates are doing everything they can to get out the vote in these critical final weeks — and they need a strong grassroots movement at their side. [_**So, let’s jump in the fight. If you can, please split a donation today between Jessica Cisneros, Jasmine Crockett, Michelle Vallejo, and Warren Democrats. >
Here’s a little more background on why I’m supporting each of them, and why it’s powerfully important that we get them elected:
Michelle Vallejo is running in Texas’ 15th District, where she understands the unique needs of her community. As the daughter of immigrants, a fierce community advocate, and a small business owner, Michelle has the experience to hold this crucial swing seat.
In Texas’ 28th District, Jessica Cisneros is fighting to ensure every person has quality health care, bring jobs back to her community, and restore humanity and justice to our broken immigration system. She knows that when progressives are unapologetic about our values and who we’re in this battle for, we win.
And I’ve endorsed Jasmine Crockett in Texas’ 30th District because she’s also the kind of fighter we need in Congress. She’ll stand up for education, good jobs, and every American’s right to vote and have that vote counted.
**Jessica, Jasmine, and Michelle will be much-needed additions to Congress, because they’ll bring the type of progressive voices we need for our future.**
I’m also keeping a particularly close eye on their races because Texas will always have a special place in my heart. It’s where I got my second chance at college, for $50 a semester at the University of Houston (go Cougars!). It’s where my Aunt Bee rescued me by moving to help with child care. It’s where I first taught Sunday School and bankruptcy law, and it’s where I began studying how our economy lays traps for working people.
In Texas, I saw what can happen when a person has a fighting chance to build something real. I saw how we can lift each other up. But I also saw what we’re up against: a system where the rules are tilted to benefit the wealthy and well-connected.
And these days, we’ve seen Texas Republicans attack basic freedoms and their own constituents. Attacking abortion rights. Attacking voting rights. Attacking trans children. It’s despicable. We can’t let it stand — and part of how we fight back is by electing progressive leaders, up and down the ticket, who fight for our values.
**Jessica, Jasmine, and Michelle will make us proud in Congress. But first, we’ve got to make sure that all three of them win their runoff elections on May 24 — and grassroots donations will help get out the vote in these make-or-break final weeks.**
[_**With only weeks until the Texas runoffs, will you split a $3 donation between Jessica Cisneros, Jasmine Crockett, Michelle Vallejo, and Warren Democrats right now? These races are coming down to the wire, and every single contribution will go a long way.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44055706/339895184/1577720269?refcode=EMZ4H_TAN_20220412_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2Y3ODA5Ni04NWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=URp-HfQHDiTedu3M7mxyVB04bNkg9TOUeoLP-ClxS3s=)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
Thank you for all your help – we’ve still got a lot more to do [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6877%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=dqNrpbSgSDrDy3R%2btgMR1g&sysid=1)
Thank you for all your help - we’ve still got a lot more to do

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60655%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4SMR4rPZGk3S7P5z6CvF%2bA&sysid=1)
---

Folks,

**My house is filled with the things I love: my wife, my dogs, my books, and my guns.**

_Unfortunately_ , the Radical Left wants to take away my guns, and ban my books. And they’ll do it too unless those of us who are still sane don’t stop them.

**Sadly, we came up short on our fundraising goals for the First Quarter. We were about $10,000 short and I’m definitely feeling the heat of this missed deadline.**

**[I’m here to humbly ask for your support so we can make up some ground on my Radical Left opponent.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c60656%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ydXEsdgj2QuyBdko7CUtrg&sysid=1)**

We did just about everything right last month but the Radical Left has got their pockets lined by pink-haired wokers out in Hollywood and the snobs up on Wall Street.

Grab your Diehl signs and American flags, and join in our Statewide Sign Standout, on:
Monday, April 18th from 3-5 p.m.
Where? Across the State, from Berkshires to Boston!

Hey team, there’s three things you need to know about our race right now:
1. Wes and Aruna have an impressive coalition of endorsements, including one former governor, two sitting county executives, five sitting state senators, one former state senator, 17 sitting delegates, one former delegate, 13 council members, four mayors, one former mayor, and five unions or organizations including the Maryland State Education Association;

2. With ten Democratic candidates vying for the nomination and our primary pushed back to July 19, this is shaping up to be the most expensive gubernatorial race in Maryland’s history, which makes your grassroots donations all the more impactful;

3. **Tonight at midnight marks our next deadline, and we’re trying to raise $20,000 to stay on track in advance of that benchmark.**

**[When we filed our last report, we led the field in fundraising by a big margin, and it’s important we keep that going. Let’s make sure we’re not being outraised by our opponents, and have the resources we need to keep Wes and Aruna on the campaign trail: rush $10 or more right now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44056495/339897962/531951871?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220412aprildeadline5_tw_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTQyODMwYy04OWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xhg55emVyE4Ee0LiUeC_0dCeLQ5c0QiGE2IW9EPgPAo=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hey team, there’s three things you need to know about our race right now: 1. Wes and Aruna have an impressive coalition of endorsements, including one former governor, two sitting county executives, five sitting state senators, one former state senator, 17 sitting delegates, one former delegate, 13 council members, four mayors, one former mayor, and five unions or organizations including the Maryland State Education Association; 2. With ten Democratic candidates vying for the nomination and our primary pushed back to July 19, this is shaping up to be the most expensive gubernatorial race in Maryland’s history, which makes your grassroots donations all the more impactful; 3. body:
April is halfway through and our pre-primary filing is due (tomorrow)!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44056787/339899675/699057340?refcode=EM_FR_220412PrePrimary2_N_TK_30DO_4_NG_N_TESTA_logo_TESTA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWQyNjA2MS04YWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5D8-_4qLOHTNkqe5E2EScwSxeaKlLcH4H8q-eIiEWU=) Team,

Another day, another deadline. Tomorrow, as we approach April’s halfway point, we have another filing due, which will make our fundraising numbers public once again.

[**_Our race was just called as a TOSS-UP by Sabato’s Crystal Ball. It’s now more critical than ever that we hit every single goal. name: Mark, Membership Services
subject: I think something is wrong here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Can you help me confirm your membership status?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zesvo3b4d4uds19ic7a0srnh8493bg82br711ce0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongclgr0ob4emoj4o70e9or6d9ictg75cbl61i70s5jmkrjcctlceor4p3kegrr0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4cb6e5rjacr7m8q6cc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

| |
---
| | | Hi Friend,

I'm Mark, and I work for the Washington Circle donor club at House Republicans HQ.

I'm going through my list and permanently banning patriots who failed to accept our final invitation to join this exclusive club of top GOP donors.

_**[You can accept your invitation before the deadline and join the club HERE>>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsg48unc5qc9fb5k0ga94lv2en0elos1agkse3c8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph2bs)**_

_**The thing is, I saw your name and was about to permanently ban you from joining the Washington Circle, but I knew this had to be some sort of mistake, so I want to give you one more chance.**_

I'm not really supposed to do this, but you've always been a top supporter, so I thought I'd make an exception just this one time. _**[Accept your Washington Circle invitation HERE>>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp7jnruib7r69s024rl6vr898ffuu3a79bol28l0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph2bs)**_

Please don't make me regret making this exception for you.

Best,

Mark
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Membership Services (via House Republicans)
Subject: FYI: We're about to permanently ban you
To: _**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zilednp5hpkfpgosp6e5ofsaeobe5i96dlp7ev60_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph2bs)**_

Friend,

We've emailed you several times asking you to join the Washington Circle, but you haven't responded to us. And now sadly, we have to let you know this is _**your last chance to accept your membership invitation.**_

Since we still haven't heard from you and today is the last day to join. I wanted to reach out to you directly, Friend, and offer you **ONE MORE CHANCE** to accept your Washington Circle membership.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgmkoefu6jer3mbdhs9t68qj0kb0f1p8dj56lvjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph2bs)

| | | [ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zch2e5g2se82ptmu2fa2cf86g605kqkf63u0j76o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph2bs)
---

_**[If you fail to join right now you will be marked as LAPSED and we will have to PERMANENTLY BAN you from our exclusive Washington Circle donor club.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi18k3370jt2stnmncjflak4pbm0v5kp7pcd3tl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph2bs)**_

Accepting your Washington Circle membership is of critical importance to our America first movement.

**Here 's why joining the Washington Circle is so important:**

1.** ** You will be supporting conservative candidates across the country as they go on the offense and bring the fight to Democrats.

2\. You will be standing up for the patriotic values of America's founders.

3\. You will be supporting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and democrats accountable for their corruption and failures.

4\. You will be an essential part of winning back the 5 seats we need to fire Nancy Pelosi for good and preserve President Trump's hard fought achievements.

---
| | | [ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztc1plfpboqr5kdgflkg59rl1om871g9rl4rn2v0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph2bs)
---

2022 is shaping up to be a historic year for House Republicans, and our Washington Circle members will lead the charge to an historic victory.

_**Your support today will ensure that we win BIG on election day and restore an America first majority in Congress.**_

America can't afford one-party rule by the Radical Left much longer. We need patriots like you to step up and help us save America. _**[Activate your membership before we permanently ban you and make a HUGE impact right now!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zev67sh1j0u0utl56tlb73fkvtmpan0s70npbie0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph2bs)**_

---
| | | [ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0th56q9rpahvf5iks3ojbloe2ph54hksorfou80_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph2bs)
---
For America,

Membership Services, House Republicans

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zusm4i4p2ckuu2lmlimnbucslkdb1p4j65e73j88_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob1cph2bs)**

name: Crystal Cavalier for Congress
subject: In a Vulnerable Spot
body:
Important Update

| [ ](http://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/?e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=1)
---
Friend -- It's Kasey, Field Director for Crystal's Campaign. You might not know this, but just as our campaign was getting off the ground, Crystal's mom had a life-altering stroke that left one side of her body paralyzed. Without a second thought, Crystal took her in, and has been in the role of caregiver ever since. It hasn't been easy, and on top of everything else, Crystal is days away from defending her dissertation and getting her doctorate. As a campaign, we've been shocked by the lack of coverage Crystal’s historic run has received. So many people still have no clue that we have the chance to elect the first frontline, female American Indian Water Protector to represent us in Congress. We need your support to help get the word out in these remaining weeks leading up to the May 17th Primary. _Are you able to give 2 hours this week to help this crucial grassroots effort?_
* * *
### Our greatest needs:
### [Sign up to phone bank](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=MUCxv5WoNRHVjCxPhSD-myrVELx1sslKlO7q0ZPo_DaU-dcJuFVMzGCYn7txuoCGyIegY-meJ0vFydPondX8uQ&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=2)
### [Sign up to canvass](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=MUCxv5WoNRHVjCxPhSD-myrVELx1sslKlO7q0ZPo_DaU-dcJuFVMzGCYn7txuoCGytD5enQjOuOK2MZLFfYkgw&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=3)
* * *
### Here are other meaningful ways to show your support:
**_Who in your daily life can you inspire to join our movement?_** This is relational organizing, and it’s one of the most effective tools for change that we have. It can be as simple as a conversation or social media post, sharing about what moves you to be a Crystal Cavalier supporter. You could even set a goal and recruit your friends to sign up at [www.crystalcavaliercongress.com](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=ILPBpZcM8pWmsH5qzUhV6CIf-OIWeGyx5amwXb1NOCxk9a1JSYFLMB9VVFUPrHSq&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=4) \- _small actions make the difference!_ [**_Can you chip in $20 and help fund the_**](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuTtq6BLBRUD6SEaC3P1wXfEuY0SY4YHYuQH3bQV4pE4g&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=5) [**_campaign?_**](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuTtq6BLBRUD6SEaC3P1wXfEuY0SY4YHYuQH3bQV4pE4g&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=6) | [](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuTtq6BLBRUD6SEaC3P1wXfEuY0SY4YHYuQH3bQV4pE4g&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=7 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuTtq6BLBRUD6SEaC3P1wXfEuY0SY4YHYuQH3bQV4pE4g&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=7)
---
With hope and gratitude,
Kasey
### [www.crystalcavaliercongress.com](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=ILPBpZcM8pWmsH5qzUhV6CIf-OIWeGyx5amwXb1NOCxk9a1JSYFLMB9VVFUPrHSq&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=8)
Crystal Cavalier for Congress · NC 27302, United States

You can also keep up with Crystal Cavalier for Congress on [Twitter](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEZ0RtC2N6at8PVhDRFU_Wc&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=10) or [Facebook](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6hKi9T2gEgzqocTncjoK-7Cbpo1uCcNsZXcxWLiy_Wo1&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=volpush&n=11).

subject: Woke Mob declares WAR on Parents

body:
The Parental Rights in Education Bill does exactly that–PROTECT PARENTS’ RIGHTS–
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfqsd3pmfjf5tg6mqem6pllqidq2hg6p4ornhun8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob6cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65splmkp6cdlj6piras30s9i68p5k69ib8cbmc5p3ctbhm5hjapdieeqncp1jcdrjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup32pjhesqj6pti6dj32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
|
---
| | Friend, **The Parental Rights in Education Bill does exactly that–PROTECT PARENTS’ RIGHTS–but that hasn’t stopped the Woke Mob and Fake News Media from completely spinning it into something it’s not. **
---
| [PROTECT PARENTAL RIGHTS](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zae54g5jeg6pkur7mrbsk4kkc9vpbcaddc8i0bj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob6cdh2bs "PROTECT PARENTAL RIGHTS")
---
| [DONATE TO THE PARENTAL RIGHTS RE-ELECTION FUND](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlbe9vs2fhiab12svnddvangmlvkk5s0kjbih1q0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob6cdh2bs "DONATE TO THE PARENTAL RIGHTS RE-ELECTION FUND")
---
| You probably know this legislation as the “Don’t Say Gay Bill” but did you know that _the word “gay” isn’t in the bill language at all?_**__ This is simply legislation to protect parental rights and keep curriculum on sexual topics from being taught to children in grades K-3.**
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsjisrgovu6f7photrnpfefj55lkqnb714t2sqj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob6cdh2bs)
---
| **There’s only two types of people in this world that would be against this legislation: people who believe we should expose kindergartners to sexualized curriculum and a political party that has gone so far left they are grasping at straws to come up with anything they can to save themselves from a total 2022 wipeout. ** It’s clear we need to support strong conservatives that will protect our children and defend parents’ rights. **We MUST continue fighting to protect our children and protect our rights as parents.**[_**A donation today to the Parental Rights Re-Election Fund will go directly towards fighting the Woke Mob and protecting parental rights****. **_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4ut6km0mvd1t06td7e0o4esn5kc1u5jglr2o0mg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4stge6ob6cdh2bs) **Every dollar counts in our fight to protect our children.**
---

---

---
| Thank you for your support,
_Americans for Parental Rights_

Hello,
I am emailing you today to ask you to give $5 to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
Here’s why: I am running in one of the most important Senate races in the country. Control of the Senate is at stake here in Iowa. **But with just days until our most important mid-month deadline yet, we’re still falling short of our $250,000 goal and what we need to win.**
My Senate race will be one of the closest in the country this November. It will also be one of the most expensive. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs; instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors like you to fund my campaign.
We have to hit this goal if I’m going to be able to run a fully-funded campaign and take on all of Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC millions. I can’t afford to fall short now. **There’s still time to raise the shortfall, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**Please, will you give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before our mid-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44057809/339903949/-42398318?refcode=em20220412mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTI0ZDBlZS04YmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=50o4nuA6rrErVXqqtcE3jp5U0IOWpDJcVpn5rGxhIyw=)

clean_body: Hello, I am emailing you today to ask you to give $5 to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. Here’s why: I am running in one of the most important Senate races in the country. Control of the Senate is at stake here in Iowa. But with just days until our most important mid-month deadline yet, we’re still falling short of our $250,000 goal and what we need to win. My Senate race will be one of the closest in the country this November. It will also be one of the most expensive. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs; instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors like you to fund my campaign. We have to hit this goal if I’m going to be able to run a fully-funded campaign and take on all of Chuck Grassley and Mitch McConnell’s Super PAC millions. I can’t afford to fall short now. There’s still time to raise the shortfall, but I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = These goals and deadlines are very important and very real. Whether or not we can win this race, confront the climate crisis, and pass bold progressive legislation all depends on what grassroots donors like you do now. Thank you for being part of this campaign, Mike Franken, Vice Admiral, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Jerry Dickinson
subject: I lost.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Dickinson for Congress Committee
body:
|
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/B_X8Mhx8cCX2-61HGQunCA~~/AAPPAAA~)
---
I lost.

I lost to the incumbent Rep. Mike Doyle in 2020. But this year – _this campaign_ – has completely transformed since then.

In 2021, my campaign received an overwhelming amount of grassroots support and Rep. Doyle decided to retire rather than run again.

[**Now I have an unprecedented opportunity to win this race and be the leader that PA-12 deserves. But I can’t afford to miss a single goal, so I’m asking: Can you chip in $27 before my critical midnight deadline? >>**](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/B_X8Mhx8cCX2-61HGQunCA~~/AAPPAAA~)

| | [Chip in $27 immediately >>](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/B_X8Mhx8cCX2-61HGQunCA~~/AAPPAAA~)
---

I won’t lie. Losing that race and my opportunity to represent the Pittsburgh region was really hard.

But here I am now, running again. And this time, things are different.

**_Why?_**
* Because I’m currently the projected front-runner in this race.
* Because we’ve grown this campaign from an idea to an unstoppable movement.
* Because while other candidates chase wealthy donors and Super PAC endorsements, I’ve raised hundreds of thousands of grassroots dollars from everyday folks like you.

I decided to run again because I know the hardworking people across PA-12 who supported me in 2020 haven't given up.

So I won’t give up either.

**But I do need your help.** Can you spare me a few dollars to help me win? If you donate with this link, I’ll be personally notified of your donation >> [**jerrydickinson.com/donate**](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/B_X8Mhx8cCX2-61HGQunCA~~/AAPPAAA~)

| [Chip in $15 immediately >>](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/1v_iCV3ub3da9Ox-JM92Cg~~/AAPPAAA~)
---
| [Chip in $22 immediately >>](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/JHZbbxv4_jT_cFnpCWvqqw~~/AAPPAAA~)
---
| [Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/qsGlnfIwJDeJyZOYIDjtVQ~~/AAPPAAA~)
---
| [Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/wRRgZ80CFc0fj2-P9OicvA~~/AAPPAAA~~~)
---
| [Chip in $250 immediately >>](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/wRyBhzGwIgjw_7SeJvJnDA~~/AAPPAAA~~~)
---
| [Or donate another amount >>](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/xuPq1GfIuE_L4-bRUy1PDw~~/AAPPAAA~~~)
---

In 2020, the status quo won. In 2022, donations from everyday people like you and me are going to win.

We’re going to win this race on Election Day in 35 days. Together.

Grateful for your support,

Jerry Dickinson
| [ ](http://clicksp.jerrydickinson.com/f/a/B_X8Mhx8cCX2-61HGQunCA~~/AAPPAAA~)

name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Peter,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW TO BECOME AN OFFICIAL FOUNDING SUPPORTER.>>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6b693861d5164e5c9ed116e813a4924a&_e=WvkoH9nRWZzUmqe-mcbuAHTGIg7_p9vkiZLmJ_Iq37IfILgbVgr4b7L36EXDniJi5Q4sCOaxFicJyiDMT7pVut-WWjuMXbXDbF0kHmKX12aPxBeWnMFovvge7mx3JJJTM-f-FcKKoyAmVuarkDGmjm6h4Z6895MIfJNIiuWYAq6o2jOGvO8dYuRFnZRMOoTJrTfFqRq8jNhoC1q7Fnm6gqNj9L2PwqLGUPjoKz_GNocuJKjd4Wue7Ty-Oti0EnawvvrfJwAhnBBWdI24p4ISCeHOTkvfe6WcPN51PGcDTs9wd6BL8fleGCACRS7apXe7s0wxLXMcDmuyjR8JZXcxugagkOYpgYSvyMAnMJLHr9p8Q_sR6uCR__Xn9WczqewuL4gyR-anKpKDaRfz-xWLzptebM1GF-lhssli0mEdlKBb_22ftn9kIScV-sRwzWabQQvRGj0b9JmwM_KuphznFGhiHlNXnQ3kiUX7jkknLKH2JmQ33n21GXmfJ1CnLK3UqY9EEe_3CRHcApATgUlftXUUqkWz0NIBdl3VlNU25_8VYvkJhlrwKTFquArAFgX_vc65mbcFSpYWPmstAWPlHl_nFQvMKstQJLLfZKEx4g8%3D)**

This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win.

_**[Please contribute $35 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to join the fight and mark your status as an Official Founding Supporter.>>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6b693861d5164e5c9ed116e813a4924a&_e=WvkoH9nRWZzUmqe-mcbuAHTGIg7_p9vkiZLmJ_Iq37IfILgbVgr4b7L36EXDniJi5Q4sCOaxFicJyiDMT7pVut-WWjuMXbXDbF0kHmKX12aPxBeWnMFovvge7mx3JJJTM-f-FcKKoyAmVuarkDGmjm6h4Z6895MIfJNIiuWYAq6o2jOGvO8dYuRFnZRMOoTJrTfFqRq8jNhoC1q7Fnm6gqNj9L2PwqLGUPjoKz_GNocuJKjd4Wue7Ty-Oti0EnawvvrfJwAhnBBWdI24p4ISCeHOTkvfe6WcPN51PGcDTs9wd6BL8fleGCACRS7apXe7s0wxLXMcDmuyjR8JZXcxugagkOYpgYSvyMAnMJLHr9p8Q_sR6uCR__Xn9WczqewuL4gyR-anKpKDaRfz-xWLzvcMQTv6JKsuMI98OHleGuztxJ44pLja-3m-Kn2lI8iSlhzdm0X9AGNVmunKJNyNtefQC9iXmaqmnpC6zWyHmYR7PfU99HhTi7rxF8ys1IzDmLzE_jr2EiU33GtOdJzE5_v7OaioT5ztVpHv4qJzwxwM7j2nDmyQmrFbEYB-MIm7jr-oJxRm71MErULiHkulLzOo3SQwAgvY-PaDKtII17U%3D)**_

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=6b693861d5164e5c9ed116e813a4924a&_e=WvkoH9nRWZzUmqe-mcbuAHTGIg7_p9vkiZLmJ_Iq37IfILgbVgr4b7L36EXDniJi5Q4sCOaxFicJyiDMT7pVut-WWjuMXbXDbF0kHmKX12aPxBeWnMFovvge7mx3JJJTM-f-FcKKoyAmVuarkDGmjm6h4Z6895MIfJNIiuWYAq6o2jOGvO8dYuRFnZRMOoTJrTfFqRq8jNhoC1q7Fnm6gqNj9L2PwqLGUPjoKz_GNocuJKjd4Wue7Ty-Oti0EnawvvrfJwAhnBBWdI24p4ISCeHOTkvfe6WcPN51PGcDTs9wd6BL8fleGCACRS7apXe7s0wxLXMcDmuyjR8JZXcxugagkOYpgYSvyMAnMJLHr9p8Q_sR6uCR__Xn9WczqewuL4gyR-anKpKDaRfz-xWLziUVAd4CpTYVKP78QIKjaBlNOtk_KTcw6BQdNEUdDWRhWsSo5t_SvKXZHppea_zq1bSedXVJqzqjd9_01VGx9SxQUDNDcNf8g4fgiznakViwAjxSmiKYn4kJPWSgs2tiWbast6IH3dLmH738DdEw6v6rV5UKXVPvgAhM2Av-tbH2w-hh02IOV3EXytp7xA5lsGgCNZ1mzaWPoPVfOWpsQS4%3D)

At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda.

This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder.

I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country.

clean_body: America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. Peter, Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C. America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing. I can’t do this without your support. That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an Official Founding Supporter. This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win. At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda. This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder. I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country. I just have one simple question for you: WILL YOU JOIN ME? Thank you & God Bless America. Sarah Palin | Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. | P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Let’s raise brave patriots!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
Peter, As a father, I worry about what our children are going to be taught in schools.

I wanted to fight back against the Left-wing propaganda infiltrating our classrooms, so I wrote a **brand new children’s book** to teach the next generation patriotism, grit, and courage.

**[Our new book Dawn of the Brave is available NOW to order for your children exclusively on on bravebooks.com](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e8ecb49fbdfa4c27aab94a25d1c5f043&_e=wINA8M9Lo9D87LZioycIG8x_bd1sPS9t02REZ22Xm60qO75c7YQBekUb4I9rmQ7cbdLRIauWFz7L7mUuWKV1K6MX2gZe8g-zru6Zjcs4_M46TizTn4H0BmXbsSLV2y4JCGe5Aa_8yNNyXoKwCCd400QSIIvskLvZqxDLyO_Nh5p5n6Bgct197WzMN2F94dM4jduBvqrkqbeyIXxlBsjU6yMmadTAFqtxdRw7UXRI-UiqAphK-_5sCMLb6NAwzcSIOeNk3RPoHIvRa1N1J7ilhhAVGSSdzBFjiOIUoieQS8eB3R3V-k0g21yNGuY6sb8FSxV3V5gxLQNF5eywWvU7E8uT7A0lyIkfVgWmdSsJCbo8EJzv9jD7pNRE0eWiFMZ6eQOJ0-zb50poaGxNb3veYDWcB7Tol_3szzjocN3R_9Giu1QYgMzPxEW_ou5frkyU)[](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e8ecb49fbdfa4c27aab94a25d1c5f043&_e=Np6glo8S979drsbWuRvVKNjWubuQ2cM0-jWvLZG1w2p_GieewRHpUQDjI8aRwWiJPpuDCKopbRswhCnayfKXWt0Xjtu-o04jjD2PH9jjORqnUpXKYovKhesncKxT6Ap2UJrX2Bhoqvwkos3NCFv2MAv6IeqIjIOh_APfffCSHH_txGENcD4sjeouFHzFdoZlW2DKX_uNckNraNKOMkNMxXZiW_Xt-Y_5Kioz4ah4VOGg2YibdqsencnKAi1NMysVdsXmktxoRKEVPSv0lxWDUrO8v8ZD_tCsqP4mpzqA20gHl59wDctbDYCCbjfZE-8CTTXuo04AXHk_gWuGdoOmDjQLS5UHB8suZjvm_4r0Onk%3D). $15 of every subscription goes to Samaritans Purse which goes to help Ukrainians for the month of April only. ** [](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e8ecb49fbdfa4c27aab94a25d1c5f043&_e=wINA8M9Lo9D87LZioycIG8x_bd1sPS9t02REZ22Xm60qO75c7YQBekUb4I9rmQ7cbdLRIauWFz7L7mUuWKV1K6MX2gZe8g-zru6Zjcs4_M46TizTn4H0BmXbsSLV2y4JCGe5Aa_8yNNyXoKwCCd400QSIIvskLvZqxDLyO_Nh5p5n6Bgct197WzMN2F94dM4jduBvqrkqbeyIXxlBsjU6yMmadTAFqtxdRw7UXRI-UivV58vECuDW-Y_CodOT9me9dmtb8Ze38H64eh_GpN4PCb13gSjmb7KjwVO2O91MjWyzj2rT5TuYo5iO3sQdY8gp28VVG7t4oQ5o4c-b51xwLgpW_KnB7XjNng1DU8T3WU3T5U_q-qNdNXNECk6zLLRb9aAQsriVproFCKR-4xWQcLImyDNDEiXdo9BPT1QDpl6DPNfxVtIvE0hZ9SxVnvr) [**ORDER YOUR BOOK >>>**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=e8ecb49fbdfa4c27aab94a25d1c5f043&_e=wINA8M9Lo9D87LZioycIG8x_bd1sPS9t02REZ22Xm60qO75c7YQBekUb4I9rmQ7cbdLRIauWFz7L7mUuWKV1K6MX2gZe8g-zru6Zjcs4_M46TizTn4H0BmXbsSLV2y4JCGe5Aa_8yNNyXoKwCCd400QSIIvskLvZqxDLyO_Nh5p5n6Bgct197WzMN2F94dM4jduBvqrkqbeyIXxlBsjU6yMmadTAFqtxdRw7UXRI-UjO6vYcrvpWQJaxBjOObsGn9ZUG9G4T70oxBcQKjVK3kfe4PKMuz63Ds9Tmp1rjitNsCTgvnfnfjybBGjYaE4Cs-E0SBv0VM1yaGjsEbj5GG5rZ0E-h3fW9Dp-No3Qc9KnuuxRsRbo0e5dskoHQpqolQgfT2zEx_rAtg4wr4Lxvi0G4TLoceyTJ4g4CSm1-lRZ-GTswAGaxkSCpuuA6rrJN) For too long, classrooms have failed to teach our children about bravery, love of country, and service to our communities.

It’s time we change that and show the next generation what’s _really_ important.

I wrote Dawn of the Brave to inspire our kids to grow up to be the leaders that will make America great for years to come, and I hope you’ll join me in our mission to save the next generation.

clean_body: Peter, As a father, I worry about what our children are going to be taught in schools. I wanted to fight back against the Left-wing propaganda infiltrating our classrooms, so I wrote a brand new children’s book to teach the next generation patriotism, grit, and courage. . $15 of every subscription goes to Samaritans Purse which goes to help Ukrainians for the month of April only. For too long, classrooms have failed to teach our children about bravery, love of country, and service to our communities. It’s time we change that and show the next generation what’s really important. I wrote Dawn of the Brave to inspire our kids to grow up to be the leaders that will make America great for years to come, and I hope you’ll join me in our mission to save the next generation. In Service, Col. Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (FL-6) Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jay=20Block?=
subject: ICYMI: My job interview to serve as Governor!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Block for NM](http:// "Paid for by Block for NM")
body:
Ready to work for every New Mexican | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mcshanellc/mask-mandates-7075449?e=102b599530)
---
| | [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=26942143be&e=102b599530)
---
| | Peter,
---
| It was an honor to participate in the New Mexico Business Coalition’s _Job Interview Forum_ recently to explain how I will serve as a Governor**of** \- **by** \- and **for the people!**

I was asked what I will do to address how our state ranks **last** nationally in too many categories. **How will I make fellow residents proud to call themselves New Mexicans?**

_First, we’ll acknowledge the situation together_. **It _is_ a catastrophe that the FBI has rated New Mexico as the most dangerous in our nation, our home is rated as the worst state to live in, and we rank last in education.**

_I shared that I’ll start my first hour as Governor by banning vaccine passports and mandates._ I will **never** shut down your schools, hospitals, businesses, or churches. I will ban critical race theory in New Mexico. I re-emphasized my plan to return **all monies** that Governor Grisham took from businesses, churches, and individuals for violating her COVID mandates - _which she herself violated numerous times. _

I will ensure that boys compete with boys, and girls will compete with girls in school sports.

I will send the National Guard to our southern border. I will create a New Mexico Border Security agency to hinder sex, drug, and human trafficking coming through our state.

I shared this vision and more during the _Job Interview Forum_ and you can watch it [here](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=bf407bb04a&e=102b599530):
---
| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=3e4cbba9af&e=102b599530)
---
| **As your New Mexico First Governor,** I will work tirelessly with the honor of uniting all efforts to make our state a place we cherish calling home. We will exhibit extraordinary resilience together and pull ourselves from the last place ranks and garner national attention with our united spirit of tenacity.

Your support **in a donation of any amount today** will show the Radical Left that New Mexicans are placing their bets on a proven leader in the military, in the private sector, and in local government to win again as a state!
---
| [>>> DONATE NOW <<<](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=2af2127fbc&e=102b599530 ">>> DONATE NOW <<<")

Friend,
---
In 2021, Joe Biden and his “border czar” Kamala Harris were directly responsible for a 379% increase from the previous year in illegal migrant encounters.
---
And as I pointed out in my latest op-ed for _Fox News_ , those numbers have DOUBLED compared to 2021 over the same time frame.
---
Ever since Joe Biden took office, a record of roughly _3 million illegal immigrants_ have crossed into our country. As a Texan, I’ve watched this catastrophe unfold first hand.
---
**While the United States is literally being INVADED at the southern border, Joe Biden has announced he plans to TERMINATE Title 42 – _the last remaining tool Customs and Border Patrol (CBP) has to expel illegal immigrants._**
---
**That’s why I’m circulating this Official Petition to every patriot across the country to preserve Title 42.**
---
[**Please add your name to the petition to DEMAND that Title 42 – and what’s left of our nation’s sovereignty – remain intact.**](https://links.huntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=f86149bc5f14447382f79e6478851d9f&_e=-HA44zZAEd24TMU1neCxGYqC5reeOZzL3WFf5RmIcIEFJmgWQWcj7SBkbNC6tjFyJ3mPU9pAlREnu1iNUnhKAXlsAw9gy813etuj3yEnWLRGXL6bFxD3z8xh5pmHQlpWnC_SelekWtgqXsmU3EI4xfDvrgGAzwOONSltlmgyHwsRj5ysGtk-hSUnUAkgHje_geJahq19mCEr6qH3l8lGAtpMUl1STUxwEAM_vWlHXK-4j5e4upDqXNQmwQzFKx8QiIMrHvDedl56xERHOtmnQ0sYgCnf-MEL3I2CE3KOLlpnPmGBG4Vip0QqD2oC_rdiZQdhESz8VWaxEaMY6m-jkPfqLvcWTGmB1n5T4rzNImWd63G_Sja1dhjHEtRdGXg2dKNrmMmGLdvW5AyhU4LcIye-ZxqmgGtl3hWtVn7C9-Wf4Sv_XSnZ3mjidWM1MMHF5u7AeADckrIAcBDjXPFTVE5UBhiMKjScwX7wjhDI2WEJGUTxNxRPHScJhmA8NZinuvem9rXV5NkOxK0uwDeFnw%3D%3D)

Title 42 authorizes the CBP to deport illegal immigrants migrating from a region where public health efforts continue to struggle.
---
**But Biden’s decision will FORCE CBP agents to accept every single immigrant who crosses our border, regardless of their health status.**
---
This isn’t just bad policy Friend, it’s negligent of national security!
---
Title 42 MUST be preserved.
---
**[ADD YOUR NAME ✏️](https://links.huntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=f86149bc5f14447382f79e6478851d9f&_e=-HA44zZAEd24TMU1neCxGYqC5reeOZzL3WFf5RmIcIEFJmgWQWcj7SBkbNC6tjFyJ3mPU9pAlREnu1iNUnhKAXlsAw9gy813etuj3yEnWLRGXL6bFxD3z8xh5pmHQlpWnC_SelekWtgqXsmU3EI4xfDvrgGAzwOONSltlmgyHwsRj5ysGtk-hSUnUAkgHje_geJahq19mCEr6qH3l8lGAtpMUl1STUxwEAM_vWlHXK-4j5e4upDqXNQmwQzFKx8QiIMrHvDedl56xERHOtmnQ0sYgCnf-MEL3I2CE3KOLlrdp5Wm8liAnMN7x-d8CN76b8_eKY6tE_0GEeDggbQ1b-EFD3Iq74K3sTRoU-ZFPQDqz3eG-f_Atjf_2gRK244Lj3JuefvLOk0x-BLcfx6xwgvfllWEYoXwZZxwGyCHoeuDh5C7eWnp10CJiJxclOqvurmnndzWfsJGAQj5togtGNLSs1BQDFIy7wKjOaGrvIgyjwq5lC36WyN4mR7BlTlJFPRW1ZH7IU23EEcuXDPhzA%3D%3D)**
---
It comes as no surprise that the hypocritical Left doesn’t even pretend to be consistent in their pursuit of “science and fact.”
---
And the idea that Biden would terminate Title 42 only proves as much.
---
_The same Joe Biden who isn’t concerned in the slightest about illegals with COVID entering the country also forced the firing of tens of thousands of first responders and health care workers for making a personal health decision and refusing the vaccine._
---
**Make no mistake, the Democrats' insistence for open borders is based solely on one underlying principle:_an open border increases their electorate and political power_.**
---
But this is the cost...
---
**Biden is sending a message across Central and South America that our southern border is wide open and ready for a flood of migrants. And the cartels, smugglers, and caravans have heard Biden’s message loud and clear!**
---
It’s no exaggeration to say that the very fabric of the United States is in jeopardy, and yet, Joe Biden is just one more mindless policy away from eliminating our sovereignty altogether.
---
[**So please, add your name to the petition to DEMAND that Title 42 – and what’s left of our nation’s sovereignty – remain intact.**](https://links.huntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=f86149bc5f14447382f79e6478851d9f&_e=-HA44zZAEd24TMU1neCxGYqC5reeOZzL3WFf5RmIcIEFJmgWQWcj7SBkbNC6tjFyJ3mPU9pAlREnu1iNUnhKAXlsAw9gy813etuj3yEnWLRGXL6bFxD3z8xh5pmHQlpWnC_SelekWtgqXsmU3EI4xfDvrgGAzwOONSltlmgyHwsRj5ysGtk-hSUnUAkgHje_geJahq19mCEr6qH3l8lGAtpMUl1STUxwEAM_vWlHXK-4j5e4upDqXNQmwQzFKx8QiIMrHvDedl56xERHOtmnQ0sYgCnf-MEL3I2CE3KOLlpS08BKOOhOZqIUg5damiKgU-1hD4GEAY7BEZAOCVhRnHRm6_untOIGRuwSrDV80RVUrwR_jDg-rjJKOdLJxJ-uPNTyp0dWJMmxShoXC68tfQRpd5_34B-aYPgE1hGwiwpNuenoLbCcmk1bYlY8Aa302WYXA23WhSc1cDjkBm7sBwi6697rd9wTaHQkthum6FKtDjKzK5fm3UkCz7ho5rRCGSteUDd-aic4ypcmTyVccQ%3D%3D)

That’s why I’m circulating this Official Petition to every patriot across the country to preserve Title 42. Title 42 authorizes the CBP to deport illegal immigrants migrating from a region where public health efforts continue to struggle. But Biden’s decision will FORCE CBP agents to accept every single immigrant who crosses our border, regardless of their health status. This isn’t just bad policy Friend, it’s negligent of national security! Title 42 MUST be preserved. It comes as no surprise that the hypocritical Left doesn’t even pretend to be consistent in their pursuit of “science and fact.” And the idea that Biden would terminate Title 42 only proves as much. The same Joe Biden who isn’t concerned in the slightest about illegals with COVID entering the country also forced the firing of tens of thousands of first responders and health care workers for making a personal health decision and refusing the vaccine. Make no mistake, the Democrats' insistence for open borders is based solely on one underlying principle:an open border increases their electorate and political power. But this is the cost... Biden is sending a message across Central and South America that our southern border is wide open and ready for a flood of migrants. And the cartels, smugglers, and caravans have heard Biden’s message loud and clear! It’s no exaggeration to say that the very fabric of the United States is in jeopardy, and yet, Joe Biden is just one more mindless policy away from eliminating our sovereignty altogether. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

**From:** **Vice President Kamala Harris**
**Subject:** My tie-breaking vote in the Senate
**Date:** Mon, Mar 28, 2022 at 4:11 PM
---
---
With just three days until the first end-of-quarter deadline of 2022, I hope you’ll give me a moment to explain what’s at stake in this year’s midterms, **and then make a $7 donation to the DNC to help reach their goal by Thursday.**
---
With a 50-50 split in the Senate, I can cast a deciding vote. **But if we lose just _one seat_ , I can’t break the tie, and the Biden-Harris agenda will be at risk.** That’s why we need to protect Democrats in tough races, and fight to elect more Democrats, too. The DNC is at the forefront of this work, and that’s why I’m coming to you today.
---
**If you can, Friend, chip in $7 to the DNC ahead of Thursday’s end-of-quarter deadline. Democrats nationwide will be counting on a strong DNC to maintain and expand our congressional majorities this fall.**
---
---
I won’t sugarcoat it, Friend: Our majorities are incredibly slim, and only a handful of races will determine which party sets the agenda for the next two years. That’s why it’s so important that we support the DNC in building the party infrastructure it’ll take to expand our majorities.
---
**If you’re able, please join me in supporting the DNC with a $7 donation today. Your support is incredibly important.**
---
Thank you for all you do for Democrats and for this country.
---
Kamala
---
Kamala Harris
Vice President of the United States
---
---

name: Dick Durbin
subject: what’s at stake in November:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
This is how we’ll win on Election Day.
#
Peter,
This November, we decide the direction of our country at the ballot box.
And if we want to keep making progress, we have to win right here in Illinois.
My dear friend Senator Tammy Duckworth is up for reelection.
So is our Democratic Governor J.B. Pritzker.
Across the state, brilliant Democratic candidates are running to fight for working families as mayors, city councilors, and in our General Assembly.
On Election Day, we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Supporting the Democratic Party of Illinois is the key to making it happen.
**[Join us. Your support is going to make a difference this November, Peter. Can I count on you to contribute $5, or whatever you can afford, to the Democratic Party of Illinois to help keep Illinois blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44047758/339864396/-1246068396?refcode=dd_em_220412_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzEwM2M1ZS03MWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=49NhckKLElhI0Z4KjOM3oGqmwyllYWeTZoYtgzcm9sU=)**
Each and every day, Democrats are fighting to deliver the types of results that people are counting on. Lower health care costs, climate action, immigration reform, and other vital legislation. But Republicans are working non-stop to bring our progress to a grinding halt.
The key to defeating the GOP and delivering for working families everywhere is ensuring that the Democratic Party of Illinois has the resources to lead the charge. This is how we’ll win on Election Day.
**[A contribution of $5 will go a long way toward reaching voters across the state, supporting our party, and electing Illinois Democrats up and down the ballot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44047759/339864397/-1246068396?refcode=dd_em_220412_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzEwM2M1ZS03MWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=49NhckKLElhI0Z4KjOM3oGqmwyllYWeTZoYtgzcm9sU=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44047760/339864398/-1246068396?refcode=dd_em_220412_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzEwM2M1ZS03MWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=49NhckKLElhI0Z4KjOM3oGqmwyllYWeTZoYtgzcm9sU=)****
