We are so proud to have Sunrise Movement join Team Kina | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk7vuVS2If4GdDXJSMNe376KNOano1AZnLaUDbo81r0RsDLZH2xk5fpkIuGW_1aFlP_SosqmkvVYKD3ZWdrXkzgPawZqPH-zC_15sRx9v1ECpQNoQojKQiGAtdG_Wy9xCryB5YUgBJzsQB7BwXa9jPC91tRZ3QN_5CAaSgcevgpSxlG9FmPBiUq3BWNmW-xQmVKhoVmIbBd7MARBAGs4aEJoqH6zlPO7l-oXnJmzy0C59Q/3l5/oPffjl5TQ8-HmwdSMqXNLQ/h0/Lg6tg3z_aFld6RAff_Oup1T1BpRe3BKbMEuCBZ9nsVw) Dear Team, I am an organizer. I know change comes from the power of people coming together and demanding a better life for their communities. It is how I’ve lived my life, and it is the reason I am incredibly excited to share that, today, the organizing powerhouse that is Sunrise Movement, is announcing their endorsement of our campaign. **The decision by the Sunrise Movement to choose our race as one of just a handful across the entire United States is just further proof of what we’ve known all along. Our election in IL-7 is one of the most important, and most winnable elections in the country.** We need a Green New Deal, and we need a candidate who will fight to address environmental racism, create good jobs, and address the inequities that persist in our communities. **[It's going to take an additional $9,345 to pay for of the explosion of phone banking Sunrise is going to help us implement. clean_body: We are so proud to have Sunrise Movement join Team Kina | | | Dear Team, I am an organizer. I know change comes from the power of people coming together and demanding a better life for their communities. It is how I’ve lived my life, and it is the reason I am incredibly excited to share that, today, the organizing powerhouse that is Sunrise Movement, is announcing their endorsement of our campaign. The decision by the Sunrise Movement to choose our race as one of just a handful across the entire United States is just further proof of what we’ve known all along. Our election in IL-7 is one of the most important, and most winnable elections in the country. We need a Green New Deal, and we need a candidate who will fight to address environmental racism, create good jobs, and address the inequities that persist in our communities. Sunrise knows how to organize, turn out voters, and win. Sunrise Movement previously helped climate champions such as Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Ed Markey win in heated primaries. And already in this cycle, Sunrise helped power Greg Casar to a win with nearly 60% of the vote in a crowded primary in TX-35 and helped progressive challenger Jessica Cisneros force a runoff against a longtime, well-funded incumbent in TX-28. Our campaign has been proudly organizing alongside Sunrise Chicago for months now, and their dedicated volunteers have helped us successfully knock thousands of doors in the district. With the power of the entire Sunrise Movement on our side, our people-powered movement will be unstoppable. Thank you, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

| Peter,

Hi there, it's Savannah and Joe from Abigail's field team. We're campaigning hard across VA-07 to bring new voters up to speed on all Abigail is spearheading in Congress.

With Republican momentum on the rise here in Virginia, it's essential we connect with as many prospective voters as we can. Abigail is facing **NINE** **opponents** and National Republicans see our district as an opportunity to pick up a seat.

However, we see things differently.

We're energized every day by the enthusiasm voters show for Abigail's work. There's real support for this campaign and we're doing everything we can to stand up to Republican attacks.

Your support ensures we can continue campaigning robustly, and your contributions fuel our outreach efforts. body:

# **Friend — Our hard work is paying off and Gary’s grassroots momentum is building across Georgia! Just take a look at some recent updates. **

---
Gary has won multiple straw polls across Georgia — including one in which he received 51% of the vote after last Saturday’s debate! Meanwhile, Herschel Walker’s numbers are falling. Herschel is **down 24 points with primary voters since January.** The reason? **The more Georgia conservatives hear from and learn about Herschel Walker, the fewer supporters he has. ** Gary Black is the Republican who will defeat Raphael Warnock, and he’s the Republican with the trusted experience to do the job and defend our conservative values. **With early voting less than a month away, sharing Gary’s message across Georgia is more important than ever before. Winning takes resources — will you help? ** [**Chip in NOW to help Gary continue building momentum!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/93181d1eb98b8aa1/60ad0cf43138bc0ec3d6b838967d376c/37793)

We must nominate a Republican who can win in November. Gary Black is that candidate. And we hope you’ll stand with him now. -Team Gary

---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/93181d1eb98b8aa1/a67f2eb74b308cd3c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. clean_body: | | | Friend — Our hard work is paying off and Gary’s grassroots momentum is building across Georgia! Just take a look at some recent updates. Gary has won multiple straw polls across Georgia — including one in which he received 51% of the vote after last Saturday’s debate! Meanwhile, Herschel Walker’s numbers are falling. Herschel is down 24 points with primary voters since January. The reason? The more Georgia conservatives hear from and learn about Herschel Walker, the fewer supporters he has. Gary Black is the Republican who will defeat Raphael Warnock, and he’s the Republican with the trusted experience to do the job and defend our conservative values. With early voting less than a month away, sharing Gary’s message across Georgia is more important than ever before. Winning takes resources — will you help? We must nominate a Republican who can win in November. Gary Black is that candidate. And we hope you’ll stand with him now. -Team Gary | | Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary: I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why. Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts. With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, .

subject: in the dead of night

**Peter – **yesterday, in the dead of night, a judge sided with the GOP establishment's desperate and meritless attempt to remove me from the ballot. This is nothing but a gift to Washington Republicans and a mockery of our democracy, which is why we are fighting back: **Tomorrow, my campaign and the state of Iowa will go before the Iowa Supreme Court to appeal the decision.**
I want to make one thing crystal clear here and now: **I promise you that no matter what the GOP throws at our campaign, I will never, ever stop fighting for Iowan families.** I refuse to give Chuck Grassley a free pass at the ballot box – and I refuse to let national Republicans' anti-democratic attacks say who is and isn't on the ballot.
**So right now, I've _never_ needed your grassroots support more.** [**Please can you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare to help me fight these GOP attacks and defeat Sen. This decision is blatantly partisan and undermines the bipartisan panel that already ruled in FAVOR of our campaign's right to be on the ballot. The entire lawsuit against us is bogus – more than 5,000 Iowans said they wanted a chance to vote for our campaign!
**Make no mistake: The GOP establishment is launching an all-out assault on our democracy – and it's no secret why.**
You see, the GOP is absolutely terrified of our campaign. They've seen the polling numbers showing that Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. They've seen the data that showed only 27% of likely voters want to reelect him to an eighth term. **But more than anything else, they've seen the unprecedented grassroots enthusiasm on the ground for our campaign.**
The GOP knows that Sen. Grassley is vulnerable and that if we win here, Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority. **We can defeat the GOP's bogus lawsuit, and we can defeat Sen. Grassley at the polls, but only if people like you stand with us ahead of our crucial hearing at the Iowa Supreme Court tomorrow.**
**[That's why I have to ask: Can you rush $5 right here and now to help me fight these GOP attacks? Every single dollar will help us secure our place on the ballot and flip this seat blue on Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44059451/339911966/888067044?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk919-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGJkZmVkYS05NGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ggmXXu0iJRy5T6wa1VCin8YrYHSnd5BaaxlqqbrxNY=)**

– Abby

name: Yvette Nicole Brown
subject: I’m for Nan Whaley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
Nan is the leader Ohio needs

Team,
**I’m Yvette Nicole Brown.** Some of you may know me from my roles on popular TV shows, including “Community” or the Emmy-nominated “Black Lady Sketch Show.”
**[I’m reaching out today because I am so proud to support Nan Whaley’s campaign for governor of my home state of Ohio. Are you with me? Contribute $5 or more now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44059536/339912194/681519466?refcode=nw_em_220412_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJmYTk4ZC05NWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YLVRYfHUwsQPZ-VludQbK3sCNX8jXqkfaqbJmdjAEMA=)**
Before I chased my dreams to Hollywood, I grew up in East Cleveland. Ohio raised me, and that’s why I want to make sure every young person from Akron to Cincinnati has the access to opportunities like I did, no matter their skin color or zip code.
But the corrupt politicians running the show in our Statehouse are robbing the next generation’s future in order to line their pockets and keep their lobbyist friends happy.
**We can change that. Nan Whaley and her running mate Cheryl Stephens represent an extraordinary new future for Ohio where middle- and working-class folks can succeed, not just the wealthy and well-connected.**
And I have to say, I’m pretty excited about that glass ceiling they are knocking up against, potentially becoming Ohio’s first ever women elected governor and lieutenant governor.
**[I’m writing to you as an Ohioan who cares deeply about the direction our state takes at this critical moment. I’m ready to elect Nan Whaley. Donate $5 or whatever you can now if you’re with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44059537/339912195/681519466?refcode=nw_em_220412_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJmYTk4ZC05NWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YLVRYfHUwsQPZ-VludQbK3sCNX8jXqkfaqbJmdjAEMA=)**
Thank you,

Some of you may know me from my roles on popular TV shows, including “Community” or the Emmy-nominated “Black Lady Sketch Show.” = Before I chased my dreams to Hollywood, I grew up in East Cleveland. Ohio raised me, and that’s why I want to make sure every young person from Akron to Cincinnati has the access to opportunities like I did, no matter their skin color or zip code. But the corrupt politicians running the show in our Statehouse are robbing the next generation’s future in order to line their pockets and keep their lobbyist friends happy. We can change that. Nan Whaley and her running mate Cheryl Stephens represent an extraordinary new future for Ohio where middle- and working-class folks can succeed, not just the wealthy and well-connected. And I have to say, I’m pretty excited about that glass ceiling they are knocking up against, potentially becoming Ohio’s first ever women elected governor and lieutenant governor. = Thank you, Yvette Nicole Brown = **= Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley PO Box 2815, Dayton, OH 45401 This campaign is powered by supporters like you, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, .

The Congressional Leadership Fund, a super PAC backed by House Leader Kevin McCarthy and all of the House GOP leadership and dedicated to securing a Republican majority in Congress, announced their endorsement from their Trailblazers Fund for Tanya for AZ-04. “I am so honored to be endorsed by the Congressional Leadership Fund,” **said Wheeless.** “We need to take back the Majority this year to save our country. To do that we are going to need all the support we can get. I am proud to have the Congressional Leadership Fund on my team as we prepare to take on Greg Stanton and the liberal left."
[**Join the Congressional Leadership Fund in Supporting Tanya by Liking and Sharing Their Endorsement.**](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=072945f70b&e=bd2b55b0e3)

name: Steve Andersen
subject: Tax Time Is a Good Time to Evaluate Your Charitable Giving Goals
body:
As income tax time approaches, now is a good time to evaluate your charitable giving options and plan your 2022 charitable giving goals. As Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization, you might consider taking advantage of several special ways of giving, including:

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

As income tax time approaches, now is a good time to evaluate your charitable giving options and plan your 2022 charitable giving goals. As Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization, you might consider taking advantage of several special ways of giving, including:
**1) Making Your Best Charitable Donation Now to Judicial Watch**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58563&L=27098&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLzEzNjgwMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycw==)
---

**2) Becoming a Monthly Amicus Donor to Help Fight Corruption Every Month**

Set up an automatically recurring credit card donation to Judicial Watch by calling JW Member Services at (888) 593-8442 or going to our secure online donation page at [www.JudicialWatch.org](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58563&L=27098&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLzEzNjgwMC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycw==) and checking the "Make this a monthly donation!" box after selecting an amount to donate.

**3) Making a Qualified Charitable Distribution (QCD) Directly from Your IRA**

If you are 701⁄2 or older, tax law allows you to donate up to $100,000 each year tax-free from your IRA to Judicial Watch without that distribution being subject to federal income tax withholding. These "Qualified Charitable Distribution" (QCD) contributions count toward your Required Minimum Distribution (RMD) but aren't included in your adjusted gross income. Even though the minimum age for RMDs is now 72, it is still 701⁄2 for QCDs. This may be an excellent strategy for donors who can no longer itemize charitable donations on their income taxes.

**4) Donating Appreciated Stocks or Mutual Funds**

By donating appreciated securities that you have owned for more than one year, you can deduct the full value of those shares, while also avoiding paying capital gains taxes on those shares should you have sold them. Call us at (888) 593-8442 to get more information about how to donate stocks or mutual funds, and to see if your mutual funds can be accepted.

**5) Establishing a Charitable Gift Annuity**

If you are 55 or older, you could set up a Charitable Gift Annuity (CGA) with Judicial Watch that would generate a fixed income payment to you for life while helping Judicial Watch. A portion of your donation is tax-deductible. Call us at (888) 593-8442 to get a detailed personalized illustration showing how a CGA could work for you (minimum amount $5,000-not available in Washington State or Hawaii).

**6) Including Judicial Watch in Your Will or Other Estate Plans**

By including Judicial Watch in your estate plans, you will leave a legacy of freedom for your loved ones and future generations of Americans. Contact us for more information about how you can include Judicial Watch in your plans, including our brochure, "How to Make a Will that Works."

We are grateful to you for your support however you choose to donate to Judicial Watch. If you would like to find out more about any of these charitable ways of giving, please contact us by calling (888) 593-8442 or by replying to this email.

Sincerely,

Steven C. Andersen
Director of Development
Judicial Watch
425 Third Street SW, Suite 800
Washington, DC 20024
[www.judicialwatch.org](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58563&L=6&F=H&drurl=aHR0cDovL3d3dy5qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLm9yZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1NYXkmdXRtX3Rlcm09Tm9uLURvbm9ycw==)

_"Because no one is above the law."_

_" Those who expect to reap the blessings of freedom, must, like men, undergo the fatigue of supporting it."_
~Thomas Paine

This email is intended for informational purposes only and is not intended to provide tax, legal or accounting advice. You should consult with your tax, legal or accounting advisers should you have any questions as to how these special ways of giving could benefit you.
|
---
|
---
Judicial Watch, Inc.
425 Third Street SW, Suite 800
Washington, DC 20024
(C)2022, All Rights Reserved
Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.
| |
---
[Unsubscribe](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/unsubscribe.php?M=27089954&C=eea98a79fb2fad93cccd0bd228df4000&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=38&N=58563&AGENCY=jw)

subject: How Can We Work Towards Housing For All?
body:
Housing is a human right and our communities deserve secure, safe and affordable housing. The Neal Walia Campaign has an in-depth plan on how... | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Our country is currently facing a homelessness and home affordability crisis. It is at the center of our deteriorating social fabric and quality of life. We simply cannot continue to ignore this issue and avoid Federal responsibility. It is time that the government understands that housing is a human right.

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Washington Examiner: Biden's far-left approach to 'health'
body:
| |
---
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2b8268fbd85e4b06bd5ab06dce4d5381&_e=6NzJ_aOX-eDw3LCLOb7Z43ndWKWVApN1NhNjeBfiWvyn1Vbn-RRroalA4sg6wIynnNKCcgPPTmsJTf9pkBOi0qp74ZI0JMuQt4WBtDuZAhPEgLQnaPQGPHh7GjDx-oajQ0dkIEMvQyIQMlrC3duQWMqDhPZngEXtQL0tSWL8JmlG-3jJMBfMTd9G6n8toGScEFsGqmrkWjHbzZ5yLwDLO1NifPmDCfVurj9cmyf5vDhFK4U5yKbWQoB1ocKNAInfwrH2Dqhmb_lQY6SikrWVng%3D%3D)
**Biden's far-left approach to 'health'**
By Bobby Jindal & Abigail Slagle
People should not expect the Biden administration to solve problems with the healthcare system anytime soon.

In fact, the president’s 2023 budget exacerbates some healthcare challenges. Policies contained in Biden’s budget continue to cater to a far-left agenda and perpetuate leading from behind on COVID-19. The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention have mismanaged their response to recent COVID-19 variants and handed down confusing, inconsistent guidance on masking, quarantining, and testing. As a result, trust in the CDC has declined from 69% in April 2020 to 44% in January 2022. Instead of implementing increased oversight at the CDC, the Biden administration proposes to give $9.9 billion of discretionary funding to "build up capacity." This is a $2.8 billion increase over the 2021 enacted level and is proposed at a time when the agency is performing a sweeping review of its processes. A better approach would be to restore confidence and enhance pandemic preparedness through responsible use of public health dollars.

The Biden administration’s budget also ignores two of the country’s most pressing healthcare problems: the impending financial collapse of entitlement programs that seniors depend on and the overburdening of healthcare providers.

Medicare, which insures 18% of all Americans and nearly all over age 65, is in serious financial trouble. Medicare Part A, which covers hospital services, is projected to be insolvent by 2026. Additionally, Social Security is projected to be unable to cover full benefits by 2034. Biden’s budget does nothing to address this. Other members of his political party have notably proposed to lower the age to qualify for Medicare to 60, which would immediately add 23 million people to a program already on unsure financial footing. Rather than expanding Medicare, these programs should be shored up to ensure availability for seniors who depend on them.
_Finish Reading _** [HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=2b8268fbd85e4b06bd5ab06dce4d5381&_e=6NzJ_aOX-eDw3LCLOb7Z42oKGVG4g67hjUlNcmpW1eZdfdOezHwXYGnlgyl6lyGB1mMlLYvx116dGBkwoLnQpYVxh2MBZ4omHjpwMZ4Cqa0I99ACelRSeqD0ik0nqfLbD_3h8E9_XuJR07Nut5RSQ2J1aUPCm26nsS41e8DuFKANf62MX5lOV3amnoWB5mfEi-on2kLeS8I5_KOVMQQwDKSKowE17aYuwONYm0itpgtFquCAnZsU91F-_p9J-AKHQwpYd4g6GF-bKYim3vJAkpl66PhIqDqpI2jQWsLb5KcMKTPC41R1Hp3uMx80Bc-sCbvzIm3itgxUewHLZpIh_NuEfTdDcgGw3bCPUPJbbvrP-YlF8kuC3lkh-qjU7BsI)**.
Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by AmericaNext
5800 One Perkins Place Drive, Suite 8B, Baton Rouge, LA 70808

[Click here to unsubscribe.](http://links.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=2b8268fbd85e4b06bd5ab06dce4d5381&_t=Viywix6_D4Duqmm8TGGn4ngJOT4AkOk91GhDp_1YJccQ8fLM8rXnX5_cDr0pJPiPpoYLpd6f_7kKQSTqWstNF92IvjDcfsxV08JAA7dl3819dpPkLOMBFoeuBqQ1anIZSrz6YsateNHRCOB4KSIbw9uYh3WnZGofV9SGzzKmLTI%3D)

This is a $2.8 billion increase over the 2021 enacted level and is proposed at a time when the agency is performing a sweeping review of its processes. A better approach would be to restore confidence and enhance pandemic preparedness through responsible use of public health dollars. The Biden administration’s budget also ignores two of the country’s most pressing healthcare problems: the impending financial collapse of entitlement programs that seniors depend on and the overburdening of healthcare providers. Medicare, which insures 18% of all Americans and nearly all over age 65, is in serious financial trouble. Medicare Part A, which covers hospital services, is projected to be insolvent by 2026. Additionally, Social Security is projected to be unable to cover full benefits by 2034. Biden’s budget does nothing to address this. Other members of his political party have notably proposed to lower the age to qualify for Medicare to 60, which would immediately add 23 million people to a program already on unsure financial footing. Rather than expanding Medicare, these programs should be shored up to ensure availability for seniors who depend on them. Finish Reading . | Dear Patriot,

You currently see him on Fox News hosting The Five and Fox & Friends in the morning, but _[Ben Ferguson came to Utah to interview Tim Aalders in his race for Congress](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151760&L=83033&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvdGltLWFhbGRlcnMtc2l0cy1kb3duLXdpdGgtZm94LW5ld3M/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT0mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fdGVybT0=)_.
[](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151760&L=83033&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvdGltLWFhbGRlcnMtc2l0cy1kb3duLXdpdGgtZm94LW5ld3M/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT0mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fdGVybT0=)
Ferguson began his radio career in his hometown of Memphis, Tenn., at the age of 13, which made him the youngest radio talk show host in the country when the national show debuted in 2004. Ferguson is currently the host of the Premiere Networks-syndicated weekend program, “The Ben Ferguson Show.” Ferguson is also host of the daily “Ben Ferguson Podcast”, one of the fastest-growing conservative podcasts in the country.

Voters can see on [www.VoteTimAalders.com](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151760&L=82766&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9JnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3Rlcm09) as Aalders sits down with Ferguson and discusses the issues that matter to the Third District of Utah including national energy policy, Congress creating inflation with COVID spending, and why it matters that John Curtis made more money in the stock market than Nancy Pelosi.

[Click on this link and listen to a former talk radio show host (Tim) talk to the current TV, radio, and podcast star (not Tim).](https://ut.votetimaalders.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=24009358&N=151760&L=83033&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92b3RldGltYWFsZGVycy5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvdGltLWFhbGRlcnMtc2l0cy1kb3duLXdpdGgtZm94LW5ld3M/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT0mdXRtX21lZGl1bT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TmV3c2xldHRlciZ1dG1fdGVybT0=)

Derek,
_Western PA is union country_ — sacred ground in America's labor history.
That’s why we are so proud to have the backing of tens of thousands of workers in Western PA and the labor movement that is done playing defense.
The list of Chris’s union endorsements is growing every day:
* **Allegheny-Fayette Central Labor Council**
* **Teamsters Joint Council 40**
* **Pittsburgh Plumbers Local 27**
* **United Steelworkers District 10**
* **United Steelworkers Local 1088**
* **International Union of Operating Engineers Local 66**
* **Amalgamated Transit Union Local 85**
* **Heating & Frost Insulators Union Local 2**

You don’t win as a Democrat in Western Pennsylvania without labor. Chris worked hard to organize a union as a member of the successful Pitt Faculty Organizing Committee, and he will never apologize for standing with workers and labor and for fighting for the union way of life.
**Chris is the union-backed candidate running for Congress in PA-17, and he needs your support to win so he can fight for workers in Washington.**

| | Here's the good news, team: A new poll has Charlie beating Ron DeSantis by a _double-digit margin!_

But here's the bad news: Despite this exciting polling, our donations have DROPPED in recent weeks. This is NOT the time to fall behind!

So we're coming to our top supporters with an urgent request: [_Can you rush a donation right now to help us get back on track?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44060205/339916037/234651256?&amount=5&refcode=20220412_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQwNzY2ZC05YWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJ-31w-bh8RkZLExfxt2D2nzj061kxZeoJwNP4MAl6I=)

Look, we're not Ron DeSantis. We don't have a Rolodex of far-right billionaires to fund this campaign. If we win – WHEN we win – it'll be because of grassroots supporters just like you.

People are sick and tired of the extremism DeSantis is bringing to Florida and may soon bring to the entire country. We believe that our government should work for _everyone_ , not just the elite few.

If that's you, friend, then [_we need you to pitch in now_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44060206/339916038/1278717326?&amount=5&refcode=20220412_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODQwNzY2ZC05YWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJ-31w-bh8RkZLExfxt2D2nzj061kxZeoJwNP4MAl6I=) – whether you've donated before or this is your first time. Winning Florida is going to take ALL of us. We can do it – together.

Thanks for everything,
Crist Finance Team

body:
Her deranged rhetoric is matched only by her cruel votes

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44060218/339916596/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_220412mtgvotes_N_TeamHolly_90do_6_N_TESTB_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTNmZTdkNy05YWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zAXyDchWovcBDh6UCz1b3yHfiBBf6Sg-x1W6LbXooDw=)
Peter,
You may have seen the recent headlines that Marjorie Taylor Greene called women the “weaker sex,” but you probably didn’t see the far more disturbing extension of that belief: her vote against the Stop Sexual Assault and Harassment in Transportation Act.
The bill, which would create measures to protect both transportation workers and passengers, passed the House by a bipartisan supermajority — yet Greene voted against it.
**[Peter, votes like this show that Marjorie’s rhetoric isn’t empty — she’s perfectly willing to act on it, no matter how cruel or callous the act. Can you donate $5 right now to help us get her out of office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44060219/339916597/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_220412mtgvotes_N_TeamHolly_90do_6_N_TESTB_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNTNmZTdkNy05YWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zAXyDchWovcBDh6UCz1b3yHfiBBf6Sg-x1W6LbXooDw=)**

The other thing votes like this show is just how much power Congress has to improve people’s lives, if they just choose to do so.
There is NO reason to vote against practical legislation like this that could prevent life-changing trauma by simply establishing common-sense protections and procedures, but extremists like Marjorie aren’t interested in governing or helping people.

clean_body: Her deranged rhetoric is matched only by her cruel votes = Peter, You may have seen the recent headlines that Marjorie Taylor Greene called women the “weaker sex,” but you probably didn’t see the far more disturbing extension of that belief: her vote against the Stop Sexual Assault and Harassment in Transportation Act. The bill, which would create measures to protect both transportation workers and passengers, passed the House by a bipartisan supermajority — yet Greene voted against it. = = The other thing votes like this show is just how much power Congress has to improve people’s lives, if they just choose to do so. There is NO reason to vote against practical legislation like this that could prevent life-changing trauma by simply establishing common-sense protections and procedures, but extremists like Marjorie aren’t interested in governing or helping people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = In solidarity, Team Holly || || Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States ** | Paid for by Holly for Congress

body:
Kurt Schrader won't

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/929bd9d8141e/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-7060537?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/4-12-eblast?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donate412

Friend,

Kurt Schrader has once again shown how little he cares about the safety of our communities.

He has voted “NO” to placing fentanyl in Schedule 1 of the Controlled Substances Act which would have helped in stopping the trafficking of this deadly drug.

By voting “NO”, Schrader has voted to allow drug cartels to continue smuggling the lethal drug across our open borders into our county and into our lives.

When I’m in office, I WILL protect our communities by fighting to SECURE our borders; can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or even $100 right now so we can defeat Kurt Schrader? >>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/4-12-eblast?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donate412)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/4-12-eblast?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donate412?amount=100

Oregon may not be a border state but we are just as affected.

Kurt Schrader is blind to the fentanyl crisis growing in Oregon, but I’m not.

I will ALWAYS put the people of Oregon first; donate today and together we can fight for the safety of our communities.>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/4-12-eblast?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donate412)

https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/4-12-eblast?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donate412

Thank you,

Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Republican Candidate for U.S. Congress

name: SENATE ALERT (via NRSC)
subject: We cannot afford this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We could lose even more Senate seats
Peter,

Have you seen the latest projections from Cook Political Report?

Right now, they’re predicting 5 key races this November that are either a “toss-up” or, at best, “lean Republican.”

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5ef5f5c931874db4bef7e713493ba2de&_e=-K7ia0_OE2FEQtuPwGr9IAjSNlQDvvS2TSIuc-TWs2Y33SKLz8ZZNwTY9AS2zllI2MmBoYBJ_4UewuC9EubkRBRlye5KbiFwxEAAmj8PBiCvbr06DwssPaVDX6yKAKa_Nx-6JuCoZUWoJLUdyUSGXaM44BhsWH2mEW7x7ifN146Mitv596hKypK-IVX4x7Oca-MftN5BbcZlcBBMaqECaPkUMNy65EsyZWWtSZgfK9N0Jf0aBrKAY1-pBwdGk0_yOz3OTIJixJQcfI88M3sJJVVWkxigaoPYx9epmauQTSu_mcHgsuzenXqnGrD04YFI2O9FQg81An4uQFW9jEDOqt_hQyaGymXKASarHgDm27Y_eLa-N3DFm5YNivITmP6Vv96VWt7aV2u3pDObt7BHizYmQ_ApupItCyP6eDWWRI6Xv_6BoeCvkinXdpXuMvjXKchfEsW9usw8MoupXmLdhA%3D%3D)
[**These are 5 seats that we absolutely cannot afford to lose if we’re going to have any chance at taking back the Senate majority this November.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5ef5f5c931874db4bef7e713493ba2de&_e=-K7ia0_OE2FEQtuPwGr9IAjSNlQDvvS2TSIuc-TWs2Y33SKLz8ZZNwTY9AS2zllI2MmBoYBJ_4UewuC9EubkRBRlye5KbiFwxEAAmj8PBiCvbr06DwssPaVDX6yKAKa_Nx-6JuCoZUWoJLUdyUSGXaM44BhsWH2mEW7x7ifN146Mitv596hKypK-IVX4x7Oca-MftN5BbcZlcBBMaqECaPkUMNy65EsyZWWtSZgfK9N0Jf0aBrKAY1-pBwdGk0_yk0ZCgImoq593TsMIVIkLsAdHzKi_41y_2I_Vg-niHIoOKJdeeleStxYYAzG5I4xcd3hGvpEmIoniPBTEJa_AGzdUh873uswy5GiUckas4of7NIihsECVqZ8cnf3tud8OOJNe4Z33G8FgPzVo3ITsnlt_IUPxYC1Ql4hWPNNpVD6toe7_XRbEGk8yc-eSjeTKnlL7NfKKOGE1y6BEzIf3zA%3D%3D)

[** RETAKE THE MAJORITY! **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5ef5f5c931874db4bef7e713493ba2de&_e=-K7ia0_OE2FEQtuPwGr9IAjSNlQDvvS2TSIuc-TWs2Y33SKLz8ZZNwTY9AS2zllI2MmBoYBJ_4UewuC9EubkRBRlye5KbiFwxEAAmj8PBiCvbr06DwssPaVDX6yKAKa_Nx-6JuCoZUWoJLUdyUSGXaM44BhsWH2mEW7x7ifN146Mitv596hKypK-IVX4x7Oca-MftN5BbcZlcBBMaqECaPkUMNy65EsyZWWtSZgfK9N0Jf0aBrKAY1-pBwdGk0_y4LFvo1cgl9XsPQS79XFnaQAvmNJ6TEzhtpadk18UzVBAUI50buAwU6zAr3b4_6AX5do0j-1cA9IvsfojYJhIxlS5dK3I2ygk7Ha1Euo37QCg9BXNyYBul_ufvlJEM7FHhdrEW9okgX_VSppElOZxmVXQPCAY-FQM1dcJV-wIc54bT6ZxkMl1_b8F-cTdq_ZRCx_NpNm2vi8kJnKqjfVjGw%3D%3D)
Winning these open seats would give Republicans a _**great**_ chance at retaking our majority - and allowing us to get to work to fix all the issues caused by Biden, Schumer, Pelosi, and the rest of D.C.’s liberal elites.

**But it’s not just Republicans who need to capitalize on taking these open seats.** Look at how many Democrat seats are also vulnerable this November:

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5ef5f5c931874db4bef7e713493ba2de&_e=-K7ia0_OE2FEQtuPwGr9IAjSNlQDvvS2TSIuc-TWs2Y33SKLz8ZZNwTY9AS2zllI2MmBoYBJ_4UewuC9EubkRBRlye5KbiFwxEAAmj8PBiCvbr06DwssPaVDX6yKAKa_Nx-6JuCoZUWoJLUdyUSGXaM44BhsWH2mEW7x7ifN146Mitv596hKypK-IVX4x7Oca-MftN5BbcZlcBBMaqECaPkUMNy65EsyZWWtSZgfK9N0Jf0aBrKAY1-pBwdGk0_ySXFLX8RyInhvT1mAoVKcY_qtE3xEMeXAEklXD971UulaC8UwtACyKWaWpa-US2QHW91pUBtciPpUJbg4d5D2tY1oKervxJt-OLvR2SrfO9XYjQvPWAA1qz8db5PGNc7Qf6IWcxhpVb9fIW8lf9nVC2BfBZGsB9bAMwQct50UnWZr-iatOXDMOkWNypQUk7d1c9mdjtdAD_R-yt-KQ1NYuA%3D%3D)
If we can get every single patriot like you to [**contribute just $25 _right now,_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5ef5f5c931874db4bef7e713493ba2de&_e=-K7ia0_OE2FEQtuPwGr9IAjSNlQDvvS2TSIuc-TWs2Y33SKLz8ZZNwTY9AS2zllI2MmBoYBJ_4UewuC9EubkRBRlye5KbiFwxEAAmj8PBiCvbr06DwssPaVDX6yKAKa_Nx-6JuCoZUWoJLUdyUSGXaM44BhsWH2mEW7x7ifN146Mitv596hKypK-IVX4x7Oca-MftN5BbcZlcBBMaqECaPkUMNy65EsyZWWtSZgfK9N0Jf0aBrKAY1-pBwdGk0_yCnLhFsCHai_SRMRIzgu5Rp1pbgTAPRPZcuMFPblP6vVa4S-Chx7QKtAJfQCNuXQrDCl20bAgwNCYxjlofnXxuDQhjUrkODPcxphyv1bPqdJgNcrJcnXHXPcJX_m6frlZnN8sxcMBl8w-4BAViGK3QH0UNYZD0cCEpVOugTFxQyUSzutdYaNyrWGOk__hv6guF3WV6gPwlj3PBAUXKEjYog%3D%3D) we’ll be in a great position not only to hold onto our seats, but also to **flip** a few current Democrat seats!

[** RETAKE THE MAJORITY! **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5ef5f5c931874db4bef7e713493ba2de&_e=-K7ia0_OE2FEQtuPwGr9IAjSNlQDvvS2TSIuc-TWs2Y33SKLz8ZZNwTY9AS2zllI2MmBoYBJ_4UewuC9EubkRBRlye5KbiFwxEAAmj8PBiCvbr06DwssPaVDX6yKAKa_Nx-6JuCoZUWoJLUdyUSGXaM44BhsWH2mEW7x7ifN146Mitv596hKypK-IVX4x7Oca-MftN5BbcZlcBBMaqECaPkUMNy65EsyZWWtSZgfK9N0Jf0aBrKAY1-pBwdGk0_y4fJgvD8OYm_Zzybf8fMkTrcNzovokfovEpeLWybvmUgA17JDse1QXho-MUAYEdJM4o7pmj_8ypWtPD-ejMH1XXBlly7C9Ag6dm9gp_fU7xVx272Ow6w3zsKJy86eu9uGzrkIaO-KWrtbXOR3iJt0q4WH_riL64TUb_rX9781hZT73YR7wu0txXWrg-k7G7A7d7OvROR6t2GM0i5fntyVvw%3D%3D)
It’s time that conservatives across the country start taking this November seriously. [**Can we count on you to help us out and join with us as we fight to retake the Senate majority?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=5ef5f5c931874db4bef7e713493ba2de&_e=-K7ia0_OE2FEQtuPwGr9IAjSNlQDvvS2TSIuc-TWs2Y33SKLz8ZZNwTY9AS2zllI2MmBoYBJ_4UewuC9EubkRBRlye5KbiFwxEAAmj8PBiCvbr06DwssPaVDX6yKAKa_Nx-6JuCoZUWoJLUdyUSGXaM44BhsWH2mEW7x7ifN146Mitv596hKypK-IVX4x7Oca-MftN5BbcZlcBBMaqECaPkUMNy65EsyZWWtSZgfK9N0Jf0aBrKAY1-pBwdGk0_yd16JfKz8tFqJjmfnlPtbRpwduGUv5jw1kcIVbnAF0_s52l88m4KNNdt2rdwdcaLZHLvzuvT8_5pVVLxXMWxwNWGYYDE_aJwhhX2_vTIkZMAyOAh_XEOVgjaARsnLVKeVlcO298Q9sW1-cNt8at6UUdfT9brQDAy_sWF30XQo8NWHuhxFbmMLNLZnRbMpg3eAW83AmD29lY7-JiJIWfcRew%3D%3D)

It’s never too early to start working towards November, Peter.

Thank you,
NRSC HQ

Right now, they’re predicting 5 key races this November that are either a “toss-up” or, at best, “lean Republican.” Winning these open seats would give Republicans a great chance at retaking our majority - and allowing us to get to work to fix all the issues caused by Biden, Schumer, Pelosi, and the rest of D.C.’s liberal elites. But it’s not just Republicans who need to capitalize on taking these open seats. Look at how many Democrat seats are also vulnerable this November: If we can get every single patriot like you to we’ll be in a great position not only to hold onto our seats, but also to flip a few current Democrat seats! It’s time that conservatives across the country start taking this November seriously. It’s never too early to start working towards November, Peter. Mark is my best friend, my partner, and my rock. I feel so lucky to have him by my side every day.

Friend –
Mark is my best friend, my partner, and my rock. I feel so lucky to have him by my side every day.
He has helped me through my darkest moments and he always fights for what is right.
At war, he flew in combat, and at peace he joined NASA and commanded the space shuttle twice.
Mark never planned to be a Senator, but he knows when it’s time to serve. He’s served his family, our country, and now the great state of Arizona.
But if he’s going to win reelection, he needs your help. And the next 72 hours are critical. Because Friday at midnight, we end our mid-month fundraising drive. And we need a strong showing today to catch up to where we need to be. So, please.

name: Conor Lamb
subject: Some of my thoughts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44061403/339922423/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWMyOTJhMS05ZWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzMeZcWvg2GWulOzJuFwq6dNqjGozJEK5dr6_MQRHaA=)

Friend,

5 Tuesdays – 35 more days – until the May 17th primary. And I know that every single one of those days count.

I told you last week that I don't bother sending you emails with flashing gifs urging you to donate. What I can do is speak directly to you about my plan to win this race and my vision for Pennsylvania.

Last weekend, I had events in 10 counties across central PA, many of them in rural communities. My goal was to prove to the voters there that I'm the candidate who can win everywhere in PA.

The weather turned out to be an unfortunate mix of rain, snow, and hail, but at every event, I was blown away by how many people came out in spite of that. In New Berlin (Pop. 873), we had 80 people pack a house to hear about our campaign. Our photographer had a tough time getting close enough to take a picture because every room in the place was filled.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44061404/339922424/124576002?refcode=em22_220412_5tuesdays&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWMyOTJhMS05ZWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzMeZcWvg2GWulOzJuFwq6dNqjGozJEK5dr6_MQRHaA=)
---

In Lancaster County, we had twice as many voters as we expected show up to an outside event, even though it was freezing cold and snowing.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44061405/339922425/124576002?refcode=em22_220412_5tuesdays&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWMyOTJhMS05ZWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzMeZcWvg2GWulOzJuFwq6dNqjGozJEK5dr6_MQRHaA=)
---

In Cumberland, we completely ran out of chairs.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44061406/339922426/124576002?refcode=em22_220412_5tuesdays&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWMyOTJhMS05ZWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nzMeZcWvg2GWulOzJuFwq6dNqjGozJEK5dr6_MQRHaA=)
---

**And today, I was endorsed by 8 current and former County Commissioners from those 7 rural counties.** They know what it takes to win in rural Pennsylvania, and they're supporting me because they know that we're the campaign to do it.

We're trying to win the most competitive race in the country, and that has to start with the respect of showing up and answering people’s questions. I know that I need to fight for and earn your vote – no matter who you are, where you live, or who you voted for in the past.

That's how we can win this year. I know I can build the coalition we need in November because we've done it before. And it all starts with the respect of showing up.

**[I know from experience that I can earn the votes we need for this election friend. But to do this I need your support to have the right resources to reach voters in every community. clean_body: | = Friend, 5 Tuesdays – 35 more days – until the May 17th primary. And I know that every single one of those days count. I told you last week that I don't bother sending you emails with flashing gifs urging you to donate. What I can do is speak directly to you about my plan to win this race and my vision for Pennsylvania. Last weekend, I had events in 10 counties across central PA, many of them in rural communities. My goal was to prove to the voters there that I'm the candidate who can win everywhere in PA. The weather turned out to be an unfortunate mix of rain, snow, and hail, but at every event, I was blown away by how many people came out in spite of that. In New Berlin (Pop. 873), we had 80 people pack a house to hear about our campaign. Our photographer had a tough time getting close enough to take a picture because every room in the place was filled. | = In Lancaster County, we had twice as many voters as we expected show up to an outside event, even though it was freezing cold and snowing. = In Cumberland, we completely ran out of chairs. = And today, I was endorsed by 8 current and former County Commissioners from those 7 rural counties. They know what it takes to win in rural Pennsylvania, and they're supporting me because they know that we're the campaign to do it. We're trying to win the most competitive race in the country, and that has to start with the respect of showing up and answering people’s questions. I know that I need to fight for and earn your vote – no matter who you are, where you live, or who you voted for in the past. That's how we can win this year. I know I can build the coalition we need in November because we've done it before. And it all starts with the respect of showing up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support, – Conor Lamb = = *

subject: Short and sweet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Friends,
I am going to keep this short and sweet. We closed the books on our final FEC deadline, but I still need your help. There is still so much we need to do to keep this powerful grassroots movement going. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=short] And since I’m not accepting donations from corporate PACs, I am solely relying on call time and organic outreach.
So, to get to the point, I am personally asking for your continued support. Can you donate $10, $25, or $50 to my campaign today?
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
$10 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=short_10] $25 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=short_25]
$50 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=short_50] $75 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=short_75]
$100 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=short_100] OTHER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane_other=true&refcode=safe_other]
Your support means everything. Thank you!
Victoria
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_headshot [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_headshot]
EXPRESS DONATE to Victoria Virasingh for Congress
If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=shorta_10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=shorta_25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=shorta_50] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=shorta_100]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=shortb]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=short]

name: Steve Nelson
subject: My son Thomas, the PK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Protestant Christians know what "PK" means—Preacher’s Kid. Yes, Tom Nelson is a Preacher’s Kid, or in Lutheran circles, a Pastor’s Kid. Raised in a parsonage, dragged along to every service and church activity, and yes, living in the spotlight.

PKs are notorious rebels, many choking on the expectations to be goody-goody children all the time. It’s hard being a PK. So hard that in my seminary class of 32 not one of us was the child of a pastor. It seems pastors’ children were taking a pass on following in their parents’ footsteps.

To his credit, Tom avoided the resentment and embraced the life of a pastor’s family. He went to church, Sunday School, Vacation Bible School, and was an active member of the youth group, going to church Bible camp and doing mission trips. But no, he wasn’t a perfect kid. You can ask him about some of his exploits!

I had a unique church assignment. I was called by the Church to be a Pastor Developer. I was trained and assigned to a specific community and given the charge to find people and create a congregation, from scratch. My territory was centered on the communities of Kaukauna, Kimberly, Combined Locks, and Little Chute, Wisconsin.

Finding people and organizing a congregation meant going door-to-door, up one side of a street and down the other, meeting people, and inviting them to help me grow a church.

Some days Tom came along with me as we canvassed the four communities. I’d knock on the door and he had a brochure ready. He logged names and addresses for follow-up visits. That summer we covered 3,000 homes.

When Tom ran for the State Assembly seat in our area 20 years later he did the same thing—knocking on doors, meeting people, listening to their needs and concerns, and building a database, just like we did starting Christ the King Lutheran Church. Except he made over 22,000 visits in his first Assembly campaign! **To date, Tom has knocked on over 70,000 doors in his campaigns for public office.**

Obviously, he cannot knock on every door in Wisconsin but his campaign for the US Senate remains very one-on-one, very personal, and real. He’s out meeting people any way he can.

He has to. **He doesn’t have rich parents or corporate donors paying his way.** What he has is a passion to serve people. He has the energy and commitment to see this campaign through. His eyes are on the Senate. He does not quit! And don’t bet against him.

But he cannot do it alone. Will you help him in his campaign? **[Click here to make a contribution to his campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44061972/339924778/1158065881?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220412_1_1&refcode2=3f7014a9-a1ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjcwMTRhOS1hMWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pfoVxK2-5FDsxqnQhVIUK6TpAeLB5uIpGO77_OF-ryg=)** And remember to vote for him in the Primary Election on August 9th! Thanks, and bless you.

Sincerely,

Steve, Dad, and if you read my diploma, The Rev. Dr. Steven M. Nelson

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We can turn this trend around
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, our
fundraising numbers have been decreasing since December. Take a look at
this downward trend line.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102740?refcode=em20220412-22834&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22834%2E1203867%2EZ-M3mE ]Line graph of Justice Democrats fundraising between December 2021 and
March 2022, showing a steep decline between December and January, and
steady decline through March

This line can’t keep going down, not with our next primaries less than six
weeks away. If we’re going to lift Summer Lee to a primary win on May 17,
Jessica Cisneros to a victory against corporate anti-abortion incumbent
Henry Cuellar on May 24, and win 3 other primaries this year, we need our
grassroots supporters to step up.

Since we first let you know about this decrease in fundraising, more than
1000 folks have stepped up and donated to Justice Democrats.

With an average donation of just $17.66 this year, we need as many
grassroots supporters as possible to chip in what they can right now to
help us reverse this trend.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102740?refcode=em20220412-22834&t=1021&akid=22834%2E1203867%2EZ-M3mE ]Peter, can
you chip in $17.66 now to help us at this critical time? We need your
support to win our progressive primaries and build the Justice Democrats
bloc in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/102740?refcode=em20220412-22834&t=1022&akid=22834%2E1203867%2EZ-M3mE ]Contribute

Our collective fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and big bold
progressive change requires us to elect more Justice Democrats to join the
Squad in Congress. We’re so grateful for your support — we hope you’ll be
able to give today.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=22834%2E1203867%2EZ-M3mE ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=22834%2E1203867%2EZ-M3mE ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220412-22834-footer&t=1025&refcode2=22834_1203867_Z-M3mE&akid=22834%2E1203867%2EZ-M3mE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=22834%2E1203867%2EZ-M3mE

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Newt Gingrich and me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Newt Gingrich made it clear. There are two things we need to do today to win this race! |
---
Fellow American,

My good friend and former Speaker of the House, Newt Gingrich, knows our campaign is the most important Senate race in the country.

He is asking for your help with two things today so we can win this race:

He is asking for your help with two things today so we can win this race: 1. 2. Call or email your friends to do the same! Please watch this quick video Newt and I recorded for you! Our Democrat opponent is raising over $100,000 a day. We cannot afford to fall too far behind in fundraising. Newt is ready to help us win, but we need to hear from you. name: Derek Marshall
subject: It's simple
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Derek%20Marshall%20Logo%20-%20Standard%20Stacked%20Lockup%20JTree%20MAIN%20COLOR.png]
Derek Marshall is running in California's newly-created 23rd Congressional District, against incumbent Jay Obernolte, not Kevin McCarthy, who represents the former 23rd district. You may be receiving these emails because you've previously indicated you support progressive and Democratic candidates. Emails are the best way we update our supporters, but y ou can always unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a6187216-eab9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/682767fd-81ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODI3NjdmZC04MWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R3iqtBVf16InpDLArdjLZlkSQiOwLxOFH70vNuOQo3k=&id=124407521 here.
Peter,
If we care about racial justice, closing the wealth gap, AND giving the economy a boost, there’s one key thing we can do right now. It’s simple: cancel student debt.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-04-11%20at%206.51.18%20PM.png]
46 MILLION people across America owe student debt. 99% of the debt is owed to the federal government, instead of private funds. That means we can make a huge difference at the national level if we’re willing to be bold.
My opponent is an extreme Republican who cares more about “wasteful spending” than looking out for the 46 million with outstanding debt. I’m not afraid to champion policies that provide for the people–will you chip in today to help get me to Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-12&amount=38]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=4-12_express_lane_5]
Express Donate: $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=4-12_express_lane_15]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=4-12_express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $38 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane=true&amount=38&refcode=4-12_express_lane_38]
Express Donate: Other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?express_lane_other=true&refcode=4-12_express_lane_other]
Or, maximize your impact and make your donation monthly. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-9&amount=38&recurring=1]
While President Biden has taken some steps to reduce the burden of debt, $1.75 trillion remains. The government has continued to extend the pause on student loan payments in response to public pressure. The people have spoken–now Congress needs to act swiftly.
I’m proud to support this common-sense policy that will open up opportunities for the many generations affected by student debt. This debt is a massive burden that limits people’s financial choices often for decades.
It’s time for a change. When I’m elected, I will never stop advocating for US. Your donation today goes towards our operating expenses to make sure every voter in my district can hear this same message. Will you help out? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-12&amount=38]
In solidarity,
Derek Marshall
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-12&amount=38]
Meet Derek [www.DerekMarshallCA.com]

name: Peter Franchot
subject: URGENT: Fundraising Deadline This Friday
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
Last night, legislators in the Maryland General Assembly officially concluded the 2022 Legislative Session. I’d like to give my warm thanks to lawmakers for their critical work this year, and I can’t wait to partner with them as Governor to secure a bolder and stronger future for Maryland’s communities in the years to come.
With the MDGA now adjourned, our people-powered movement enters the final stretch of this competitive Primary Race. Over the past 90 days, I have been legally unable to accept donations while lawmakers conducted their work in Annapolis. Not being able to raise money over these past three months means we must step up now with the donations that will keep this campaign running at full-throttle in the lead up to election day.
That’s why I’m asking for your help to meet our fundraising goal of $10,000 before this Friday’s critical mid-month deadline. We don’t have much time left, so click here to chip in! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0412?amount=20.22]
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our campaign continues to gain momentum. Recent polls have confirmed that our coalition remains the frontrunner in the Democratic field, and we continue to gain major endorsements on top of the more than 100 current and former elected officials who have endorsed our campaign.
We were also one of the first campaigns to go live on TV with a new advertising blitz, and we continue to utilize the most cutting-edge tools available to reach thousands of voters online, at the doors, and over the phone on a weekly basis. With your support, we can pull ahead even further in the weeks leading up to the July 19 primary election.
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0412?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0412?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0412?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0412?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0412]
We need to raise $10,000 before our 11:59 PM deadline this Friday, and anything you can give is greatly appreciated. Your contribution will help us hire more organizers, print more field literature and yard signs, run more digital ads, knock on more doors, place more phone calls, and ultimately secure the votes we need to win this race.
Together, let’s redefine the promise and possibility of state government, and lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. I have a bold vision for our future that includes combating climate change, piloting fully-debt free paths to a college degree, expanding affordable healthcare, and so much more. Enough talk – let’s get it done.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0412?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0412?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/midmonthapril_0412?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/cc7d2af1-6aba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/622767fd-81ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjI3NjdmZC04MWJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=clNGgC6YgVZKju6hE8cRpGFDeO7rmwCrrYveKd09TGo=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: April Becker
subject: "Worst Nightmare"
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Becker for Congress
body:
That's the nickname progressive Democrats gave me... A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a83ba9c67b23471386460f090d6f082d&_e=VtLdcAnZu0KhgezJtKE_uABVmHlOC-u3K-9JAYpCqVhEcMYgh7dthMnj9D9TuDy7v60qn7f81MTmWNed7i4xUQ6FmmoFlYppCsWu4SEMOkshJ_7QgHrxyU4ZRoCFovab3O8D-EuAab82faOQArtkcfvft1Zn-HpORoXUf7KA4Ez0uI1tsm4T5rEFKwAKVVUWj4IRg6mwDxSu4e3Wo2ZmgpBnsNLbyg9LkkGrPQYewgyLvvaTSQFHOzw44zds9pH-Y-g8-KbjZ4PWwRu8UCAOvS1nYuWvA_ag8fEOQqZSEeOIdABvJ9IlityRsbguvXwfV7_nNYyoOnCCDCN_pQxB5jGv0LHveUqKKcRVAhTkXj_7el7oq857B99nhwwYCKv-hc06-WBUpyBjwzB4TKI5GtbyvPPxbZsUR-WW73Y8GYV57y3MfSg44gklpZfLNKFmYSB8mUh6lZQDzy0p_O1Rs6B_3Pc0dCRI-YuwTlcktvs%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare:

A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans this November.

**[My name is April Becker: I am a lawyer, mother, wife, unapologetic conservative, and currently, the Democrats’ worst nightmare.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a83ba9c67b23471386460f090d6f082d&_e=VtLdcAnZu0KhgezJtKE_uABVmHlOC-u3K-9JAYpCqVhEcMYgh7dthMnj9D9TuDy7v60qn7f81MTmWNed7i4xUQ6FmmoFlYppCsWu4SEMOkshJ_7QgHrxyU4ZRoCFovab3O8D-EuAab82faOQArtkcfvft1Zn-HpORoXUf7KA4Ez0uI1tsm4T5rEFKwAKVVUWj4IRg6mwDxSu4e3Wo2ZmgpBnsNLbyg9LkkGrPQYewgyLvvaTSQFHOzw44zds9pH-Y-g8-KbjZ4PWwRu8UCAOvZ_T9NkCTij9TIm2YgrceUZPSev55SOj8j0GizGLMM1eRWc_2RRRKWEN4UnWvENoIaLCop4x0upBQYFxJAvgGhOLXqkANi2VTl0mC7KYLcNks8UWSks1GNqZ9Pso7Au97rfbevJ_BOvSt1BDyb8-nxXE_HLe7u5fR_nz5TdJTvlEcns7vGU-vy_LfH8QnV3FpGoY8OE23fOY68MVpajFb2w%3D)**

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a83ba9c67b23471386460f090d6f082d&_e=VtLdcAnZu0KhgezJtKE_uABVmHlOC-u3K-9JAYpCqVhEcMYgh7dthMnj9D9TuDy7v60qn7f81MTmWNed7i4xUQ6FmmoFlYppCsWu4SEMOkshJ_7QgHrxyU4ZRoCFovab3O8D-EuAab82faOQArtkcfvft1Zn-HpORoXUf7KA4Ez0uI1tsm4T5rEFKwAKVVUWj4IRg6mwDxSu4e3Wo2ZmgpBnsNLbyg9LkkGrPQYewgyLvvaTSQFHOzw44zds9pH-Y-g8-KbjZ4PWwRu8UCAOvaMt-SnK-CiY0p4hUrSh5HgJmVwpa1tU9QZ7UeAsbDa6KgBu7-filmtP60rqupk3f6vst-pVf0lDNF26vDktwS0XHJ-cC9nEmfbD9EmCYVpxgy60_JyaXmQ1HxcnUwFFXL_NOy3BkJqXROxMasjQRE6Bdrm6YvgA16RVQq1FYMDU6rEyJo5chnfGjDFaSn8WnNlynQaFssuILDpdUKh4jFE%3D)
[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a83ba9c67b23471386460f090d6f082d&_e=VtLdcAnZu0KhgezJtKE_uABVmHlOC-u3K-9JAYpCqVhEcMYgh7dthMnj9D9TuDy7v60qn7f81MTmWNed7i4xUQ6FmmoFlYppCsWu4SEMOkshJ_7QgHrxyU4ZRoCFovab3O8D-EuAab82faOQArtkcfvft1Zn-HpORoXUf7KA4Ez0uI1tsm4T5rEFKwAKVVUWj4IRg6mwDxSu4e3Wo2ZmgpBnsNLbyg9LkkGrPQYewgyLvvaTSQFHOzw44zds9pH-Y-g8-KbjZ4PWwRu8UCAOvWOHqwyLRqiLJvnRC3XVfbidv4XPB1NvXF2YY2-WXxzVw2KGWneI_kk4kX-CEuMilYkjS630l3KbHC16WIU3RXoLTad5Yp_RhEkDRvXL9l7-AQOJA8vKVlqqNWwp-T1d2ybmgatg5G3hG837opxbP9XunCD4fnKDyITlFiGAt3M4bThH6LvaX52wrkZf_F_7IEbwAsGoDuLkuXlZKZFfWns%3D)
I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career.

**[Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you’re going to back my campaign the first time you hear from me, so I’m willing to work for your support. Today I’d like to explain to you why I’m emailing and why my campaign for Congress is worth investing in.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a83ba9c67b23471386460f090d6f082d&_e=VtLdcAnZu0KhgezJtKE_uABVmHlOC-u3K-9JAYpCqVhEcMYgh7dthMnj9D9TuDy7v60qn7f81MTmWNed7i4xUQ6FmmoFlYppCsWu4SEMOkshJ_7QgHrxyU4ZRoCFovab3O8D-EuAab82faOQArtkcfvft1Zn-HpORoXUf7KA4Ez0uI1tsm4T5rEFKwAKVVUWj4IRg6mwDxSu4e3Wo2ZmgpBnsNLbyg9LkkGrPQYewgyLvvaTSQFHOzw44zds9pH-Y-g8-KbjZ4PWwRu8UCAOvesl2zWV4hthaBkhSgf9tliKerfZBEH29Q_4bWB645jcuUpvhcisbBCfH0Vc8xVY3O8Q0Xw-FjYS-p0n6bKhWp7dgGYhbrLAzzR4QoeeZU2H3kHZxBvEN_-eMb26XolCwYeHEUvSZaorzpZADgSAsOr_DQWn7VIpGmXVoEv10tjMJ49lwB-3oKqkKPtDE8FGIIhYR91sM5i0-V5J8fes_AM%3D)**

With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.**When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases.** I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress.

I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late.

**[Fellow Conservative, I have taken on tougher battles than this in the courtroom and that’s how I know I am going to need every grassroots conservative across the nation with me to flip this critical House seat.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a83ba9c67b23471386460f090d6f082d&_e=VtLdcAnZu0KhgezJtKE_uABVmHlOC-u3K-9JAYpCqVhEcMYgh7dthMnj9D9TuDy7v60qn7f81MTmWNed7i4xUQ6FmmoFlYppCsWu4SEMOkshJ_7QgHrxyU4ZRoCFovab3O8D-EuAab82faOQArtkcfvft1Zn-HpORoXUf7KA4Ez0uI1tsm4T5rEFKwAKVVUWj4IRg6mwDxSu4e3Wo2ZmgpBnsNLbyg9LkkGrPQYewgyLvvaTSQFHOzw44zds9pH-Y-g8-KbjZ4PWwRu8UCAOvQE9JBFiClDzFMgjizMMGXEP2HE4jt_lAf-bmVp4ycfgCO3v7WRzpzLjtbvvHAMoAyaEeM9wMUWZ8cI8uJagevUgsN6QumJdrUFlqpZ3G3HORbK925T6aBKODKvBF45c-3PfTEKUJiqXKyJQXqKZco4LlNl0O00QjeZiwV5U4TJ7JuyX-vN-_7UoanDG8TroHCsBHfrycksDH7COfiJqKWI%3D)**

**[I know you don’t know me but take a moment to look up my district. Do some research, and if you’re inclined afterward, please consider a donation of $10 to help me flip this seat RED.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a83ba9c67b23471386460f090d6f082d&_e=VtLdcAnZu0KhgezJtKE_uABVmHlOC-u3K-9JAYpCqVhEcMYgh7dthMnj9D9TuDy7v60qn7f81MTmWNed7i4xUQ6FmmoFlYppCsWu4SEMOkshJ_7QgHrxyU4ZRoCFovab3O8D-EuAab82faOQArtkcfvft1Zn-HpORoXUf7KA4Ez0uI1tsm4T5rEFKwAKVVUWj4IRg6mwDxSu4e3Wo2ZmgpBnsNLbyg9LkkGrPQYewgyLvvaTSQFHOzw44zds9pH-Y-g8-KbjZ4PWwRu8UCAOvdskNMN91G1LT19a909qHrOR81-cN7CDifkhOvw250_bSukh3HwAxEZtE-pD8CO30RYYXAHieJPyulK2yVUzNvr0biK4qj4OkHXfzwCvd9jjIUQlZV1ydB8IeauaG7YXf3kCkBJ2ocQUrOv6QY5NX4If6PcjOpNk6nP1wbhkxJoRq0u3W8YEcxdpuM1v-GdJPDh50zd8X8m6NpJ1Yt1Wd9Q%3D)**

[**SUPPORT APRIL TODAY -> **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a83ba9c67b23471386460f090d6f082d&_e=VtLdcAnZu0KhgezJtKE_uABVmHlOC-u3K-9JAYpCqVhEcMYgh7dthMnj9D9TuDy7v60qn7f81MTmWNed7i4xUQ6FmmoFlYppCsWu4SEMOkshJ_7QgHrxyU4ZRoCFovab3O8D-EuAab82faOQArtkcfvft1Zn-HpORoXUf7KA4Ez0uI1tsm4T5rEFKwAKVVUWj4IRg6mwDxSu4e3Wo2ZmgpBnsNLbyg9LkkGrPQYewgyLvvaTSQFHOzw44zds9pH-Y-g8-KbjZ4PWwRu8UCAOvf8EwKdjjQ6pHjuB6ZMVCVMLwu3-w_shCTzTqohUk5BavEeDBVdoOlcKrKcsyR74OoP89qIbB0UFR0BMV9ErCKXhVeqk_VGtDfALbC52dTHU06E9B807BVR2dJR34HlUhc4qVfJsaxxal0l0utPF4uDzqUwLhrYN3TMYSWvoNgI5vzfPReujJGiocuqhJBrUbowl5U9zuMAS5-C9ybmrZcc%3D)
Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election.

Thank you,

clean_body: That's the nickname progressive Democrats gave me... A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans in 2022. | Fellow Conservative, Imagine the progressive Democrats’ worst nightmare: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, who proved that you can have a family and a successful career, an American patriot that dismantles the Left’s narrative that the GOP is for men and misogynists – I’m hoping that you’ll help me become the woman that takes back the House for Republicans this November. I am running for Congress in one of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s target districts, Nevada-03, where I am taking on a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of -- other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. Honestly, this could be the sleeper race that finally forces Nancy Pelosi to put her Washington D.C. penthouse on the market, having lost the House majority for the last time in her career. With three children, I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school.When I wasn’t packing lunches and sitting in school pick-up lines, I was a practicing attorney, building a business, fighting for the underdog, and taking on tough cases. I am proud to be a working mom. Now I want to take that same drive and attitude to Congress. I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. My hope is that by the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late. Last election, we saw more women elected to Congress than we ever have before -- and 31 of them were Conservative Republicans! We are the antithesis of what progressive Democrats want women to be, and we hold the power to take back the House in the Midterm Election. Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) P.S. If you’re a proud Republican woman, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. And if you’re a proud Republican man, | April Becker is a true Nevada success story. As a working mom with young children, April put herself through college and law school at UNLV.
