name: Alvin Williams, President
subject: Destroy Their Lies....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
-
| |
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=1)
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=2)
---
Dear Peter,
Dr. Carson is absolutely correct: **_without Black voters, the Republican Party may never win another Presidential election._**
Even worse, the GOP will find it increasingly difficult to win Senate seats in swing states - putting your conservative values in **serious jeopardy**!
**And nobody knows this more than the Democrats.**
That's why liberal race-baiters have launched an all-out assault on outspoken, Black conservatives - _like Dr. Ben Carson, Burgess Owens, and Sheriff Clarke_ \- **because they know their stranglehold on Black voters depends on it.**
You see, Black Republicans are crucial in destroying the Liberal Lie that **all Republicans are racist**.
You and I both know that isn't true, but Black voters only hear the liberal side of the story that says only government can create prosperity. They simply never hear the truth about conservatism.
[](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=3)
---
It's a BIG problem that is threatening to destroy our values, Peter.
**[I'm hoping you'll help me fight back against the race-baiting Liberal Lies](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=4)** , but first let me tell you **the BIG secret liberals do NOT want you to know**.
**The Democrats are scared to death right now...**
...because they know if Republicans can reclaim just 12% of the Black vote, _it will be the Democrats who will be unable to win another Presidential election_.
**Even a 7% increase in Blacks voting Republican could STOP the Democrats from winning the 2022 midterms!**
They're watching their **stranglehold** on Black voters start to slip after decades of failed policies that have **enslaved** entire generations of minorities to the government plantation.
The tide is turning because proud, Black conservatives _(like Dr. Ben Carson, Burgess Owens, Sheriff Clarke, and many more)_ \- are recruiting minorities to the Republican Party like never before - simply by sharing the promise of conservatism.
**That's why hateful liberals are desperate to destroy every Black conservative!**
**They know the ONLY way to keep Blacks voting for Democrats is to spread the lie that** **all Republicans are racist.**
That's why they call Sheriff Clarke a **"traitor to his race."**
That's why they spent MILLIONS to target and finally defeat Rep. Mia Love, a GOP rising star known for championing personal responsibility.
And that's why they attack Dr. Ben Carson with articles titled **"F*ck Ben Carson"** and call him hateful names like **"Uncle Tom"** and **"the acceptable negro for whites"**.
You and I can NOT let this stand!
There is simply too much at stake to let liberal race-baiters continue to attack Black Republicans and spread hate-filled lies about conservatives like you and me.
**[That's why I'm hoping you'll help me fight back with a contribution of $20.22 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=5)**
Your contribution will be put to use immediately to defend our proud, Black conservatives from hate-filled liberal attacks.
**[Your support will also help Black America's PAC Action Fund purchase radio ads in urban markets](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=6)** across America to spread conservativism to minority communities and reclaim Black voters to the Republican Party, where they belong.
These issues-based radio ads are absolutely critical if you and I are to reclaim Black voters, protect our values, and end the Democrat Party's **reign of terror** over the Black Community.
I can tell you from personal experience - once the message of conservatism reaches Black voters, it spreads like wildfire and obliterates the Liberal Lies that keep Blacks voting for Democrats.
**[So can I count on your contribution of $20.22 today?](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=7)**
**Remember, just a 7% increase in Blacks voting Republican could STOP the Democrats from winning the 2022 midterms...**
...but we can't do anything without your immediate help, Peter.
As a conservative leader in your community, your support is needed now more than ever!
**[So please join me in fighting back against the Liberal Lies and taking the fight to the Democrats with a contribution of $20.22 or more TODAY!](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=8)**
Or if you can't afford that much right now, **[then please give $5 or even $1 as a symbol of your support](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=9)**.
**[If you make a donation of ANY amount today, I'll send you this exclusive _"Destroy the Liberal Lies"_ magnet as a special thank you gift.](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=10)**
[](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=11)
---
Together, you and I can END the Liberal Lies by standing strong beside our Black conservatives.
Thank you, in advance, for joining the fight to destroy the Liberal Lies.
| [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=12)
---
_For America,_ |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund
[DONATE](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=13)
---
**P.S.** Just a 7% increase in Blacks voting Republican will STOP the Democrats from winning the 2022 midterms - **and nobody knows this more than Democrats**. That's why liberals - _desperate to keep their stranglehold on Black voters_ \- spread the vicious lie that all Republicans are racist! **[Your contribution of $20.22 or more will help BAMPAC Action Fund take the fight to the Democrats and destroy the Liberal Lies.](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=14)** **[And if you make a donation of ANY amount today, I'll send you this exclusive "Destroy the Liberal Lies" magnet as a special thank you gift.](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=15)** | [](https://www.bampac.org/liesmagnet?recruiter_id=62294&info=2022EA0303&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=16)
---
Thank you and God Bless.
|

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.

If you're giving up on this critical fight, then please [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea03&n=17) to stop receiving emails.

body:
Find out ->

[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWpZ_14HqN)
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59954121:WpZ_14HqN:m:1:2532013465:98F520160A1471731093401BC0982942:r)

Friend,

I want you to know how important you are to me.

_It was patriots like you who built this country, and it is patriots like you who are going to SAVE this country. And together, we will make it more exceptional than ever before._

When I think of my most valuable supporters, _I don't think of the ones who are necessarily the BIGGEST donors..._

I think of the ones who have been there for me since _day one._

name: MorganHarper.org
subject: Did you see our first TV ad?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
This is critical to our fight against the far-right in Ohio.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220412-934-footer-ak&t=2&akid=934%2E90090%2E90r2Tv)
**We’re officially live with our first TV ad of the primary campaign.** We couldn’t be more excited, but we’ll be honest – running TV ads is a lot more expensive than advertising on social media or through text messages.
It’s going to take a steady stream of grassroots donations to keep our TV ad on the air. [**_That’s why as we're only 21 DAYS away from the primary election, we’re humbly asking you to donate to our TV ad fund. Can you chip in $5 — or anything you can — to keep our advertisement on the airwaves for as long as possible?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31342?t=3&akid=934%2E90090%2E90r2Tv)
**[Watch + Donate →](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31343?refcode=em20220412-934&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=934%2E90090%2E90r2Tv)**
This is what we’re up against:
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31342?t=5&akid=934%2E90090%2E90r2Tv)
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31342?t=6&akid=934%2E90090%2E90r2Tv)
Yep, J.D. Vance and Josh Mandel are running TV ads, and they’re just as ridiculous and offensive as you’d expect. J.D. Vance talks about how he wants to “build the wall,” and Josh Mandel completely disrespects the legacy of MLK.
This is exactly the type of far-right vitriol that we’re fighting back against with our own TV ads. And this is exactly why keeping our ad on air is so critical.
**_[Please, donate to our TV ad fund to help us get in front of as many voters as possible. If you haven’t yet, you can also click here to watch the full Morgan Harper ad.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31342?t=7&akid=934%2E90090%2E90r2Tv)_ **
**[Watch + Donate →](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31343?refcode=em20220412-934&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=934%2E90090%2E90r2Tv)**
Onwards,
Team Morgan Harper
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220412-934-footer&t=9&refcode2=934_90090_90r2Tv&akid=934%2E90090%2E90r2Tv)**

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: Sanctuary cities are banned in Kansas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
My bill to ban sanctuary cities in Kansas has become law. The veto-proof bipartisan support for this bill in the Legislature demonstrated its importan Friend, My bill to ban sanctuary cities in Kansas has become law. The veto-proof bipartisan support for this bill in the Legislature demonstrated its importance, particularly as the Biden administration continues its tragic failure to secure our southern border. Every day, that failure jeopardizes public safety in our Kansas communities. And the crisis is only going to get worse as the Biden administration prepares to end “Title 42” public health restrictions on who can enter our country. Biden’s own Department of Homeland Security is projected to deal with as many as 18,000 border apprehensions per day once the restrictions are lifted. That would amount to more than half a million apprehensions a month – more than double the already record-high apprehensions we saw last year. Such a massive influx of people only makes it easier for criminal activity to make its way across the border and into our communities undetected. This crisis has turned every state into a border state. Kansas saw a 54% increase in drug overdoses during the early part of last year alone – mostly meth and fentanyl smuggled across America's unsecured southern border. This is a devastating public safety crisis, and law enforcement needs every tool at its disposal to combat it. Under this new law, Kansas law enforcement will be able to resume working professionally with federal immigration authorities as the needs of public safety requires and not be silenced by a patchwork of local “sanctuary city” gag orders. As your governor, I will always have the backs of our law enforcement and I will always put public safety first. And you can count on this: I will continue to provide the leadership Kansas needs when important issues like this arise. **[Will you stand with me?](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9e02c972de004d1a95235bc2d6eb2bb2&_e=ndQVM3zZLqRvw8ulrWHBQNHArQ-_w_1m21o6it66At41bvfxl18vXRsbAub1_n72Kjs4yBCoJhUrCVqBWcpBFBRq50LBumDs6yVXDvYTiOwYY0A4OJTz3LUK9d5zZZuDVYUTApPkL5lUFqwew9ltR--10Z1Gt4j5dKMCTn2vRWw_7gXJbz3UaAaYVMWCUn_rDKsBcJA3Ji0cV3lBAvSGewm7MeLuZ6XaXZa46xjf8kBIfpB0x9LnbTVtUQ1u81CPO4awIk9ROZeGXV9cQ3nSorW5IYGKCHfYrN_3EVIf-_3BhQrBP_ldmk1l5FX51-fE6fDdmqKByF1dB0EweyX_BWZHcbalaLXeaexetElTfEJ3Maned5-45VQ7KpuHm3jxxd8CS1GVdeTq08c3QiGKITDyuRP9xgkfL5ZmcP43R8_TMHSsEthjP6w69AnV_rElHh0doGYLgb--YOsCjSneqi7KT8zq7Dk5Y5OeY8gmyW2wgExehd4_w0pfKEQMXtSo)** [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9e02c972de004d1a95235bc2d6eb2bb2&_e=ndQVM3zZLqRvw8ulrWHBQNHArQ-_w_1m21o6it66At41bvfxl18vXRsbAub1_n72Kjs4yBCoJhUrCVqBWcpBFBRq50LBumDs6yVXDvYTiOwYY0A4OJTz3LUK9d5zZZuDVYUTApPkL5lUFqwew9ltR--10Z1Gt4j5dKMCTn2vRWw_7gXJbz3UaAaYVMWCUn_rDKsBcJA3Ji0cV3lBAvSGewm7MeLuZ6XaXZa46xjf8kBIfpB0x9LnbTVtUQ1u81CPO4awIk9ROZeGXV9cQ3nSorW5IYGKCHfYrN_3EVIf-_048eHLopiefykI3lUjel1k2eTaO_zJCy8QRF1lYDbED7FCnFAfqt3H00voTRPoK6-Z-_ZTmF3Z4ysmhTKGGI49J0dsHfGaQUOhimaovOzTESvlHt7WKJD_tz05jEcqTlZTqezTtFRi6w8hHXYcT-rxJjh86mTDyHI-YYfaOjVLA0kkj44M0vKW7G1GKgzMINqEFj3fY8Wg75kvDcdw8RaD) If you’re already firmly committed to the team, send this email to family and friends who care about supporting law enforcement and keeping our community safe. [**I need EVERY Kansan to be a part of this movement so we can win in November.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9e02c972de004d1a95235bc2d6eb2bb2&_e=ndQVM3zZLqRvw8ulrWHBQNHArQ-_w_1m21o6it66At41bvfxl18vXRsbAub1_n72Kjs4yBCoJhUrCVqBWcpBFBRq50LBumDs6yVXDvYTiOwYY0A4OJTz3LUK9d5zZZuDVYUTApPkL5lUFqwew9ltR--10Z1Gt4j5dKMCTn2vRWw_7gXJbz3UaAaYVMWCUn_rDKsBcJA3Ji0cV3lBAvSGewm7MeLuZ6XaXZa46xjf8kBIfpB0x9LnbTVtUQ1u81CPO4awIk9ROZeGXV9cQ3nSorW5IYGKCHfYrN_3EVIf-_13L4GkM6KKtQJC3vXDdEGfD8riGX5hTO4vZVSDgYvMS5fL8-DMPfvyrHvY-WTa28fKtoq0FEMdSqS-EccbxbVdIvcP8eiu5pXT6U_rvT42GxJ293Wu24cQDRM8RdxiGzAF7zR9H3Wv2E5k3NnL4TUHH9Wi59PLqLhW3NOX8NuEvq_N-XB915_hChoXQ0pHLfJXMbgqGG9T2uVrJJQR-z_u) [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=9e02c972de004d1a95235bc2d6eb2bb2&_e=ndQVM3zZLqRvw8ulrWHBQNHArQ-_w_1m21o6it66At41bvfxl18vXRsbAub1_n72Kjs4yBCoJhUrCVqBWcpBFBRq50LBumDs6yVXDvYTiOwYY0A4OJTz3LUK9d5zZZuDVYUTApPkL5lUFqwew9ltR--10Z1Gt4j5dKMCTn2vRWw_7gXJbz3UaAaYVMWCUn_rDKsBcJA3Ji0cV3lBAvSGewm7MeLuZ6XaXZa46xjf8kBIfpB0x9LnbTVtUQ1u81CPO4awIk9ROZeGXV9cQ3nSorW5IYGKCHfYrN_3EVIf-_0sIExWJkS4JkPi2vmyqXcawypmcqCkV8d2qhU16gNqJwqUkO2-X9AW4gstOPVYPgA3-E-VwyRptolQHyddssjOS-FEAHrlwkvwavMylwFrEiji-rb87hN8zztHtsMHuNnnOwzNYQJqeakrHUuuvQLcylEdyge2gcsXP1vorJJHJakymcfYt9bX5dSa5Mk7OfPtScfA9dcEYm3Z__nQnzbk) Thanks, Derek Schmidt | |

The veto-proof bipartisan support for this bill in the Legislature demonstrated its importan Friend, My bill to ban sanctuary cities in Kansas has become law. The veto-proof bipartisan support for this bill in the Legislature demonstrated its importance, particularly as the Biden administration continues its tragic failure to secure our southern border. Every day, that failure jeopardizes public safety in our Kansas communities. And the crisis is only going to get worse as the Biden administration prepares to end “Title 42” public health restrictions on who can enter our country. Biden’s own Department of Homeland Security is projected to deal with as many as 18,000 border apprehensions per day once the restrictions are lifted. That would amount to more than half a million apprehensions a month – more than double the already record-high apprehensions we saw last year. Such a massive influx of people only makes it easier for criminal activity to make its way across the border and into our communities undetected. This crisis has turned every state into a border state. Kansas saw a 54% increase in drug overdoses during the early part of last year alone – mostly meth and fentanyl smuggled across America's unsecured southern border. This is a devastating public safety crisis, and law enforcement needs every tool at its disposal to combat it. Under this new law, Kansas law enforcement will be able to resume working professionally with federal immigration authorities as the needs of public safety requires and not be silenced by a patchwork of local “sanctuary city” gag orders. As your governor, I will always have the backs of our law enforcement and I will always put public safety first. And you can count on this: I will continue to provide the leadership Kansas needs when important issues like this arise. If you’re already firmly committed to the team, send this email to family and friends who care about supporting law enforcement and keeping our community safe. Thanks, Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Caucus/Convention: What's That All About?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
The best campaigns start and end with community. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5f269fb88137/caucusconvention-whats-that-all-about?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=bb47635c5a&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends,

**Campaigns aren't just about elections. **

In all of the campaigns I've been a part of, one thing stands out; **the best campaigns start and end with community.

Campaigns have a real impact.** The best candidates will continue supporting their communities long after election day, and in preparation for the Republican primary, I want to reinforce a commitment I've made to _my_ community.

#TeamBecky stands behind the **importance of civic engagement.** Political history, civics, and supporting accessible information are **critical components of our democracy,** and promoting **civic engagement for all is a commitment our campaign will make time and time again. **

So, for the next ten weeks, our Monday newsletters will be sharing**political facts, lost history, and ways to engage with local and national politics.**
---
|
# **Caucus/Convention: What's that all about? **

Utah's nomination process is one of the country's **most unique systems,** with one of the highest barriers to the nomination, but what does that mean?

**Here are the facts:** In a caucus/convention system, party members elect precinct officers, county delegates, and state delegates at neighborhood caucus meetings. Later, at the state convention, delegates vote to nominate their candidate. To earn the nomination at convention, **candidates need at least 60% of the delegate vote,** but those earning at least **40% of the delegate vote** will proceed to a primary election.

The caucus system can be traced back as far as 1796. The Democratic-Republican and Federalist parties held informal caucuses to discuss who their party would nominate to replace George Washington. Now, **just seven states use conventions** in their nomination process, and just two use conventions alone to determine statewide and legislative nominees—**Utah is one.**

For 20th-Century Utahns, the caucus/convention system was an important tool in **bridging the gap between historically segregated groups.** Across party lines, Utahn's convention system allowed thought-leaders, activists, and community members to gather in support of better governance.

In July 1904, in Salt Lake City, two months after the state Utah Republican convention, Elizabeth Taylor called on women across the west to form the **Western Federation of Colored Women**. This first convention, held in the Salt Lake City Council Chamber, **elected women of color to leadership positions through delegate votes.** As the Federation president, Elizabeth Taylor brought delegates together to discuss the**social and economic issues facing their communities. **
---
|
---
Elizabeth Taylor, August 4, 1900, University of Utah Marriott Library Special Collections
|
---
_Colored Women Hold Convention, _Salt Lake Herald Republican, July 6th, 1904. Digitized by J. Willard Marriott Library, University of Utah
| These days, the caucus/convention system is a **stronghold of Utah politics.** Convention delegates are some of the nation's **most committed and engaged citizens,** spending hours meeting and vetting candidates. Despite its controversy, the caucus/convention system has a **rich history and a bright future.** If you aren't a delegate this year, I**hope you'll consider participating in our next election cycle.** If you are one of this year's delegates, congratulations! **Thank you for your choice to support our caucus/convention system.**

The state Republican convention is just**TWO WEEKS** away. On April 23rd, we get to see our nomination system in action, and I hope you will join us to **discuss, learn, and engage with this year's candidates.** See you there!

As always,**thank you for your support**. Fill out our survey below to**help us share more of what's important to YOU,** and** ** check back next week to find out if your piece of political history made it into the newsletter.
---

name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: FWD: If you believe in me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I promise to never tire in my fight for a better and safer Florida
Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw my last message. I hope you took a moment to give it a read and learned about who I am, where I come from and what running for Senate means to me.
---
**I promise to _never_ tire in my fight for a better and safer Florida, but the GOP has already poured _millions_ into the state to keep it permanently red. We're gaining ground and we can win – but in a race this tight, it’ll all come down to resources. So please:**
**[_If you believe in me and my story, will you join our grassroots movement today? Chip in $5 or more to help defeat Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44062944/339929105/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2852-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTNkOWQ0Zi1hNmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KASPRKUC8ORHOP5thcMeEA-tDOSfYGOZl-SoOA1e3M=)**
Thank you,

Val Demings
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Demings, Val**
Subject: this campaign means so much
| | |
---
Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and tell you why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read.
I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've _got_ to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked _hard._ And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had _faith. _I've carried that spirit with me my entire career.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44062945/339929106/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2852-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTNkOWQ0Zi1hNmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KASPRKUC8ORHOP5thcMeEA-tDOSfYGOZl-SoOA1e3M=)
That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – _never_ tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community.
**[I will never tire of the opportunities to do good or the challenges to tackle before me, and I'm asking you to do the same. Pitch in a contribution of $5 or more before my midnight deadline to help me defeat Marco Rubio, win in Florida and defend our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44062946/339929107/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2852-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTNkOWQ0Zi1hNmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KASPRKUC8ORHOP5thcMeEA-tDOSfYGOZl-SoOA1e3M=)**
_Never tire._ These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized.
_Never tire,_ I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I _never tire_ of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law.
This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians.** ****I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win.**
[**So I need your support, friend. This campaign is a battle of many things, and an unfortunate reality among them is** _resources._**The Republican Party is already proving they will spend whatever it takes to protect Marco Rubio, so if you're with me, if you want to elect Florida's first Black senator and defend our majority in the Senate, please donate $5 or whatever you can before my midnight deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44062947/339929108/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2852-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTNkOWQ0Zi1hNmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5KASPRKUC8ORHOP5thcMeEA-tDOSfYGOZl-SoOA1e3M=)
Thank you for being in this with me. _Never tire._

Val Demings

clean_body: I promise to never tire in my fight for a better and safer Florida Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw my last message. I hope you took a moment to give it a read and learned about who I am, where I come from and what running for Senate means to me. I promise to never tire in my fight for a better and safer Florida, but the GOP has already poured millions into the state to keep it permanently red. We're gaining ground and we can win – but in a race this tight, it’ll all come down to resources. So please: = Thank you, Val Demings \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Demings, Val Subject: this campaign means so much | | | Friend: This is a longer and especially important email about why I'm running for Senate. It's important for me to share my story with you and tell you why this campaign means so much to me. I hope you'll give it a read. I was raised in Jacksonville, Florida – and I've got to say, when you grow up in the South poor, Black and female, you've got to have faith. It's something I learned from my parents. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and my goodness they worked hard. And although we didn't have a lot of money – although life was tough sometimes – we had each other. We had love. We had faith. I've carried that spirit with me my entire career. = That faith that things can get better, that we can do some good in the world, inspired me to get into public service. In fact, my mom used to say to me, "Never grow tired of doing good, Val – never tire." And so for me, growing tired was never an option. It's what pushed me to become the first in my family to graduate college. It's also what pushed me to serve 27 years in the Orlando Police Department, where eventually I became the first woman to lead the department. And it pushed me to run for Congress and represent my community. = Never tire. These are the words that resonate in my mind each and every day that I serve the people of Florida's 10th District in Congress. They've stuck with me as I've fought to put an end to gun violence, especially as the horror of that violence struck our district at Pulse Nightclub in Orlando. We mourned, deeply. But we resolved to fight for change, to never tire – and I won't stop until long-overdue action on gun violence is finally realized. Never tire, I said to myself as I took on a habitual offender who occupied the most powerful office in the world: President Donald Trump. Unlike some in Washington, I never tire of standing up for what I believe is right, and I carried that with me as I fought to impeach him, because no one is above the law. This is my story, friend: Only in America can a little Black girl, the daughter of a maid and a janitor growing up in the South in the '60s, have a story so filled with opportunities like these. Now, I'm ready to meet a new moment, to do more good for Floridians. I am ready to be the next U.S. senator for Florida – and together, with you never tiring alongside me, I know we can win. = Thank you for being in this with me. Never tire. Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

name: =?utf-8?Q?Emily=20Beach?=
subject: Working for our kids’ future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Beach for Congress
body:
#ElectMoreMoms | | | | [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=96cdaefcc9&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | | Peter,

As the mother of two teenagers, I understand what it takes to go to work every day, fight for pay equity, manage a household, and meet a family budget in one of the most expensive regions of the country. **I know what it feels like to worry about my kids’ future, their safety, their mental health, and the planet we are leaving them.**[That’s why when I get to Congress, I’ll be fighting for working families, common sense gun control, mental health funding, education, and climate action.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=6ac8322519&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=1d2bfbefe6&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| Working families across the country are facing serious challenges – the rising cost of living, lack of affordable housing options, a national mental health crisis, and the threat of gun violence to name a few. But despite this, only 6% of Congress are moms with children under the age of 18. **The truth is we need more parents and moms in Congress to fight for solutions that work for our working families. **

[Will you make a contribution to support my campaign today so we can elect more moms to Congress?](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=7b1677f271&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| Onward–

Emily Beach
---
| P.S. Looking for a way to get some exercise outdoors and give back to your community? Join Team Beach to knock on doors in your own neighborhood! It’s one of the most impactful ways you can volunteer. **Email our Campaign Manager Andrew Comstock ([andrew@emilybeachforcongress.com](mailto:andrew@emilybeachforcongress.com)) today and he will send you everything you need to tell voters about why you support our campaign! **

clean_body: #ElectMoreMoms | | | | | | | Peter, As the mother of two teenagers, I understand what it takes to go to work every day, fight for pay equity, manage a household, and meet a family budget in one of the most expensive regions of the country. I know what it feels like to worry about my kids’ future, their safety, their mental health, and the planet we are leaving them. | | Working families across the country are facing serious challenges – the rising cost of living, lack of affordable housing options, a national mental health crisis, and the threat of gun violence to name a few. But despite this, only 6% of Congress are moms with children under the age of 18. The truth is we need more parents and moms in Congress to fight for solutions that work for our working families. | Onward– Emily Beach | P.S. Looking for a way to get some exercise outdoors and give back to your community? Join Team Beach to knock on doors in your own neighborhood! It’s one of the most impactful ways you can volunteer. Email our Campaign Manager Andrew Comstock (mailto:andrew@emilybeachforcongress.com) today and he will send you everything you need to tell voters about why you support our campaign! | "Donate" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Emily Beach for Congress 20 Park Road, Suite E Burlingame, CA 94010 For more information, please contact: hello@emilybeachforcongress.com 650-318-1204 Want to change how you receive these emails? subject: Senator Mike Lee Endorses Bryce Reeves
disclaimer_text: Paid For by Reeves for Congress
body:
Senator Mike Lee Endorses Bryce Reeves
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/010001801eda5e65-3c319d29-3208-4f73-9655-c56b8fcb9381-000000/u9ss443nf_siN85sJ2BKvm_1WpU=266)
---
|
---
| Senator Mike Lee Endorses Bryce Reeves
---
|
---
| | |
---
| I'm so excited to announce that Senator Mike Lee of Utah, a conservative lion in the US Senate, is joining our team. It's an absolute honor to have the endorsement of one of the most Constitutionally-minded leaders in the country. Senator Lee knows how important winning the 7th Congressional District is. Two years ago he joined me at an early voting rally here and helped the Republican ticket win in Spotsylvania. In the new version of the 7th District, where I already represent over 20% of the voters, I am clearly the best positioned to defeat Abigail Spanberger in November.
---
| | |
---
| Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's agenda is dangerous to our country. I'm ready to be a Day One leader in Congress. As someone who already has extensive experience getting strong conservative legislation passed under Democrats, I won't need training wheels or warm ups when I get elected in November. Senator Mike Lee understands this, and that's why he is joining our campaign. [Can we count on you joining as well?](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.brycereeves.com%2Fvolunteer%2F/1/010001801eda5e65-3c319d29-3208-4f73-9655-c56b8fcb9381-000000/SeRdabtLI6Xsl8PMJG_IsklPtIY=266) Sincerely,Bryce Reeves

name: Sinema HQ
subject: Call on Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
In addition to rising prices for everyday essentials like gas and groceries, we’re also seeing higher costs and long delays for the personal electronic devices we depend on every day. That’s in part due to a semiconductor shortage. **Semiconductors are small computer parts found in all our electronic devices, including cars, computers, and phones. While we might not think about them very often, they’re critical to our daily lives.** Sadly, over the last several decades, America’s domestic semiconductor manufacturing has declined. We’re continuing our work in the Senate to rebuild America’s semiconductor manufacturing by working to pass the _America COMPETES Act_. Our bill will create new, high-paying jobs in Arizona and across the country, while helping to bring down costs for essential electronic devices like phones, computers, and cars. Kyrsten is working hard to grow America’s semiconductor manufacturing and ensure our country continues to lead in innovation. [**Team, if you support our work to restore America’s semiconductor industry, create new, high-paying jobs, and bring down costs for everyday Americans, please add your name to call on Congress to pass the _America COMPETES Act_ >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44056147/339896578/-1829978?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220412_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGU1Mzc0Yy04N2JhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IuYyCjYYxSFa7V9p3213AeIbq2Sn25MdBg4_Mgfz-ls=&emci=fae4374c-87ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=04e5374c-87ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44056148/339896579/-1829978?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220412_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNGU1Mzc0Yy04N2JhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IuYyCjYYxSFa7V9p3213AeIbq2Sn25MdBg4_Mgfz-ls=&emci=fae4374c-87ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=04e5374c-87ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2415496)

clean_body: | In addition to rising prices for everyday essentials like gas and groceries, we’re also seeing higher costs and long delays for the personal electronic devices we depend on every day. That’s in part due to a semiconductor shortage. Semiconductors are small computer parts found in all our electronic devices, including cars, computers, and phones. While we might not think about them very often, they’re critical to our daily lives. Sadly, over the last several decades, America’s domestic semiconductor manufacturing has declined. We’re continuing our work in the Senate to rebuild America’s semiconductor manufacturing by working to pass the America COMPETES Act. Our bill will create new, high-paying jobs in Arizona and across the country, while helping to bring down costs for essential electronic devices like phones, computers, and cars. Kyrsten is working hard to grow America’s semiconductor manufacturing and ensure our country continues to lead in innovation. | Thanks for standing with us. — Sinema HQ Sinema for Arizona P.O. Box 7586 Phoenix, AZ 85011-7586 United States | mailto:info@kyrstensinema.com | | Paid for by Sinema for Arizona

| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8538?t=6&akid=1808%2E878179%2Exy5gsv) Hey there,

April 13th marks our pre-primary FEC filing deadline. Everything we do between now and the deadline is so important, so I hope you'll give me the chance to explain why.

**You see, all of our numbers will be made public for the last time before the general election kicks off in earnest, including the amount of money we raised and the number of people who have pitched in to support our campaign.**

You can bet Mitch McConnell's super PAC and the Republican dark money network will pore over this report, looking at our numbers for any sign of weakness.

Our fundraising has significantly slowed this month, which means reaching our goal before the FEC deadline will be a challenge--and we're still behind. I know we can get there if everyone pitches in. [**So I 'm asking, will you split a donation of $10 or more between my campaign and Voter Protection Project before our most important FEC deadline yet? Every contribution will make a difference:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8538?t=7&akid=1808%2E878179%2Exy5gsv) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8539?t=8&akid=1808%2E878179%2Exy5gsv)

# Peter,

Today is a historic day in Oklahoma and all across our country... My bill to ban abortion starting at conception (SB 612) was officially signed into law today by Oklahoma's most Pro-Life Governor, Kevin Stitt. I am honored to be a part of the process that will serve to save the lives of millions of unborn babies in Oklahoma's future. Beginning in August, abortion will be a felony. Anyone who murders the life of an unborn baby in Oklahoma will be subject to a $100,000 fine and 10 years in prison. [Click here to support my campaign so we can take our fight to ban abortion to the United States Senate >>>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Ctc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VVt6Jn1hJn86W2-ZDJ09l1W53W8yJSQm4HQ7vNN3tskDZ3lLBmV1-WJV7CgD0pW32DLbK5lzhkQW1z56Yq2lk-SHW3M1f622zCyFMW5TmLY28yZCB2W3Xvgbf3j018vVvmvlm6ZrthkW5_tV0j5txq_KW6kqF304nrDdFW8qw-Yy7GcvhPVYBmHv2C-Z4mW1LT_3863RQGnW1YDHKg4LGQ-0W970gbR1gKhKXW97-12P5x_CH1W6JJ3PX2RcLSnW6Q1Z5m2CnvlpW5-H13N9lV8MhW3GWJ_N1VrGflW7x0J3C2V4JJ8W2nT31M7xB4JXW292hqY1XfSTjW5_WpBJ2Z0QpY3gz11)

I authored SB 612 because the sole purpose of the government is to protect life, liberty, and property. _Roe v. Wade_ was a mistake, but our elected officials in Washington REFUSE to right their wrongs in fear of the political blowback from the woke mainstream media and radical leftist elites. Absent federal action, I knew that it was my responsibility as an elected leader to take on the fight to protect the lives of the unborn here in Oklahoma. My bill is the most Pro-Life bill in the country and prohibits ALL abortion, with the only exception being to protect the life of the mother. It's time for a nationwide ban on abortion, Peter. I'm running for the US Senate to protect the lives of the unborn all across our country. Select an option below to help me take our fight to Washington. clean_body: Peter, beginning in August, abortion will be a felony. Anyone who murders the life of an unborn baby in Oklahoma will be subject to a $100,000... | Peter, Today is a historic day in Oklahoma and all across our country... My bill to ban abortion starting at conception (SB 612) was officially signed into law today by Oklahoma's most Pro-Life Governor, Kevin Stitt. I am honored to be a part of the process that will serve to save the lives of millions of unborn babies in Oklahoma's future. Beginning in August, abortion will be a felony. Anyone who murders the life of an unborn baby in Oklahoma will be subject to a $100,000 fine and 10 years in prison. I authored SB 612 because the sole purpose of the government is to protect life, liberty, and property. Roe v. Wade was a mistake, but our elected officials in Washington REFUSE to right their wrongs in fear of the political blowback from the woke mainstream media and radical leftist elites. Absent federal action, I knew that it was my responsibility as an elected leader to take on the fight to protect the lives of the unborn here in Oklahoma. My bill is the most Pro-Life bill in the country and prohibits ALL abortion, with the only exception being to protect the life of the mother. It's time for a nationwide ban on abortion, Peter. I'm running for the US Senate to protect the lives of the unborn all across our country. Select an option below to help me take our fight to Washington. Every liberal news media outlet came out against our bill. Every woke politician, including Kamala Harris, attacked us for defending the lives of the unborn. They are prepared to do whatever it takes to stop our Pro-Life movement from coming to Washington. They will spend massive amounts of money in this race against me to protect their radical agenda. We're not going to let that happen, Peter. My record in Oklahoma proves that I'm willing to stand up against the corrupt establishment and do what's right for Oklahoma. With your support, we will overturn Roe v. Wade with legislation that protects the lives of the unborn all across the country. We will serve as a voice for the voiceless and end the immoral practice of abortion once and for all. Senator Nathan Dahm Candidate for United States Senate Personal cell number: (918) 615-2335 | | Nathan Dahm, PO Box 2323, Broken Arrow, Oklahoma 74013

Despite not being on the ballot this year, Donald Trump remains the highest-totaling fundraiser of the GOP.

This means that not only is he getting ready to mount yet another buffoonish presidential campaign in 2024, but that he and his fascist friends will stop at nothing to boost extremist right-wing candidates to influence the outcome of the midterm elections with shady money.

Members of Donald Trump's mailing list are told that "sinister forces [Democrats] are destroying our nation" and that “it’s so sad to see what happened to our great USA.” But we know who the true sinister forces hell-bent on destroying our democracy are: **Donald Trump and the Treason Caucus.**

We are working day and night to unseat these dangerous elected officials, but to do that, we're going to need all the support we can get to face off against the Treason Caucus's Trump money.

America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

body:
We need every resource we have to register voters right now.
We need every resource we have to register voters right now.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44056809/339899742/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220412VoterReg1_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkZDI2MDYxLThhYmEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FVkS7z57CNdp5dNtPslRIUEZLnmIj_kOYAsilwl97ks=)
Fellow activist,

We are two weeks from a critical deadline. May 2 is the last day to register to vote in order to vote in the May 17 primary. That means it’s all-hands-on-deck right now. [**If you want to skip this entire email, would you consider giving a small $5 recurring donation right now to not only get us through May but through November? →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44056811/339899743/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220412VoterReg1_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&amount=5;&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkZDI2MDYxLThhYmEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FVkS7z57CNdp5dNtPslRIUEZLnmIj_kOYAsilwl97ks=)
**[DONATE $5 MONTHLY NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44056812/339899745/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220412VoterReg1_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_B1&amount=5&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkZDI2MDYxLThhYmEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FVkS7z57CNdp5dNtPslRIUEZLnmIj_kOYAsilwl97ks=) **
Your sustaining contribution will power the work we do. That means registering as many voters as possible by May 2.

It’s not always obvious why sustained support like this is so important, so we want to share three ways monthly donations are critical to helping us reach our goals:
1. **Monthly contributions ensure our work for the long haul.** The combined work of educating, registering, and mobilizing voters is a serious, difficult, and long process. This work is never over, and that means fundraising is never over. Your donation each month helps us stay on track to protect our democracy.
2. **Monthly contributions support rapid responses. With May 2 just around the corner, our organization is at high risk of being attacked.** Special interest groups don’t like what we’re doing, so we have to be ready to respond quickly. Since we never know when an attack will come, we have to be ready, and your donation helps us mobilize quickly.
3. **Monthly contributions are more cost-effective.** Your dollar goes further with a recurring gift, and that means more of your money goes directly to serving communities, registering voters, and creating a better future for Pennsylvania.

It's never been more important that we keep up our momentum and use every resource we have to execute the efforts of our program strategically and efficiently. We need your help to do that.

[**The amount is up to you, but even $3, $5, or $10 will make a huge difference in these final days towards our goal of registering 50,000 new voters in 2022. What do you say?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44056814/339899747/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220412VoterReg1_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_L2&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkZDI2MDYxLThhYmEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FVkS7z57CNdp5dNtPslRIUEZLnmIj_kOYAsilwl97ks=)

Until the change is real,

Team NPP
_The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election._ **_[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44056816/339899749/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220412VoterReg1_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkZDI2MDYxLThhYmEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FVkS7z57CNdp5dNtPslRIUEZLnmIj_kOYAsilwl97ks=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44056820/339899750/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220412VoterReg1_VR_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_N_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZkZDI2MDYxLThhYmEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FVkS7z57CNdp5dNtPslRIUEZLnmIj_kOYAsilwl97ks=)**_**

clean_body: We need every resource we have to register voters right now. We need every resource we have to register voters right now. = Fellow activist, We are two weeks from a critical deadline. May 2 is the last day to register to vote in order to vote in the May 17 primary. That means it’s all-hands-on-deck right now. = = Your sustaining contribution will power the work we do. That means registering as many voters as possible by May 2. It’s not always obvious why sustained support like this is so important, so we want to share three ways monthly donations are critical to helping us reach our goals: 1. Monthly contributions ensure our work for the long haul. The combined work of educating, registering, and mobilizing voters is a serious, difficult, and long process. This work is never over, and that means fundraising is never over. Your donation each month helps us stay on track to protect our democracy. 2. Monthly contributions support rapid responses. With May 2 just around the corner, our organization is at high risk of being attacked. Special interest groups don’t like what we’re doing, so we have to be ready to respond quickly. Since we never know when an attack will come, we have to be ready, and your donation helps us mobilize quickly. 3. Monthly contributions are more cost-effective. Your dollar goes further with a recurring gift, and that means more of your money goes directly to serving communities, registering voters, and creating a better future for Pennsylvania. It's never been more important that we keep up our momentum and use every resource we have to execute the efforts of our program strategically and efficiently. We need your help to do that. = Until the change is real, Team NPP The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented communities of color and immigrant communities. We will register them to vote, provide education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize people to vote in every election. = **PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 17, 2022 GENERAL: November 8, 2022 || || || New Pennsylvania Project 717 Market Street #295 Lemoyne, PA 17043 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. Electing a Democrat to represent Nebraskans living in the Second Congressional District will be as difficult as it is important.
**[That is why I am enthusiastically supporting Tony Vargas. Not only do I believe he can win, I believe he should.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44057564/339902562/1129282168?refcode=20220412_em_fr_b1_kerrey_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjU5MDIwZS04YmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MejVJT1tRXmWO7zrL105q8Tfp9OqKaAoM3Tm3DvnK2w=)**
[**_So, I’m proud to throw my support behind Tony, but it’s going to take all of us banding together for him to win this critical race. I’ll explain how your donation will have a huge impact, but please chip in $15 now. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44057565/339902563/1129282168?refcode=20220412_em_fr_b1_kerrey_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjU5MDIwZS04YmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MejVJT1tRXmWO7zrL105q8Tfp9OqKaAoM3Tm3DvnK2w=)
He is off to a good start and President Biden’s victory in the Second Congressional District should give us confidence. But no one should doubt that this is going to be a battle of inches.
Tony is running in one of the most competitive races in the entire country.
To win a close race like this, Tony has to outwork and outraise the incumbent every step of the way.
You know that incumbents have a big fundraising advantage especially with corporate PACs.
We have to show voters that we are committed to victory. To win Tony needs our help. He will need to pay for ads, mail pieces, and voter outreach to win this race.
I hope you will help. There is no such thing as a small donation. Every dollar matters.
[**_I promised him I’d help him raise $8,000 by midnight, so I’m reaching out to his top supporters to ask: Will you join me in supporting Tony and chip in $15 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44057566/339902564/1129282168?refcode=20220412_em_fr_b1_kerrey_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjU5MDIwZS04YmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MejVJT1tRXmWO7zrL105q8Tfp9OqKaAoM3Tm3DvnK2w=)

Thank you,

**Bob Kerrey**
_Former US Senator for Nebraska
Former Governor of Nebraska_

Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund.

Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. clean_body: I know a thing or two about tough races. | | | | = | = = ---|--- Electing a Democrat to represent Nebraskans living in the Second Congressional District will be as difficult as it is important. = = He is off to a good start and President Biden’s victory in the Second Congressional District should give us confidence. But no one should doubt that this is going to be a battle of inches. Tony is running in one of the most competitive races in the entire country. To win a close race like this, Tony has to outwork and outraise the incumbent every step of the way. You know that incumbents have a big fundraising advantage especially with corporate PACs. We have to show voters that we are committed to victory. To win Tony needs our help. He will need to pay for ads, mail pieces, and voter outreach to win this race. I hope you will help. There is no such thing as a small donation. Every dollar matters. = Thank you, Bob Kerrey Former US Senator for Nebraska Former Governor of Nebraska | Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon. This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream. This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue. Tony is proud to be endorsed by 314 Action Fund, BOLD Democrats, and Latino Victory Fund. Email is the best way for Tony to keep his supporters up-to-date with happenings from the campaign trail. We know we send a lot of fundraising emails -- but that’s because his campaign is fueled by grassroots donations from folks like you. = If you only want to receive our most important emails, click . name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Mullin?=
subject: Tackling the Climate Crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=9703a3c2b6&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | Peter,

I don’t have to remind you that climate change is already taking a toll on our daily lives and imperiling the future of our children and the planet. From hotter temperatures to sea level rise and wildfires, we’re seeing and feeling the terrifying effects of a warming planet – **and it’s time for Congress to step up and make a real difference.**

As the second-ranking member of the Assembly, I’ve been a leader on climate, because as the father of young twin sons, it’s incredibly important to me that we leave a cleaner and healthier planet for all our children. I created the OneShoreline initiative for San Mateo County, bringing all levels of government together to fight sea level rise. And I passed the largest climate action package in California history, a massive $15 billion investment to tackle wildfires, droughts, sea level rise, and carbon emissions. Those are tangible results you can see that are making a genuine difference.

**That’s why I won the hugely sought after endorsement of Sacramento’s top climate advocate, Senator Josh Becker, along with over 100 federal, state, and local leaders including Congresswoman Jackie Speier.**

Together, we’ve made California the national leader on climate change. And I’m just getting started. In Congress, I’ll fight even harder to make sure the rest of the nation follows California’s lead, and keep up the fight for bold climate action.

Thank you as always for your support,

Kevin Mullin

[**P.S.: Our campaign is powered by grassroots contributions from climate advocates and supporters like you, Peter. Would you please chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to keep our movement going strong?**](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=6c7b60b361&e=292fde286a)

Are you ready to change that? resident.**](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=d25239b58653496b818ed062157c3924&_e=iJXdzo-IacBRrl-rZ7Kl_y21qD3g5OeFvPm0YIQx8sfrHkFzivN5xkmVwvntkuRdTQezxIH7Qf6hxF-jB9NGWYDt0LgPZG9g9pkU-THLrew5Yphfy7CYcv8EfjUJeg8XBpMbYhtbBXFYGdgDty_o3kfWQsQe9bgh1uYvGoCPBj7yp9rrnXSpn5vKY1i9DMYXc_54x4ILAAX3JGaurFJG3sA4eG3mdYaf7JBUq9Qdxwj4tcAsfMylOSmcF-mdufYkQJzKO9xrxh8RHnhh2ow18XTB36M9rYh4b2NHZ8FQwSGfssAgWOWFrWPo_PWpxbpTvOmOsxNY8PHUSJjqGoXfTg%3D%3D) I love our state, but there is one question I can't figure out: _Why isn't Florida a Constitutional Carry state yet?_ **I'm curious —[ _Do you want Florida to be the newest Constitutional Carry state?_](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=d25239b58653496b818ed062157c3924&_e=iJXdzo-IacBRrl-rZ7Kl_y21qD3g5OeFvPm0YIQx8sfrHkFzivN5xkmVwvntkuRdTQezxIH7Qf6hxF-jB9NGWYDt0LgPZG9g9pkU-THLrew5Yphfy7CYcv8EfjUJeg8X0jQnz_exmFJzvXMgylRIkPnJ8dDLFKCAHGCORQbrGWkbARYGTiY1caX65pHqy4XDy_6Ozp04VJWZ-eqjvUKy8IBE-MYsd7rQMafUEkSOpidP3_Y_ADQeqbFP6S7RgYJOURdjjp_WxgQnPy_hhange7WBCPU4yybUl53EO4Zxu21Q7sfVnY7BrvmOkel2i64dgVf3gc1JDqXYQJ7G4kHsCA%3D%3D)** [**YES!**](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=d25239b58653496b818ed062157c3924&_e=iJXdzo-IacBRrl-rZ7Kl_y21qD3g5OeFvPm0YIQx8sfrHkFzivN5xkmVwvntkuRdTQezxIH7Qf6hxF-jB9NGWYDt0LgPZG9g9pkU-THLrew5Yphfy7CYcv8EfjUJeg8X3kaGH0x_9AhCHEuKJXLHLF7WIrgVs-nNdRgvdKwcS93rywU3HW09mt64nMcYqRqBPxqce2vzNQe2qOOYEVsygYKNVAPLmB4PqDvCiyTa56ntlovMe1h9RADGJycnWr5zpT7j057-wFita3jN2FOeKE8UEl-7q2SOseI92dZUT3FgfbptflR3drlRZ67tyl23-fdsfh1jJhSC6x4WKWEnRQ%3D%3D) [**NO!**](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=d25239b58653496b818ed062157c3924&_e=iJXdzo-IacBRrl-rZ7Kl_y21qD3g5OeFvPm0YIQx8sfrHkFzivN5xkmVwvntkuRdTQezxIH7Qf6hxF-jB9NGWYDt0LgPZG9g9pkU-THLrew5Yphfy7CYcv8EfjUJeg8Xat71oHYadz38M1_f5x4JLzhx14PeA_YQnnWMZ4v07-YK7AF1ccd727uSUDtN3Brg8SDm01uBfHhYEPKHVLEqzL8Tm3a_-Smr5CGi8XHUIZPrVAtlcr1DIgLdn1ajH1phthhno_SFxa-g6TDjk0Fc3Gl-hR7lo7iaSd5M2tjs2Wdrp7GUB3aLuawDN2jIVcg85E5iGht-MVtjkY-dtpwKig%3D%3D) As a strong supporter of our Constitution and the right to keep and bear arms, I _UNEQUIVOCALLY_ will defend and protect our 2nd Amendment in Congress. Florida, despite being the freest state in the country, still doesn't have Constitutional Carry, and _if you ask me_ , it's time we change that. 24 states have approved Constitutional Carry, and with your support Florida will become the 25th. [_**Do you agree with me? subject: re: Clarence Thomas
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# POLL: Do you think Congress should impeach Justice Clarence Thomas?
---
| | | | [YES >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdb924aa3-f6b9-4fe4-b404-58cdece33057/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [NO >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T206fe9e6-21b2-4a91-b8e6-dbe8db91555e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f692c1c-650c-4bad-9624-214533b6abb5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Recent bombshell reports revealed that Ginni Thomas, wife of Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas, exchanged texts with Trump’s former Chief of Staff Mark Meadows, urging him to keep fighting to overturn the 2020 election results. She also attended Trump’s “Stop the Steal” rally on January 6th. This is a massive conflict of interest for Clarence Thomas – he could decide on cases related to January 6th and rule in favor of protecting his wife! In fact, he was the only dissenting Justice in the case that released Trump’s records to the January 6th Committee. Clarence and Ginni Thomas’ behavior raises huge moral and ethical concerns – we can’t have a sitting Supreme Court Justice actively undermining our democracy. That’s why some are calling for Justice Thomas to be impeached – but we want to know what you think about this controversial idea. Should Congress impeach Justice Clarence Thomas?
---
| | | | [YES >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T83dcc7d7-5062-43f8-a99b-198083d436d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [NO >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb0046b01-107d-4f56-a0f3-afaa9ed9a044/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | Hey Peter, The new 11th is one of the most Democratic districts in Michigan — and Andy’s running for reelection here to make sure we have a member of Congress who reflects our values. **Progressive Democrats like Andy have led the way on President Biden’s agenda** to tackle climate change, to reform our criminal justice system — including ending qualified immunity — to ensure universal childcare and paid family leave, and to guarantee free community college. But conservative Democrats like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema have blocked our progress. And right now, Andy’s tied with our conservative Democratic opponent in the primary. [_**Chip in $10 or any amount today to help reelect Andy and keep our progressive values as strong as possible in Washington.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44058026/339904918/478999150?refcode=em_20220412_f_t_agenda&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2MxOWUzMS04ZGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqE50GitzDfhsnGqO-tG9Vd6Ny_iZclZfblEi1qO3i0=) We’re building a broad-based, grassroots-funded campaign — the most common contribution amount is $10. But Andy’s opponent is mostly funded by a single special interest group — the same organization that is funding insurrection-friendly House Republicans like Jim Jordan, Ronnie Jackson, and Scott Perry. And our opponent just dismissed the progressive values Andy is fighting for as “pie in the sky.” Really? Shouldn’t we keep pushing for big, necessary ideas like universal health care and a livable planet? Andy’s going to keep up the fight — while also continuing to deliver immediate results. He’s already helped lead the way on lower health insurance premiums for Michigan families, and he’s written bill after bill to make the promise of the Green New Deal a reality. **Andy’s the effective, progressive champion we need for the new 11th District.** [_**Let’s keep fighting by his side. Can you make a donation right now to help keep him in Washington?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44058027/339904919/478999150?refcode=em_20220412_f_t_agenda&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2MxOWUzMS04ZGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqE50GitzDfhsnGqO-tG9Vd6Ny_iZclZfblEi1qO3i0=) Thanks, Team Levin

Friends,

This month is a _make-or-break for my entire campaign_.

So much is riding on us making our April fundraising goal. This is absolutely not a drill. This is the **last full month** of fundraising we have before the May 24th primary election.

We can’t slow down at this point, and we need to crank the heat up. We can’t let Career Politicians win this race. Alabama deserves better.

HAS OFFERED 500% MATCHING!](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=d79167fce12a4db3ac1809e5845197c8&_e=rgh_aNxYPLrNVHEhamRc2vJgZpPUrB3yN3vy-z1cJciVCvLNxu1oZto-R_xgKFetslD-TS5QmRtqWuqjFRoZJV1HIP1SbX54snaZmBrUwKXFxwwXTULzUHpYlhzEcr5yiTZKn3ZR9N-52akcyQM8bofT8-6g7QZH9Q0OF2gLGp_Xd3O4wxQK11rVXNRPmyHXCl5DCdInij2BRGK54Fx0ft-P-megLiJq3vdPoEN5UJjCcm9MSACUC9jg1sDkRXdH4oXpi5Ff13LK-eOK_SyrHWgkAP5n2X30R9_DZprxaWNxGZF2Vu0vC4VX8THjp2FaO_FjX8L6q408sYIthQjN9QUsFG1QT79sHR5GdwtTFR_Bpi2krKSKnaOBfF0d_7nA9O-DdJhxDCe88_a5PBNeD_qFFMF0KfZoldNo8JfAMZlrX7mOw4Nva4rafwplM_fNzE7fobxxExCBoMe1eVUd6wLA_gqjpz7mppl2qGHN8ys1Rpf8zBYgjd-TWUT_wH8gla9-TI1vTIaBwBkSfHrhyQ%3D%3D)_** [ ](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=d79167fce12a4db3ac1809e5845197c8&_e=rgh_aNxYPLrNVHEhamRc2vJgZpPUrB3yN3vy-z1cJciVCvLNxu1oZto-R_xgKFetslD-TS5QmRtqWuqjFRoZJV1HIP1SbX54snaZmBrUwKXFxwwXTULzUHpYlhzEcr5yiTZKn3ZR9N-52akcyQM8bofT8-6g7QZH9Q0OF2gLGp_Xd3O4wxQK11rVXNRPmyHXCl5DCdInij2BRGK54Fx0ft-P-megLiJq3vdPoEN5UJjCcm9MSACUC9jg1sDkRXdH4oXpi5Ff13LK-eOK_SyrHWgkAP5n2X30R9_DZprxaWNxGZF2Vu0vC4VX8THjp2FaH20f_vqangyG-C_ZsEnhieHuoAaKAWap67yJ7Uw5GZPK6kbBVpEbKC0FTeNkZUiUCXiGe4t8EkrMBsL5AbvpeHcbL-xmSbYCww-4M_NkwyLq7UYwBKnmdtdhNrFxhGJTf87Gz76401chPq3iwiorBF6wvfXezk0XxgEN5IAWeEMbCRxa8xwlMArEYqSOe1_AQbI4YfiykL6YX3-K1UrzhA%3D%3D) _Click or scan to activate this offer._

Peter, **There’s a reason North Carolina is considered to be First in Freedom...**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8dfc2f299394500afb0d882946f7a58&_e=lSI9yLSE0v9Ot7LUfjmtJ-YxExACdvoIBLQKXXIcw6GdWLpVaAW6_PY9W1_mf80chw-xyal10TdQXQwUj5NHCgY5IeChrSvNoTE6-gGzHm-RDDHBYYn6kRQd6zCWdW0NEuBFixkY_sszljbJRx7PW5mcaxNBqMsV5eUSIoitxLImd9B0hmZObvzneGn-gU1WoHDnCRh98oRFu7DaqAKtbxblzIu-CyMjeVkJZ8gyPTJ9wx1ZxZbHpbeVEN30PviII3kyAcn5MGe069AbBrM33rb9itCn-wFysub8VW8FvRTsbK5NCqe-89ixvq3D9BaH8LJl5VTiXm87pR0PAMqorIabldcZS5tL4nPhrnS9plXQo4Zf-0wU33xcHzZDwwHXpCEkZ5gOSwo2VCGWo3rnUyoE5Xmdf5Ac5Q7sVv1MHiT8SgDYoKkUBHwD3uXfAt2S-jpI_muctbWWETzP-g3EfWFSkE_QUsm2nFn3ImPy573BtPpoITpVPfAEWbiy-3v5)
---
On April 12, 1776 – 246 years ago today – 83 delegates from North Carolina’s Fourth Provincial Congress gathered in Halifax. During their meeting, they passed a resolution, now known as the Halifax Resolves, calling for independence from Great Britain. The North Carolina delegation went to the Second Continental Congress in Philadelphia to form alliances with other colonies and vote for complete and total independence from Great Britain.
---
[**FIGHT FOR FREEDOM >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8dfc2f299394500afb0d882946f7a58&_e=lSI9yLSE0v9Ot7LUfjmtJ-YxExACdvoIBLQKXXIcw6GdWLpVaAW6_PY9W1_mf80chw-xyal10TdQXQwUj5NHCgY5IeChrSvNoTE6-gGzHm-RDDHBYYn6kRQd6zCWdW0NEuBFixkY_sszljbJRx7PW5mcaxNBqMsV5eUSIoitxLImd9B0hmZObvzneGn-gU1WoHDnCRh98oRFu7DaqAKtbxblzIu-CyMjeVkJZ8gyPTJ9wx1ZxZbHpbeVEN30PviII3kyAcn5MGe069AbBrM33rb9itCn-wFysub8VW8FvRRW3CHSZFuNze7ZpwOymegRRDU6OvmrqWRV7gx-VaMW84k_p-gxnDFqEdRpg9ANtevHM37cX_Ig7Nvf7OlZMqedhP_Ll2MtoODkq93ILJXmdKZ-wdtX6kl2pgXRTksiaF0VNxvanL6H0ExVsv9b64_aAsYa9XODh8IH3RsqCKXCIz6jAoQSfjqvagedvu4K01oz-0S0cukn9LlB61QRnIWu)
---
**The Halifax Resolves were the**** _very first_****colonial government to call for independence, which paved the path for the Declaration of Independence.** North Carolina’s history of being First in Freedom is why so many look to us to see if we’ll be the beacon of hope our country needs.
---
[**KEEP NORTH CAROLINA FIRST IN FREEDOM >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8dfc2f299394500afb0d882946f7a58&_e=lSI9yLSE0v9Ot7LUfjmtJ-YxExACdvoIBLQKXXIcw6GdWLpVaAW6_PY9W1_mf80chw-xyal10TdQXQwUj5NHCgY5IeChrSvNoTE6-gGzHm-RDDHBYYn6kRQd6zCWdW0NEuBFixkY_sszljbJRx7PW5mcaxNBqMsV5eUSIoitxLImd9B0hmZObvzneGn-gU1WoHDnCRh98oRFu7DaqAKtbxblzIu-CyMjeVkJZ8gyPTJ9wx1ZxZbHpbeVEN30PviII3kyAcn5MGe069AbBrM33rb9itCn-wFysub8VW8FvRQy1uIV79Z-ZZ2QaytAu5tDkRDzTGJxjKIauloIqdyUJkDWYX0d2dTUJcVor411LBSZ_z09gltQVBywLCs2dhumuqToGaK-CrYQ4Bd8G46LoS-BVoIOpuYZEWf6BLpp7LPwrbiCjdqvEhGzfP4gF-eJQJiiRJTeAUXKL__QRNjOiI1zT5hDgZz-oOuIdUuGWYXYBWJSbH9GeSd29HNWW5J0)
---
That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. **My name is Marjorie K. Eastman. I’m a veteran, military wife, mother, and businesswoman – and I’m running to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8dfc2f299394500afb0d882946f7a58&_e=lSI9yLSE0v9Ot7LUfjmtJ-YxExACdvoIBLQKXXIcw6GdWLpVaAW6_PY9W1_mf80chw-xyal10TdQXQwUj5NHCgY5IeChrSvNoTE6-gGzHm-RDDHBYYn6kRQd6zCWdW0NEuBFixkY_sszljbJRx7PW5mcaxNBqMsV5eUSIoitxLImd9B0hmZObvzneGn-gU1WoHDnCRh98oRFu7DaqAKtbxblzIu-CyMjeVkJZ8gyPTJ9wx1ZxZbHpbeVEN30PviII3kyAcn5MGe069AbBrM33rb9itCn-wFysub8VW8FvRS03WyOD8W4__rnaM5g2THYu20YydBiUh3Qnz1tFOf2pB6QBdrho19RipmfZis6j5r1iRHHMDV2mvZozbzsQ2_j4vLSWTVE_MEyqkSMN_cdHlhr-lIknIjuZ0tlEdXIE_msOWk8_z3RxQu_mS_FXTIDDfNbYYc1zCL2h4oc_30nnE7V3CIZoMTW0Sv0VLCNcm8uBWaJTKPObjEROzcqxmwE)

_When I look at the direction our country is heading in, I’m worried._ I’m concerned about career politicians’ inability to govern and protect our freedoms.
---
[**STAND WITH MARJORIE >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8dfc2f299394500afb0d882946f7a58&_e=lSI9yLSE0v9Ot7LUfjmtJ-YxExACdvoIBLQKXXIcw6GdWLpVaAW6_PY9W1_mf80chw-xyal10TdQXQwUj5NHCgY5IeChrSvNoTE6-gGzHm-RDDHBYYn6kRQd6zCWdW0NEuBFixkY_sszljbJRx7PW5mcaxNBqMsV5eUSIoitxLImd9B0hmZObvzneGn-gU1WoHDnCRh98oRFu7DaqAKtbxblzIu-CyMjeVkJZ8gyPTJ9wx1ZxZbHpbeVEN30PviII3kyAcn5MGe069AbBrM33rb9itCn-wFysub8VW8FvRTywitb87jISf6TibFhbY9qn1kJkpt0X9oUJEEpLUdSHWJ51gGZg_orv1ySS2ZmBGhVqmdHfFuikyc4XJs91UsC5BsB__os3UTNAlo4zeA2_4mNAbFW2-FznRsuE8OleGnpCiFIIwHQdBTuIHJyl0QQG3sorK-KAh1DCB3ZNaKq56mi4Rym--uhHyElASLviIt0jVbhSSNnLrsQe9NhJi7P)

When I joined the Army, I took an oath to protect and defend those freedoms. That’s what I’ve always done – and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8dfc2f299394500afb0d882946f7a58&_e=lSI9yLSE0v9Ot7LUfjmtJ-YxExACdvoIBLQKXXIcw6GdWLpVaAW6_PY9W1_mf80chw-xyal10TdQXQwUj5NHCgY5IeChrSvNoTE6-gGzHm-RDDHBYYn6kRQd6zCWdW0NEuBFixkY_sszljbJRx7PW5mcaxNBqMsV5eUSIoitxLImd9B0hmZObvzneGn-gU1WoHDnCRh98oRFu7DaqAKtbxblzIu-CyMjeVkJZ8gyPTJ9wx1ZxZbHpbeVEN30PviII3kyAcn5MGe069AbBrM33rb9itCn-wFysub8VW8FvRSlOradtMMNCdiVG1CgxRTMkVjAz-S-vfPKdLESfUeTf66Z7g8pNxhEBMbHDvEnGymx6hJw4nQlb5qi0nBXdPZqjcbBB6gQ5vFB4MpR6_LWIWzz0IgVlucmteVlDDe_XelzagOs1t20cjc579M8YFkMTlgRxNJT2OFrScXO2s0tFGk36cxGSfKrE0yqvMbcCUJz6ZbBUKm4uhj1WI6vWdCKwBd-Sjh5Umaro4ffJ64jtQ%3D%3D)

**I bring something unique to this race, Peter.** I’m the only combat veteran and conservative outsider. I _know_ what it means to go to war, to put your life on the line for your country.
**I’ve seen first-hand what freedom**** _truly_****costs – and that’s something that can’t be bought.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8dfc2f299394500afb0d882946f7a58&_e=lSI9yLSE0v9Ot7LUfjmtJ-YxExACdvoIBLQKXXIcw6GdWLpVaAW6_PY9W1_mf80chw-xyal10TdQXQwUj5NHCgY5IeChrSvNoTE6-gGzHm-RDDHBYYn6kRQd6zCWdW0NEuBFixkY_sszljbJRx7PW5mcaxNBqMsV5eUSIoitxLImd9B0hmZObvzneGn-gU1WoHDnCRh98oRFu7DaqAKtbxblzIu-CyMjeVkJZ8gyPTJ9wx1ZxZbHpbeVEN30PviII3kyAcn5MGe069AbBrM33rb9itCn-wFysub8VW8FvRTeJq3YVqbfk7eAkcz6Q0c6O6roCpUdUfrB-TPKngIT6Va0cGGRowUvmYk900_JuAVTZa4JSD79NHutpLOAtVCtZi3NTC5Foty7kxmc9cPiy5pBtgvO_CNV4-6gSHSdL7_Vl77W89mdLRuR1qo2YfRvP9G_nLQS1HDklIrrSuiKBnvuY6uDWjhe4fMb1BUf9giSmgoOAhX9DT5TrXokh0fGIHQ9bTmgVmIWettEYUdSBg%3D%3D)

In the days and weeks after 9/11, I was like so many other Americans. I felt compelled to serve my country, and I have – through 10 years of intelligence service and two deployments. When I returned home, I faced a personal battle: my son was diagnosed with cancer. I quickly transitioned back into mom mode. My husband and I prayed every day, and eventually, my son beat his diagnosis.
---
[**SEND MARJORIE ON HER NEXT MISSION**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=e8dfc2f299394500afb0d882946f7a58&_e=lSI9yLSE0v9Ot7LUfjmtJ-YxExACdvoIBLQKXXIcw6GdWLpVaAW6_PY9W1_mf80chw-xyal10TdQXQwUj5NHCgY5IeChrSvNoTE6-gGzHm-RDDHBYYn6kRQd6zCWdW0NEuBFixkY_sszljbJRx7PW5mcaxNBqMsV5eUSIoitxLImd9B0hmZObvzneGn-gU1WoHDnCRh98oRFu7DaqAKtbxblzIu-CyMjeVkJZ8gyPTJ9wx1ZxZbHpbeVEN30PviII3kyAcn5MGe069AbBrM33rb9itCn-wFysub8VW8FvRToCnZT20wRTmmlpvYvN5BAqsrPGsUhTKrRw7KLk-F1cfDdLS6iogueCAWvolV8bfvVo5u8D3FJBUXBydtUX92Z8gc_biwfdph3XLc6TAZndpLKYt7LB4XV0CzDACdVKhlC6VvPedqQZn_JfPABcwPcXRkN3-ZWor8Y8pAcdysdWifCfNvmDv6qzPlv01okCXhqhVTltPEeYE0ae7CYsu4a8BM-ocGqhzq-TQF0boPFHA%3D%3D)
