clean_body: First in Freedom means being the beacon of hope so many others need.| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this | | Peter, There’s a reason North Carolina is considered to be First in Freedom... On April 12, 1776 – 246 years ago today – 83 delegates from North Carolina’s Fourth Provincial Congress gathered in Halifax. During their meeting, they passed a resolution, now known as the Halifax Resolves, calling for independence from Great Britain. The North Carolina delegation went to the Second Continental Congress in Philadelphia to form alliances with other colonies and vote for complete and total independence from Great Britain. The Halifax Resolves were the very firstcolonial government to call for independence, which paved the path for the Declaration of Independence. North Carolina’s history of being First in Freedom is why so many look to us to see if we’ll be the beacon of hope our country needs. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. My name is Marjorie K. Eastman. I’m a veteran, military wife, mother, and businesswoman – and I’m running to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate. When I look at the direction our country is heading in, I’m worried. I’m concerned about career politicians’ inability to govern and protect our freedoms. When I joined the Army, I took an oath to protect and defend those freedoms. That’s what I’ve always done – and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. I bring something unique to this race, Peter. I’m the only combat veteran and conservative outsider. I know what it means to go to war, to put your life on the line for your country. I’ve seen first-hand what freedom trulycosts – and that’s something that can’t be bought. In the days and weeks after 9/11, I was like so many other Americans. I felt compelled to serve my country, and I have – through 10 years of intelligence service and two deployments. When I returned home, I faced a personal battle: my son was diagnosed with cancer. I quickly transitioned back into mom mode. My husband and I prayed every day, and eventually, my son beat his diagnosis. I’ve stood by my husband and supported his military career while also working in the private and non-profit sector, all with their own unique challenges. All of these battles led me to this mission today. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. Our nation’s best days are ahead of us as long as our leaders are battle-tested and answer to the American people. Thank you, Marjorie K. Eastman | Use of Marjorie K. Eastman’s military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | | | | Paid for by Marjorie K. Eastman for Senate | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | For more updates visit our site at Contributions to Marjorie K. Eastman for Senate are not tax deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer of individuals whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 per election cycle. Under federal law, the maximum amount an individual may contribute is $2,900 ($5,800 per couple) per election. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 per election. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (non-green card holders), federal government contractors, and minors are prohibited.

subject: This is going to look great (re: yard signs)

body:
We've set a goal to blanket all of Texas in yard signs.
#
**Today we're coming to you with one extremely simple but rewarding way for you to help elect Beto as Texas' next Governor:**
**[Chip in $15 or more today to sponsor a yard sign in Texas like this one in Travis County! ⤵](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54969?refcode=ema20220412-184713&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=184713%2E444211%2Ekb0q8O)**

Every time we drive into a new town for an event, we're overwhelmed to see Beto for Texas signs in yards, windows, and lining the road. They're a reminder of why we do this work and who we're fighting for — and they really do make a difference!
**That's why we've set a goal to blanket all of Texas in yard signs.** We want to see yard signs in _every single_ Texas county — no matter how big or small it is. With your help, we can do it.
**[Please, pitch in today using this link to sponsor a yard sign in Texas. We'll send it to a high-traffic area for the most impact.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54969?refcode=ema20220412-184713&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=184713%2E444211%2Ekb0q8O)**
Thanks,
Beto for Texas

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: No prayer on Good Friday?
body:
It's been over 45 days since we sent the Spreckels Union School District a letter demanding immediate injunctive relief for the twisted gaslighting they did to Jessica Konen's 12-year-old daughter...

|
I apologize for being so abrupt, but I urgently need your help.

Unelected bureaucrats and corrupt politicians in Washington D.C. are threatening to shred the First Amendment to pieces by deciding when, where, and how you can exercise your God-given freedoms.

And my team of attorneys at the Center for American Liberty is trying to stop them with a critical lawsuit being heard this week at the Court of Appeals in Washington, D.C.

But with less than a week to secure a crucial victory in court before Good Friday, I'm relying on you and every other American patriot who cares about the unalienable rights enshrined in our constitution to help me today.

[**Will you please help us defend religious liberty by supporting our emergency appeal against the United States Capitol Police Board today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112666:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)

Let be briefly explain what this lawsuit is all about.

For the past 32 years, a local pastor - Reverend Patrick Mahoney - gathered his faithful parishioners on the steps of the United States Capitol on Good Friday to give thanks to God and to pray for our nation.

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112666:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)
That was until last year when unelected bureaucrats intervened and shut the whole thing down.

For the first time in three decades, Rev. Mahoney was DENIED a permit to worship in public.

Then, a few months later, he applied for a permit to hold a prayer vigil at the U.S. Capitol on the anniversary of September 11 to pray for healing for our nation.

Again, his permit was DENIED.

_Never mind the fact that simply being required to get a permit to exercise the right to pray in public is a gross violation of the Constitution ..._

The feckless, unelected bureaucrats at the United States Capitol told Rev. Mahoney and his peaceful worshipers that they couldn't pray on the public grounds outside the Capitol.

But the Capitol Police Board didn't stop far-left Congresswoman Cori Bush from camping out on the Capitol steps for several days in protest.

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112666:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)
The Capitol Police Board even granted a large organization a permit to protest with massive stage, sound equipment, and media presence.

And when asked, the Capitol Police Board admitted that they granted these and at least one other permit application at the request of a member of Congress.

There was never a real concern for "public safety."

**The U.S. Capitol Police Board denied Rev. Mahoney the right to pray in public because he didn 't have the support of AOC, Nancy Pelosi, or any other member of Congress.**

THAT'S UNCONSTITUTIONAL.

It's not up to unelected bureaucrats or politicians to pick and choose who can speak, pray, or assemble in public.

That's why the Center for American Liberty is suing the United States Capitol Police Board on behalf of Rev. Patrick Mahoney for unconstitutionally denying him and his parishioners the right to exercise their First Amendment freedoms.

[**Will you help us win our lawsuit and hold these violators of the Constitution accountable with a tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112666:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)

The reason I need your help is because the Center for American Liberty - the public interest law firm I founded a few years ago to defend the liberties of Americans left behind by civil liberties legacy organizations - is a non-profit organization with limited means.

So, the only way we can afford to pay for this lawsuit and others like it is with the help of patriots like you.

**This lawsuit is going to cost $50,000. But that 's a small price to pay to protect our freedoms.**

I'm asking for your help because our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board represents so much more than just one man's right to pray in public.

This lawsuit represents your right, my right, and every American's right to exercise their freedom of speech, freedom of religion, and freedom of assembly...

...no matter what you have to say, when you want to say it, and how you express it.

Even if you never personally experienced it, I'll bet you know someone who was told that they couldn't go to church or leave their homes over the past few years under the totalitarian edicts of far-left governors in the name of "public safety..."

... while those very same elites attended lavish dinner parties at Michelin starred restaurants and turned a blind eye to abject anarchy by their far-left activist base.

And if they aren't held accountable for their hypocrisy and illegal restrictions, they'll continue to spur up "crisis" after "crisis" to gain further control of your life.

The constitutional rights of every American are on the line with our lawsuit against the U.S. Capitol Police Board.

[**Please help us win this critical lawsuit by making a tax-deductible contribution of $35 or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112666:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)

For Freedom,

[
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112666:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)
Harmeet K. Dhillon

P.S. Like I mentioned, we have less than a week to win this case before Good Friday.

Earlier this week, the district court ruled against our original request for a preliminary injunction.

But I'm not taking "no" for an answer.

The Bill of Rights states plain as day that, "Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof..."

And the Center for American Liberty is feverishly working to preserve that guarantee for you, your children, and your grandchildren.

[**I hope that I can count on you to help us defend that right by contribution $35 or more to our emergency appeal against the U.S. Capitol Police Board today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112666:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)

Thank you in advance for your support!

[ DONATE ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112666:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112666:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)
---
[**Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112666:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)

The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
| (C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60112667:JdNG-loNA:m:1:3253819041:B6D719207E804BADE6AE2C6B7935C5B0:r)
PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

---

subject: Sims Campaign Update - 4.12.2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALAN SIMS FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/alansimsforcongress/9gmhty1yxf-6772021?e=bcd0e72a5a)
---
| | |
# Weekly Update 4.12.2022
---
|
---
| | | |
---
**Friends: **
This week we discuss how Big Tech is restricting our inalienable right to free speech and expression. This didn't just come about overnight - there is a history to how media elites assumed extraordinary power over the internet and social media. Understanding that history is key to reclaiming this highly important, Constitutionally protected right.
---
|
# **In this issue:**
* Recent Events
* Upcoming Events
* This Week in Congress
* Alan on the Issues

---
| **Recent Events:**

Alan enjoyed a wonderful visit with his daughter and family!
---
|
---
| Marissa is 10 months old.
---
| **Upcoming Events:** **Tuesday, April 12 th – 7:00 – 9:00 PM**: Alan is speaking at the **Oglethorpe GOP** meeting. Please join us at the **Oglethorpe Public Library** located at 115 Chatham St, Oglethorpe, GA 31068

**Wednesday, April 13 th – 6:00 – 8:00 PM**: Alan is looking forward to participating in the **College Republicans Forum** at the **UGA Miller Learning Center** in Room 102. The UGA Miller Learning Center’s address is 48 Baxter St, Athens, GA 30602. It will be a great Forum, hope to see you there.
---
|
---
|
**Monday, April 18 th – ** **7:30 - 9:00 PM: **Alan will be speaking at the **Barrow County GOP** at 15 W Midland Ave, Winder, Georgia 30680.
---
|
**VOTE FOR ALAN MAY 24th in the Republican Primary! Early Voting begins May 2nd!**

---
| **This week in Congress:**
Congress sought to wrap up several items before recessing until the week of April 25.

In the Senate, Supreme Court nominee Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson was confirmed by a 53-47 vote despite deadlocking 11-11 in the Senate Judiciary Committee. Sens. Mitt Romney (R-Utah), Lisa Murkowski (R-Alaska), and Susan Collins (R-Maine) voted with Democrats to confirm Jackson.

The House Armed Services Committee heard testimony from Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin and Gen. Mark Milley, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, on the president’s $773 billion defense budget for 2023. Republicans have called for the White House to devote even more funding to the military. Despite [a testy exchange](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=b84823117a&e=bcd0e72a5a) about the military seeming to embrace wokeism, _both men defended the Pentagon’s handling of Afghanistan and their initial assessment of an easy Russian victory in Ukraine that did not pan out._

The House and Senate both overwhelmingly passed [a bill](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=257df6dcfc&e=bcd0e72a5a) stripping “most favored nation” trading status from Russia, opening the door for more devastating tariffs on items such as steel, chemicals, and iron.

**Advocacy Groups Were Behind Dire Covid Predictions Media Couldn’t Get Enough Of**
It turns out that [a lot of the scary economic and social predictions](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=733190bf11&e=bcd0e72a5a) the media ran with at the height of Covid were the products of special interest groups using the crisis to push the country to adopt their policies.

---
| **Alan on the Issues:** **Big Tech and the Right to Free Speech**

Our Constitutionally protected right to freedom of speech and expression is now under assault by Big Tech – the largest players in our information economy. Their abuse of information power must be immediately terminated to guarantee the free society upon which our republic stands.

**Key Takeaways:**
* Freedom of speech & expression are inalienable, guaranteed by the First Amendment
* Big Tech violates these rights when it censors user comments on social media
* Big Tech has assumed powers far beyond the role granted to it by Section 230
* Social media companies manipulate content, ban users, and rewrite narratives based on their pet political viewpoints, without jurisdiction or accountability. This unsanctioned freedom literally grants them unelected power to limit and restrict American free speech
* Section 230 reforms must be enacted to restore Big Tech to its appropriate role and restrict its abuses of power in our information economy

---
| [CLICK HERE FOR ALAN'S STATEMENT CONCERNING: Big Tech and the Right to Free Speech](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=4f845d78e6&e=bcd0e72a5a "CLICK HERE FOR ALAN'S STATEMENT CONCERNING: Big Tech and the Right to Free Speech")
---
| [DONATE](https://alansimsforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5abbc295c801dfce747b6d100&id=9fcc2a7955&e=bcd0e72a5a "DONATE")

name: Team Nikki
subject: Interview request for Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

Nikki’s in the middle of her Lower Costs, Higher Standards tour, but while she’s out there promoting bold, innovative policies, we wanted to ask for a quick favor.

Over the next month, we’ll be moving full steam ahead on our policy platform to help Floridians overcome the challenges caused by DeSantis’ failed leadership.

Since this campaign is all about giving you the leadership you deserve, we want to make sure that our platform is a reflection of your needs, interests, and expectations.

And to do that, we need your help. Can you take a quick, 2-minute survey to tell us your priorities heading into the 2022 election? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_33BFHuXAka-gPYQQq8uGg2]

Nikki is running for Governor to bring something new to Florida — to undo the damage that Ron DeSantis has done to our state and deliver results for workers, families, and small businesses.

She’s ready to put in the work, make your voices heard, and move Florida in a new, better direction after years of neglect by DeSantis and his GOP allies.

name: Nina Turner for Us
subject: 3 things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
The only way we fund this campaign is together.
#

Hey team, we’ll be direct:
If you’ve been waiting for the perfect time to make your first contribution to stand with Nina Turner, we’re here to tell you that today is that day.
Here’s why:
* Tomorrow at midnight, we’re facing our **FINAL FEC deadline before our May 3 primary.** After that, we’re legally required to file a report showing how much money we’ve raised, _and_ how many contributions make up that amount.

* Just yesterday, we found out that our opponents are up on the air with _over $100,000 in TV ads_ — that’s on top of the outside Super PACs already circling to launch their attacks on Nina. They’re all going to be looking closely at our report as soon as they can, looking for any signs of slowing momentum.

* So, our job before midnight tomorrow is to send an unmistakable message that our grassroots movement is stronger than ever. **We need to put up a MASSIVE number to show EVERYONE — our allies, our opponents, the media, the political establishment — that we have what it takes to win this race.**

**[Can you make a contribution — of $5, $27, or anything you can — to stand with Nina Turner and our campaign before tomorrow’s midnight FEC deadline? We would not ask if it were not so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44065535/339940268/413031954?refcode2=51bb7312-b4ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220412-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWJiNzMxMi1iNGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vURrc7OkO4-QKlcygklhVOqT-_guLPMmEiXaAnicmOI=)**
We’re about to make some big budget decisions that will have a huge impact on the final weeks of this race, and the only way we fund this campaign is together.
Thank you for being a part of our movement, and for making sure we have the resources it takes to talk to as many voters as possible here in the home stretch.
With these hands,
Team Nina Turner
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44065536/339940269/413031954?refcode2=51bb7312-b4ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220412-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWJiNzMxMi1iNGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vURrc7OkO4-QKlcygklhVOqT-_guLPMmEiXaAnicmOI=)**

I’m so excited to have this chance to show more Montanans what our campaign is about. Montana’s economy is booming, but growth is uneven. Far too many families who've been here for years or generations are unsure about their futures here – especially with the lack of high-wage job opportunities and the skyrocketing cost of living.
**This campaign is about taking Montana back. This is about fighting for housing we can all afford. It’s about going after price gougers, and preventing out-of-state money and interests from driving up our cost of living without us having a say about it.**
[**TV ads like these are one of the most effective ways to show local voters there’s a candidate fighting for the issues we care about. But we need to raise $20,000 before Friday’s TV wiring deadline to keep this ad on the airwaves. Can you rush in a $3 donation to help us out?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44058809/339909319/-1294259538?refcode=em-4.12.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGM4YjViZi05MmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WasmjzaZS8Hr9fAnmzbbLaRmIzTGwHgV1zVn95PG20U=)

body:
What will (and WON’T) get our state’s economy back on track| | |
---
Team, This week, we’re talking about what will (and what WON’T) get our state’s economy back on track. Hint: Governor Pritzker and the Democrats aren’t helping... 🏛️ **JESSE SULLIVAN WEIGHS IN ON THE LEGISLATIVE SESSION** Governor J.B. Pritzker and Democratic leaders just passed a record-spending state budget that leaves Illinoisans stuck paying the highest total tax burden in the United States, while the most anti-police legislation in the country remains on the books. This legislative session completely failed to deliver the change Illinois deserves. It was a taxpayer- funded crisis communications campaign for J.B. Pritzker and Illinois Democrats. _[**Jesse Sullivan broke down all of the election-year gimmicks in the last legislative session in his full statement.**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=a9cffd0f0e2f4be3ada0ac1d74aff176&_e=xF5HZfb9wpdZyEsa57VNwx6vPp-Nrnc5IjON99KUmIE20gOyLNBiYHsJO18cHWjV1AG8jBdwZZyJT5e0DIGW7-xPoYqQx8AgCNqTGD3dRh0y9O7Uwuz0N-L_XY27Ot7NrJ7yDtEMRoPEpohVbm29zS_CUOm0OUNYspn6uhnjBfe5ejJiEXk33pemCua3xqs49QY7H_wA1T-yV9jwu15vricIIDcoW1noBgW6TqBfkTp_Vfj8tdIny7RNbBs_KqL3j4Zej6fRBjJJnWONwfM3KmXaOhQN_vkcxBaULOjjuS1_TUrwVVYoGqVxjedv14gIIUF6uUIY-FqpjvKCY7PR_JDTU-wZu_FWEWkrY8-yIjDyiYsKOj2fWaBP4yGlw-kQM--OCW2HYstKJgocqg3STRgfI5pL6irnBMnmN0gfm_Nae1PKSyuxkGEaEHURGmeA)_ _[**READ THE FULL STATEMENT**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=a9cffd0f0e2f4be3ada0ac1d74aff176&_e=xF5HZfb9wpdZyEsa57VNwx6vPp-Nrnc5IjON99KUmIE20gOyLNBiYHsJO18cHWjV1AG8jBdwZZyJT5e0DIGW7-xPoYqQx8AgCNqTGD3dRh0y9O7Uwuz0N-L_XY27Ot7NrJ7yDtEMRoPEpohVbm29zS_CUOm0OUNYspn6uhnjBfe5ejJiEXk33pemCua3xqs49QY7H_wA1T-yV9jwu15vricIIDcoW1noBgW6TqBfkTonD45ewGZ7WYb63UYriL3Ilqq1pB85DscSjrbz08ZgyfTdp0dIaF-TYThBF4aOY2wpSaqmHnfJyUf0MKG4FWo2BLmObtyPme9meyQ6I-8jmS-pcVqBN8ReRtrWO2stt3QazQPyGTiuPODVVUq2-ggaZzsVXSi5XHGRRmD_pJPO6zqcycXTZnkyjDnMzAPkEZmqPctiHhtKOQZ8wAjJ8JTD)_ 📺 **SULLY TV** Last week, Jesse Sullivan became the first and only candidate for governor to sign the Taxpayer Protection Pledge, a promise to oppose and veto any and all efforts to increase taxes in Illinois.

Our politicians are captured by special interests – which is why Jesse Sullivan proposed an **Illinois Taxpayer Bill of Rights (TABOR)**. TABOR would require a vote of the people for any new increases in taxes or debt at the state and local level, limit tax revenue growth to population growth plus inflation, and refund any revenue over that limit directly to taxpayers.

_[**This is an important step in restoring fiscal sanity to Illinois**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=a9cffd0f0e2f4be3ada0ac1d74aff176&_e=xF5HZfb9wpdZyEsa57VNw9o5sWeBROSTCsliPOQSnOMSJPN4HU1gqwFa2fqu4JCbYNfNw_rIzVaUiBi0dOY0d82Il3DGYBz1apvY0xVcEgO5LXcwU-rGvqySLmy_skVwCwPpfzGBzBkCcYOJ1r_0dyOaBG7MDtoVtHgjuqhRBUT7-YSu7YqAjnxaoiaeZpkFZH-nEfl-5mRtneBdrXHY-e4Qy8s1GHF3V8Ob3jWJlAjZp3e5duo4lM65uYA9byHTFOuxUCi9Bd5_sin0DMHobqtWY7smKCiu327d6IHNgmNKBQeWWR5RZsf7GkMDOI6c5lWodJjJFbtKvTflUfAyCR6dIUkh3WzjSPvuZ80RkZ6-Y8k5EubdzGsMMyDfHo-Bk0KR-pw5YrG1MYp6ihEYUpB5P-yYDcaxpm1UlFErr4a5UJ-k39g0gASxTJU6FaUD)_. clean_body: What will (and WON’T) get our state’s economy back on track| | | Team, This week, we’re talking about what will (and what WON’T) get our state’s economy back on track. Hint: Governor Pritzker and the Democrats aren’t helping... 🏛️ JESSE SULLIVAN WEIGHS IN ON THE LEGISLATIVE SESSION Governor J.B. Pritzker and Democratic leaders just passed a record-spending state budget that leaves Illinoisans stuck paying the highest total tax burden in the United States, while the most anti-police legislation in the country remains on the books. This legislative session completely failed to deliver the change Illinois deserves. It was a taxpayer- funded crisis communications campaign for J.B. Pritzker and Illinois Democrats. 📺 SULLY TV Last week, Jesse Sullivan became the first and only candidate for governor to sign the Taxpayer Protection Pledge, a promise to oppose and veto any and all efforts to increase taxes in Illinois. Our politicians are captured by special interests – which is why Jesse Sullivan proposed an Illinois Taxpayer Bill of Rights (TABOR). TABOR would require a vote of the people for any new increases in taxes or debt at the state and local level, limit tax revenue growth to population growth plus inflation, and refund any revenue over that limit directly to taxpayers. . Unlike career politicians, Jesse Sullivan will never stop fighting for YOU! ❇️ OUR LATEST ENDORSEMENT: REPUBLICANS OF WHEELING TOWNSHIP We are proud to earn the endorsement of the Republicans of Wheeling Township! We were endorsed on Saturday with 79% of the vote on the first ballot. Thank you, Wheeling – the momentum is building. 📊 ILLINOIS FACTS OF THE WEEK 62% of Illinois small businesses say they're suffering from high gas prices. That's the 10th highest percentage in the nation. J.B. Pritzker's gas tax hike is holding Illinois' economic recovery back. 🙏🏻 STRENGTH IN FAITH CHALLENGE For our final week of the Strength in Faith challenge, we want to join together in offeringprayers of gratitude. Let us spend these last few days of Lent giving thanks to the many people who bless our state with their hard work and sacrifice. Join us in prayer. Team Sullivan | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:

Friend, There couldn’t be a starker contrast. While Governor Holcomb and the Republican-led legislature continue to**** deliver _real results_ for Hoosiers, Joe Biden and the national Democrats have only delivered **chaos**. We’re going to need your support as we lead up to the 2022 midterm elections so that we can ensure our Hoosier voices are _heard loud and clear_ in Washington, D.C., and finally stop this madness. But it's just about stopping the madness in D.C., it's about keeping the failed policies of the national Democrats out of our great state. And to do that, we'll need to elect Republicans up and down the ballot. **Please chip in what you can today to help our efforts!**

name: Susan Wild
subject: humbly asking (short email)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
With the House majority at stake, we can’t afford to leave anything to chance.

---
| Peter,

I hate to bother you, so I’ll keep this quick. As you may have heard, we recently completed our redistricting process here in Pennsylvania and have finalized our congressional district lines. I won’t sugarcoat this: we’re in real danger of losing this seat.

Will you chip in today to ensure we have the resources to fight back? Here's a link to give now: [_**wildforcongress.com/april22**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44066255/339943522/278639227?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220412-1b-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGM5NTIxNi1iNmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zHEq9wtfs6Ic4dbLg-9EdlaUCYFx964W_ka4XIIBB50=)

Peter, I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t critically important, but experts from the Cook Political Report to FiveThirtyEight are forecasting this race as a complete toss-up.

With the House majority at stake, we can’t afford to leave anything to chance. Anything you can spare today will make a big difference in allowing us to reach out to every voter and defend both my seat and the Democratic House majority. Can I count on you to invest in my re-election campaign today? Here's that link again: [_**wildforcongress.com/april22**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44066256/339943523/278639227?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220412-1b-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGM5NTIxNi1iNmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zHEq9wtfs6Ic4dbLg-9EdlaUCYFx964W_ka4XIIBB50=)

Grateful to have you on my team,
Susan
---

name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: Our future is on the line
body:
Our future in on the line and corporate politicians are taking advantage.

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_goal&n=1)
---
Peter, Our future is on the line, and corporate politicians are taking advantage of it. The planet is on a path of destruction, and they don't care. Money from corporate and pharma PACs is fueling their campaigns. Yes, I am talking about the incumbent and challenger. We can't wait any longer to take action. I am not joking; if we don't act now, we may miss our chance to change the path of our planet, our country, and our state. I need your help; we need your help to win this campaign. I am asking you to donate **[$100](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuFw6Dup0gA8Xo_bSL3iYxq23aRA6IGOwu5Tf3pkff2q4-52t1Hyg7PKres6BuFpMs&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_goal&n=2)** , **[$50](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuFw6Dup0gA8Xo_bSL3iYxqIpD19dPBQDELazK_A2lHCA&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_goal&n=3)** , or **[whatever](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuFw6Dup0gA8Xo_bSL3iYxq2Xz_8zGvDvbvuiV4Nn3ecw&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_goal&n=4)** you can right now to help us reach our goal. We have a goal of $15,000 this month, and we cannot reach that without you. No, I mean we can't reach it without you; I refuse to accept money from corporate or pharma PACs. That means Amazon, Facebook, Boeing, Pfizer, and more can't buy me. That also means that I can't win without your support. **[If you donate $100 right now, we can be closer to our goal. If you and everyone who receives this message donate $100 right now, we can reach our goal.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuFw6Dup0gA8Xo_bSL3iYxqwAWXNds6Hl0UXIMTpuWgm_hk3H64ZTnpg2-fbllMtT0&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_goal&n=5)** Together we can be the change and transform our country into an equitable and equal place for all—one where our justice system works for all people, not just the privileged. We cannot build back better when we leave those who have caused so many issues to remain in the Senate. The 1994 crime bill, Defense of Marriage Act, voted against affordable medication, voting against providing indigenous health systems additional funding, and voting to add additional funding to the police without oversight. **[We need you to help us right now, and I am asking for you to please donate $100 right now to help us win this election.](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzuFw6Dup0gA8Xo_bSL3iYxqpLVIO73U6sbARdM_gbh233_WbS2IyyGoUAZnEwM0WUE&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=april_goal&n=6)** We have a goal of $15,000 this month, and we cannot reach that without you. No, I mean we can't reach it without you; I refuse to accept money from corporate or pharma PACs. That means Amazon, Facebook, Boeing, Pfizer, and more can't buy me. That also means that I can't win without your support. Together we can be the change and transform our country into an equitable and equal place for all—one where our justice system works for all people, not just the privileged. We cannot build back better when we leave those who have caused so many issues to remain in the Senate. The 1994 crime bill, Defense of Marriage Act, voted against affordable medication, voting against providing indigenous health systems additional funding, and voting to add additional funding to the police without oversight. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Your Friend, Nicolaus Sleister Candidate for the U.S. Senate Washington Join us on Social Media! Tag us with #Nick4WA Our mailing address is: CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256 Puyallup, Washington 98375 Copyright © 2022 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved. clean_body: It’s mid-April and even though Marco has been MIA when it comes to doing his job, he has been up to something. Before we break it down, will you join | | | It’s mid-April, and even though Marco has been MIA when it comes to doing his job, he has been up to something. Marco missed a whole bunch of meetings on the security of Eastern Europe. That’s right, the Senator who is on the Foreign Intelligence Committee disregarded meetings during the escalating crisis in Eastern Europe. Florida deserves better, America deserves better, and Ukrainians deserve better. Half of April is already gone, and if we are going to beat this guy, we need each of you on our side. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Time is flying, and Marco has had ten years in office, failing the American people by skipping out on important meetings that taxpayers pay him to attend. Enough is enough, Marco. – Team Russell Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today. ** Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida

Peter, did you catch this email from Abby? Our team could really use your support. After a judge sided with national Republicans' baseless attempts to kick Abby off the ballot, we're headed to the Iowa Supreme Court to appeal the decision.

Abby _can and will_ defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley in Iowa and expand Democratic Senate control. But right now, we urgently need grassroots support to fight these attacks. **[Please chip in a donation of $5, or whatever you can spare right now, to help Abby fight back and defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44066312/339943807/888067044?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk936-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmMzOGE1ZC1iNmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QizmIcNSRTV5K_rBktQ46Yk_FnM9Nixx_n130ty_Oys=)** Amanda Sands
Abby for Iowa Campaign Manager

**Peter – **yesterday, in the dead of night, a judge sided with the GOP establishment's desperate and meritless attempt to remove me from the ballot. This is nothing but a gift to Washington Republicans and a mockery of our democracy, which is why we are fighting back: **Tomorrow, my campaign and the state of Iowa will go before the Iowa Supreme Court to appeal the decision.**
I want to make one thing crystal clear here and now: **I promise you that no matter what the GOP throws at our campaign, I will never, ever stop fighting for Iowan families.** I refuse to give Chuck Grassley a free pass at the ballot box – and I refuse to let national Republicans' anti-democratic attacks say who is and isn't on the ballot.

This decision is blatantly partisan and undermines the bipartisan panel that already ruled in FAVOR of our campaign's right to be on the ballot. The entire lawsuit against us is bogus – more than 5,000 Iowans said they wanted a chance to vote for our campaign!
**Make no mistake: The GOP establishment is launching an all-out assault on our democracy – and it's no secret why.**
You see, the GOP is absolutely terrified of our campaign. They've seen the polling numbers showing that Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. They've seen the data that showed only 27% of likely voters want to reelect him to an eighth term. **But more than anything else, they've seen the unprecedented grassroots enthusiasm on the ground for our campaign.**
The GOP knows that Sen. Grassley is vulnerable and that if we win here, Democrats will be virtually guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority. **We can defeat the GOP's bogus lawsuit, and we can defeat Sen. Grassley at the polls, but only if people like you stand with us ahead of our crucial hearing at the Iowa Supreme Court tomorrow.**
**[That's why I have to ask: Can you rush $5 right here and now to help me fight these GOP attacks? Every single dollar will help us secure our place on the ballot and flip this seat blue on Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44066318/339943815/888067044?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk936-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmMzOGE1ZC1iNmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QizmIcNSRTV5K_rBktQ46Yk_FnM9Nixx_n130ty_Oys=)**

subject: Full Speed Ahead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Our campaign continues to hammer down, Peter | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=a670003127&e=fe4b890356)
---
| **🎶 I believe that we will win 🎵**
Peter, our campaign is moving FULL SPEED AHEAD as we get closer and closer to the Republican Primary in August.

Last Saturday, we made our way up North for three stops in Traverse City, Charlevoix, and Petoskey - **that's Pure Michigan! **

The energy behind our campaign is just unbelievable, Peter.
It was great seeing some old friends, meeting new voters, and taking our message of freedom on the road. Even my brother and sister-in-law came to see us at our event in Traverse City!
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=bd2916d908&e=fe4b890356)
---
[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=9a80a1948d&e=fe4b890356)
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8b8ac549a7&e=fe4b890356)
---
[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5be88f1266&e=fe4b890356)
---
| **We aren't taking any part of our beautiful state for granted, Peter. **I've attended over 120 events in 53 counties since launching this campaign nearly a year ago - and we're not slowing down until we win this Republican Primary and get on that debate stage with Gretchen Whitmer in the fall.

More and more patriots are learning about our movement - from word of mouth, on [Facebook and social media](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=2be5ca7dc8&e=fe4b890356), from seeing our [yard signs](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=82d3893be0&e=fe4b890356) and [bumper magnets](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5b7a1d2ff9&e=fe4b890356), and from hearing directly from our volunteer team, who have been out knocking doors and spreading the word all across Michigan! 👇🏼👇🏼
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=ec082a22ea&e=fe4b890356)
---
[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=2d6718b894&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | [Sign Up to Get Involved in Our Campaign](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=67b2af14a4&e=fe4b890356 "Sign Up to Get Involved in Our Campaign")
---
| While other candidates are still spending big bucks on out-of-state paid petition circulators, our amazing volunteer field team is already hitting the pavement and canvassing neighbors to let them know that we are THE campaign to defeat Gretchen Whitmer and Make Michigan Great Again.

_To join our volunteer team, submit a form at
[GarrettforMichigan.com/get-involved](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=551b122fe1&e=fe4b890356) and our team will be in touch._

Even local media is taking notice of our grassroots movement. Watch my interview with WLNS TV by clicking below ⬇️

---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=286115740c&e=fe4b890356)
---
| Our campaign is blessed with something no other candidate has - an army of grassroots warriors growing every day and backed with the resources to win BIG in August and November.

What we don't have is D.C. insiders and establishment special interests funding us - which is why we need ALL HANDS ON DECK in these next four months to help hammer down 🔨 with grassroots fundraising.

[**Can you pitch in $50, $25 or just $5 today to help us secure victory in the Republican Primary?**](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=3e41a28a18&e=fe4b890356)

---
| [Contribute $50](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=06394b80d5&e=fe4b890356 "Contribute $50")
---
| [Contribute $25](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=51520af9ee&e=fe4b890356 "Contribute $25")
---
| [Contribute $5](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=e2cf0a1afc&e=fe4b890356 "Contribute $5")
---
| _No Republican is going to win this race from the basement or by sitting on the sidelines._ I'm already back on the road for a full day in Shiawassee County - I hope you can join our movement tonight in Corunna or at one of our upcoming event this month.
_See my full schedule at_ _[GarrettforMichigan.com/events.](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=b475184e2f&e=fe4b890356)_
---
| **Stand Up****Shiawassee County**** **
Tuesday, April 12th at 7pm
Immanuel Baptist Church
2680 E M 21, Corunna, MI
---
| | **Kent County Faith & Freedom**
Thursday, April 14th, 6-7:30pm
GR.Church
4525 Stauffer Ave SE, Kentwood, MI

**Stand Up Livingston County**

6870 Grand River Blvd
Brighton, MI

**Macomb County Meet & Greet**

B&B's Gun Club
21475 31 Mile Rd, Ray, MI
---
| **Washtenaw County M &G **
Saturday, April 23rd, 12-2pm
Chelsea Lanes
1180 S Main St, Chelsea, MI

**Stand Up Oakland County**
Sunday, April 24th, 4:30-6:30pm
Metro Detroit Christian Church

West Bloomfield, MI

**Branch Co. Revolutionaries**
Monday, April 25th, 6:30-8:30
Parham Road Barn
172 S Parham Rd, Bronson, MI

| [RSVP to an Event](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=e5b2550d5a&e=fe4b890356 "RSVP to an Event")
---
| This campaign truly is powered by We the People, Peter. When I jumped into this race nearly a year ago, I had no idea how big our grassroots movement would grow or how many citizens would take a stand along side me. What we've been able to achieve is remarkable - and it's thanks to you, Peter.

**The Power of One Leads to the Power of Many.**
---
| Appreciate your support,
[](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=73e04cba49&e=fe4b890356)
Garrett Soldano

_P.S. -_ If you are on TikTok, make sure to follow us. I'll be building that platform to reach the younger generation with our message and provide day-to-day updates of life on the campaign trail. Follow us at [www.tiktok.com/@garrettformichigan](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=9078b48383&e=fe4b890356)

_P.S.S _\- Have you seen our awesome new video on the two year anniversary of when our movement began? It will get you fired up!
**Click below to watch.**

---
| | | PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
1151 WEST MILHAM AVENUE, UNIT 2546, PORTAGE, MI 49081

name: Dr. Kermit Jones
subject: My thoughts on the Supreme Court vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44066388/339944063/-714857058?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220412SCOTUS_DKJ_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDZlMTczNC1iN2JhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2R0o36MmdXBlecobuo37PwyYVkwb2MwT2OMsYLRG7Bs=)
---
I am excited to congratulate soon-to-be **Justice** Ketanji Brown Jackson, the newest addition to the U.S. Supreme Court! Listening to her testimony the past few weeks, I couldn’t help but think about the similarities in our stories. Judge Jackson shared that her love of law came from sitting next to her father as he tackled law school homework and she practiced the alphabet. _I found my passion in a similar way, following my mother, a nurse, around as she visited patients._ Judge Jackson also shared that guidance counselors had told her not to set her “sights so high” — a saying I heard, and am sure many other children hear all too often. _But despite the naysayers, Judge Jackson persisted, graduated with honors from Harvard Law, and will now become the first Black woman on the U.S. Supreme Court._ **What I found most disgusting was that 47 Senators voted against her confirmation simply because she was nominated by a Democratic President.** The GOP leadership seems to have forgotten __that sometimes partisanship shouldn’t matter.__ When I’m treating patients, I don’t ask if they’re a Republican or Democrat. I just ask how I can help. I plan to do the same in Congress. Yours, Dr. Kermit Jones
[P.S. Primary Election Day is 55 days away and I’m up against two GOP career-ladder politicians. clean_body: | | = I am excited to congratulate soon-to-be Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson, the newest addition to the U.S. Supreme Court! Listening to her testimony the past few weeks, I couldn’t help but think about the similarities in our stories. Judge Jackson shared that her love of law came from sitting next to her father as he tackled law school homework and she practiced the alphabet. I found my passion in a similar way, following my mother, a nurse, around as she visited patients. Judge Jackson also shared that guidance counselors had told her not to set her “sights so high” — a saying I heard, and am sure many other children hear all too often. But despite the naysayers, Judge Jackson persisted, graduated with honors from Harvard Law, and will now become the first Black woman on the U.S. Supreme Court. What I found most disgusting was that 47 Senators voted against her confirmation simply because she was nominated by a Democratic President. The GOP leadership seems to have forgotten that sometimes partisanship shouldn’t matter. When I’m treating patients, I don’t ask if they’re a Republican or Democrat. I just ask how I can help. I plan to do the same in Congress. Yours, Dr. Kermit Jones = | = | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Add your name: Don’t leave the uninsured behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
To save lives, it is imperative that insulin and other life-saving drugs are affordable for ALL patients.
#
Peter, no one should have to wonder if they can afford to live.
Health care is a human right, which is why the Affordable Insulin Now Act that the House passed recently must do _more_ to make sure nobody is left behind. The current bill does not account for the millions of people living in our country _without_ insurance. The bill caps co-pays for insulin at $35 per month, but only if a person has insurance.
As Congress considers measures to provide relief to working people dealing with the sky-high cost of many prescription drugs, it is essential no one is left behind because of their insurance status or any other factor. To save lives, it is imperative that insulin and other life-saving drugs are affordable for ALL patients.
**I’m writing to you today, Peter, to ask you to stand with me on this — we must protect everyone from the price gouging of Big Pharma. Are you with me?**
[**Add your name to support capping the cost of insulin for ALL, not just folks with insurance. We need to build the momentum right now to pass legislation that guarantees everyone can afford life-saving care.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/insulin-act-uninsured-2022/?source=em20220412-1179&t=1&akid=1179%2E420207%2E627eHv)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/insulin-act-uninsured-2022/?source=em20220412-1179&t=2&akid=1179%2E420207%2E627eHv)**
I will continue my advocacy to lower the price of insulin and other prescription drugs — AND to stop profiteering by large pharmaceutical companies. Until Big Pharma monopoly abuse is addressed, people will suffer and costs will continue to go up. We must seriously address this crisis and lower costs for every person in America.
I won’t stop fighting until everyone can get the health care they need.
[**If you’re with me, please add your name to my call for an insulin cap for ALL, not just those with insurance coverage.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/insulin-act-uninsured-2022/?source=em20220412-1179&t=3&akid=1179%2E420207%2E627eHv)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220412-1179-footer&t=4&refcode2=1179_420207_627eHv&akid=1179%2E420207%2E627eHv)**
---

name: George Bochetto
subject: Help Us Fight the Left
body:
|
---
Peter, This morning The Federalist published an Op-Ed that I wrote on the subject of election integrity.

Right now we are all living through the disastrous consequences Act 77 legislation in Pennsylvania. Joe Biden is president today, in part, as a result of questionable mail-in ballots in Pennsylvania. I intend to join the fight against Act 77 and I will be prepared to bring the fight all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court because I cannot sit on the sidelines. I must stand up for the integrity of our elections and health of our republic, and I hope many of my fellow Pennsylvanians stand with me. **Please take a moment to read our piece published in the Federalist today by clicking on the link below**.

[](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=q_G7lXppHyLgLmXMMU9Y0DqW8kzWpSGjfq5txFY-MowuQ8gS0y9Y_VV7bv5hojxiKwrT3za2TaYnDiy2yL_sjEkamN5gz5Icg8mg7ithPdv8Su73GEfvoOkW3R2PhzyBTi-DbYSshq26Qvtg9xWuHJ5xS6uvegQVYvgwWaOiKac&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=federalist_oped&n=1) [](https://bochettoforsenate.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYhRECXP9zpGAeiJcLx1o7CFULDvFQHgtUZnpAZW9LK18I_MJcBlHlgF-q6xyBvXftg&e=674a0be7cca5db25cb3914af0eb7eb00&utm_source=bochettoforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=federalist_oped&n=2) Thank you for your support! For America, George Bochetto

body:
| | |

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. [You are only [1] of [14] supporters selected from Cresco to complete our EXCLUSIVE performance review of President Biden’s job as Commander-in-Chief. We need this information by 9:00 AM tomorrow:]() | | | | | | | Republicans are SLAMMING Biden for his performance as Commander-in-Chief! We want to show President Biden that Democrats everywhere stand with him!! | | | | | We appreciate your input, Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: We are on track to defeat MLG!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
Thanks to your help, we raised over $2.1 million from over 8,500 individual contributions in the latest fundraising report! Not only did we far out ra Peter, **Thanks to your help, we raised over $2.1 million from over 8,500 individual contributions in the latest fundraising report!** Not only did we far out raise all of our primary opponents **combined** , but we also nearly raised as much as Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham! This news SHOCKED the Democrats! MLG is taking money from leftwing groups all over the country, but we still almost raised as much as her -- $2.5 to $2.1 million. **It is unheard of for a challenging candidate to come so close to matching the fundraising of an incumbent governor at this point in the campaign!** **_But that’s because we’re creating a movement for change_** – 88% of our contributions are $100 or less and 96% of our contributions come from right here in New Mexico! **New Mexicans are hungry for a governor who will fight to secure our border, be tough on fighting crime, take back our schools, and fight back hard against the radical progressive agenda that MLG has embraced.** We know we’re not going to raise as much national special interest money as MLG. And we don’t care! **Our strategy is to build a movement of everyday New Mexicans who are willing to fight for change!** **[That’s why I hope you will make a contribution today – whatever you can spare – to help us continue to close the gap and have the resources to take out MLG!](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=79e19ed87c764bfe9e3d0df925525e72&_e=I1IH1-dQibDUJeSKoUNWcehtP9Ij3ieyf9tIJynHxSB0TQM271ha80dEXjX3TL95w5Q3l6radKh1d0ErJX54HB_vxuv5eqHLw0L3bo2gGAWUWxoTeJOlH3YrJ3mZ9eOn_4-C0iR6oFCWyXqQjh6dLBCwIVwOiJ9wY-jw8ArbStsWDU60eRaLutP636lnc6nfo7kKxMi9i2C_Kfzu_jXdTRG-tmTaSNyBGV65OaDUy1wN6imZZy1sFQl8e-glM-oMaDTB-Y6zsiie0gGbQJvROgr11c0DjS4Uaa_TK3YTnSNu99vUVnjcyFVRUi20eXcZrUKBw1e9pdyGe1yRtAqvnWyfmd5kzC9sphTlxkPzzHOuhFdC07u-x-pDfvPI42g51k7z-xrDuIVw01SMN36RZpKgseI3a5cFUdZJrtZjbh0wRDQlD_g9PjbhaBwbOC9hkp54TUGl39q2Eof03iO3WE1N3w_JACCMCYeULS-KG9QasIKimsLMbGMlvHK11dtgpDVoGIo7i5vRFDGuC3h1Bh0U4z4yPTq1z3X9qZFSdJI%3D) ** Think about what’s at stake in this election and what we can accomplish if we win.... Not only did we far out raise all of our primary opponents combined , but we also nearly raised as much as Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham! This news SHOCKED the Democrats! MLG is taking money from leftwing groups all over the country, but we still almost raised as much as her -- $2.5 to $2.1 million. It is unheard of for a challenging candidate to come so close to matching the fundraising of an incumbent governor at this point in the campaign! But that’s because we’re creating a movement for change – 88% of our contributions are $100 or less and 96% of our contributions come from right here in New Mexico! New Mexicans are hungry for a governor who will fight to secure our border, be tough on fighting crime, take back our schools, and fight back hard against the radical progressive agenda that MLG has embraced. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: How exactly does my name get on the ballot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220412&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220412&amount=28]
Team,
We just reached a major milestone on the road to Election Day. Yesterday, I joined some of the wonderful volunteers on Team Slotkin to thank them, right after dropping off 2,000 signatures – the maximum number possible! – to officially get my name on the ballot for 2022.
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220412&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220412&amount=28] secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220412&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220412&amount=28]
The process for getting on the ballot can be a bit in the weeds, so I thought this would be a great chance to give you a look behind the scenes of how a critical piece of campaigning actually works.
The first step to running for elected office in Michigan is getting on the primary election ballot, which requires candidates to collect signatures from voters on a nominating petition. The amount of signatures needed varies per office – for Congressional candidates, it’s a minimum of 1,000 to get on the ballot, and you can submit a maximum of 2,000. These signatures must be collected from folks living in the area you’re looking to represent in order for your name to appear on their ballot, and I’m proud to say we were able to collect a total of 5,000 signatures from all 7 counties in the new district – even from our tiny sliver of Genesee county, where just 200 residents fall into our district!
Normally, campaigns have ample time to collect these signatures. However, this year was a bit different. Since we didn’t know how redistricting would shake out last year, we held off on collecting until the lines were released to the public in late December – giving us a fraction of the time we normally have.
Which just goes to show what an impressive feat Team Slotkin pulled off! 300+ dedicated volunteers spent nights and weekends at events and popular community gathering spaces across the new district (sometimes outside in the frigid Michigan winter) with clipboards in hand, asking people to sign.
We set up a mail-in program for folks who didn’t necessarily want to get out and about, but knew friends and family in the district that would want to sign on. Dozens of volunteers mailed out thousands of petition forms, which our volunteer collectors then sent back when they were finished. We also set up “petition drive throughs,” where volunteers could pull up in their cars, sign a form, grab some forms from us, and be on their way.
So how did this process conclude? Yesterday, I dropped off a big box of 330 sheets of petitions, containing 2,000 signatures, at the Board of Elections in Lansing. My paperwork was notarized, signatures counted, and will now be processed in the next few weeks so that my name can officially appear on the ballots of the voters in the new 7th district.
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220412&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220412&amount=28]
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again – the strength of this team is unmatched. I want to extend a huge THANK YOU to everyone that helped us reach this point. Onwards to November!
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220412&amount=28]
Elissa

But a bill that bans grooming kindergarteners and indoctrinating them with LGBTQIAXYZ ideology? THAT was a bridge too far!
So now they're targeting the free state of Florida and trying to use their woke corporate influence to keep the radical Left agenda alive and well in FL schools. [We can't let them get their way! >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sUy6pFLWTRFWPFQMwlPwl6n2EdcgLPMuE4KQv-A2k5MXjjjpQLydyy7hPzVXlH_LxXU9ZqQZXeJas5UbZZolLFWrk_uXpYNc--LtgrsR5sWGBY54_NoRyij7IaGBDCZboWDltY1eJFr45qQzns-Rp3VjwfT0YeUsI5xMiO77A-eakKqRVMUvqsqtANoTn1pI&c=t-uT_vegcjPVf_G046PQC7BFBcvnjKp-4hG5wNKQnM3_53HDg2bAeA==&ch=81c7m_xOAcuFK-Czhb1ORLiB9RUrCN_ILxGoSQ2Q9uWBD7YJUHcffg==)

name: Giffords
subject: Brooklyn subway shooting
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This morning, a man walked onto a Brooklyn subway car, popped a canister filling it with gas, and opened fire.
#

Friends -
This morning, a man walked onto a Brooklyn subway car, popped a canister filling it with gas, and opened fire.
10 people shot. 16 injured.
Another morning in America—the ONLY developed nation on Earth where these kinds of shootings happen with such regularity.
They happen in churches and concerts, schools and subways, movies and more. And every day our elected leaders fail to act, they choose this tragic reality.
It’s not that Americans are more violent than people in other countries. We just have elected leaders afraid to enact the commonsense solutions that save lives everywhere else.
But the truth is, every year we chip away at that reality.
When we started this work, talking about gun violence prevention in campaigns was seen as a fast track to defeat.
Today, it’s a winning issue—supported by an overwhelming majority of Americans from every corner of the country.
And if we keep fighting, we’re going to get there. We’re going to win the federal legislation we’ve all wanted for so long. But it will never happen if we give up, and Gabby cannot do it alone. So we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Giffords today to help us continue our lifesaving work to make our communities safer from gun violence?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr22?refcode=em220412-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1809_3935704_lfHMuf&akid=1809%2E3935704%2ElfHMuf)

clean_body: This morning, a man walked onto a Brooklyn subway car, popped a canister filling it with gas, and opened fire. Friends - This morning, a man walked onto a Brooklyn subway car, popped a canister filling it with gas, and opened fire. 10 people shot. 16 injured. Another morning in America—the ONLY developed nation on Earth where these kinds of shootings happen with such regularity. They happen in churches and concerts, schools and subways, movies and more. And every day our elected leaders fail to act, they choose this tragic reality. It’s not that Americans are more violent than people in other countries. We just have elected leaders afraid to enact the commonsense solutions that save lives everywhere else. But the truth is, every year we chip away at that reality. When we started this work, talking about gun violence prevention in campaigns was seen as a fast track to defeat. Today, it’s a winning issue—supported by an overwhelming majority of Americans from every corner of the country. And if we keep fighting, we’re going to get there. We’re going to win the federal legislation we’ve all wanted for so long. But it will never happen if we give up, and Gabby cannot do it alone. So we’re asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, The team at Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

body:
Peter, we're fighting an uphill battle

| |
---
Hi Peter – Did you see this recent poll? Democrats are trailing Republicans in motivation for this midterm election. [__**Chip in here to make sure Democrats in rural districts can fight against the GOP party machine.**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44060159/339915383/311099802?refcode2=3aeeb41c-9aba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=220412_hq_axiospoll_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhZWViNDFjLTlhYmEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=malTaCMLovdghYCY3ZwiCDDto_QdCrJ5R9sxruYjkyg=) **Percentage of voters who say partisan control of Congress really matters** | | **Democrats** | **Republicans**
---|---|---
**2018** | 67% | 60%
**2020** | 65% | 70%
**Democrats vs. Republicans** | +2% | -10%
**Democrats lost their advantage to Republicans by 12 percentage points over the past four years. That is an unacceptable number.**
It means that Republicans are more fired up about the upcoming midterm elections. And that means that they are going to come out of the gate stronger than Democrats on fundraising, messaging, voter turnout, and engagement then Democrats.
Democrats can't afford to sit back and be unmotivated this election. Control of Congress is something to rally and fight for – not stay home and think all has already been lost.
Poll after poll has also shown that the path to winning more elections and motivating more voters is through rural America. For far too long, Democrats have excluded left rural voters from out of their political strategy and resources. That ends this year.
**At United Rural Democrats, we know that rural voters are at the heart of what Democrats need to win elections.** We need to turn up the heat on the GOP this election – and we do that by staying passionate and committed to winning elections up and down the ballot.
[**Peter, are you ready to turn these poll numbers around with us? We're ready to fire up rural Democrats all across America to win races this November. name: Ed Humphreys
subject: Sad news for the team
disclaimer_text: paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
## April 12, 2022
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# With a heavy heart I must inform you that my dear mother, Mariana passed away in my home last week.
---
|
---
|
## Here is some of what I've taken from this heartbreaking situation.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i6p3Spjj4IKGzRKoveXTf9Grmu-ZR89aT_2sWaKy1kK8A4CeialadcJUce0Z3TV0JmEs8WRBOK5NI-wIQv3FQAFt5kpJK-xzIKB9nW53xCytoDVwFoqfidZ7bPaML6aUb3EcuhtptEb7WlIuKBgW6a-5WdOAqql8Xz-4SqrgRkj1bOSypthr6Q==&c=IdWn-rtnU5zaElVyRz_IgA6hlmcd7gm-yYOywgl6k0kpfNSdk4fu8g==&ch=ykpnrdyBmuMloDPpeMLXdPEe6qktK1fSqN25ImoNG5TrR6Xf60NGgw==)
---
|
---
| | |
## My mom would say, "Don't stop, keep going!"

## My mother, Mariana Holiday came to America on July 4th 1987, and she gave my family and me a deep love for this country.
##

## My mother was an incredibly strong woman who always left things better than she found them, invested herself wholly into whatever she was doing, and worked until the job was done. That is exactly what I will continue to do to honor my Mama's legacy.
###

---
|
---
| |
---
|
## A Peek at the Past Week
---
| | |
---
|
### April 4 - Caldwell, ID

Caldwell wants to DEFUND the anti-American activists who are being financed with our tax dollars.
---
| | |
---
|
### April 5 - Burley, ID

What is ESG?! People across the state are asking me this crucial question. It is how our nation's enemies weaponize corporations against us. No other candidate is better equipped to tackle it in Idaho. We need a finance man with a plan! Thank you United We Stand for hosting me tonight. A+ event!
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success: promises kept.

---
| [The Plan](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i6p3Spjj4IKGzRKoveXTf9Grmu-ZR89aT_2sWaKy1kK8A4CeialadT29ep4_lmbxylnVbUrGB5RlbrciZEM9wRz13QSIdX9uxeZEeBKz7ectSJGlkeAIa7a1YQk-_bxDZfLhnXJLDs0tdefzww3_Mh1iirTbbBtt&c=IdWn-rtnU5zaElVyRz_IgA6hlmcd7gm-yYOywgl6k0kpfNSdk4fu8g==&ch=ykpnrdyBmuMloDPpeMLXdPEe6qktK1fSqN25ImoNG5TrR6Xf60NGgw==)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
## Upcoming Events
---

### JOIN THE MOVEMENT

If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.

clean_body: | | | | | | | April 12, 2022 | | | | With a heavy heart I must inform you that my dear mother, Mariana passed away in my home last week. | | Here is some of what I've taken from this heartbreaking situation. | == | | | | My mom would say, "Don't stop, keep going!" My mother, Mariana Holiday came to America on July 4th 1987, and she gave my family and me a deep love for this country. My mother was an incredibly strong woman who always left things better than she found them, invested herself wholly into whatever she was doing, and worked until the job was done. That is exactly what I will continue to do to honor my Mama's legacy. | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | April 4 - Caldwell, ID Caldwell wants to DEFUND the anti-American activists who are being financed with our tax dollars. | | | | April 5 - Burley, ID What is ESG?! People across the state are asking me this crucial question. It is how our nation's enemies weaponize corporations against us. No other candidate is better equipped to tackle it in Idaho. We need a finance man with a plan! Thank you United We Stand for hosting me tonight. A+ event! | | | | | Principles Above Politics | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success: promises kept. | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | == | | | == | | | | | JOIN THE MOVEMENT If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho. | == | | == | | | | == | Ed Humphreys == P.O. Box 1667 Eagle, ID 83616 | == Stay Social! == == == | | | | | | | Humphreys for Governor | PO box 1667, Eagle, ID 83616 | | Sent by mailto:info@edforidaho.com in collaboration with |

name: Charles Booker
subject: Hi Peter, it’s me, Charles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

My name is Charles Booker, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate to
represent Kentucky against Rand Paul.

Our primary election is coming up and I know there are a lot of new folks
who just joined our team – so I wanted to reach out to introduce myself. 👋

As a born-and-raised Kentuckian, running for this seat isn’t just politics
to me. It’s a very personal decision, and I want to share with you a bit
about my story and why I’m the best person to fight for you and your
family. My story is Kentucky’s story. It’s a story of perseverance, faith,
and overcoming impossible obstacles.

I’m proud to share my story with you today. But before I get to that, I
have a favor to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220412?refcode=em20220412-1752&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1752_346206_g6P0rT&akid=1752%2E346206%2Eg6P0rT ]I hope you can chip in $10 or anything you can to help us raise $10,000
today. We’re only weeks away from our primary, and we want this campaign
to be in the strongest place possible.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/9132?refcode=em20220412-1752&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1752%2E346206%2Eg6P0rT ]Contribute $5 →

Peter, as a
part of this campaign, here are 10 things I want you to know about me:

Here are 10 things you should know:

1. I was born and raised in Louisville’s West End, one of the poorest ZIP
codes in Kentucky. Both of my parents had to drop out of high school to
help take care of my brothers and sisters. We sometimes had to go without
heat in the winter or air conditioning in the summer. My mom often went
without eating so that I could. These experiences inspired me to work in
public service and fight for the change our communities urgently need.

2. I got involved in public service because I believed Kentuckians
deserved better and that things could get better. When I was first elected
to the State House, I became the youngest Black legislator in Kentucky in
90 years. As a legislator, I fought for common sense gun discipline, lower
prescription drug costs, expanded voting rights, stronger labor unions,
and racial justice. And all around me, I started seeing evidence that
change is possible.

3. In 2020, I decided to take my fight for a better Kentucky to Mitch
McConnell. We built a ground-breaking movement. Our neighbors from the
hood to the holler rose up and together we showed the world that Kentucky
is a battleground state.

4. I saw how hungry Kentuckians were for bold change in that election so
shortly afterwards I founded Hood to the Holler — an organization focused
on community engagement and breaking down the barriers that have prevented
so many Kentuckians from participating in our election.

5. I’m a proud girl dad of three daughters. I want a future for them where
the color of her skin doesn’t determine their chances of experiencing
police violence. A future where they can breathe clean air, get a college
education without going into crippling debt, and not know what it’s like
to go to bed hungry. It’s a future we all want for our children.

6. Our politicians don’t represent us. The Kentucky that I know and love
is kind and hard-working. We showed up for each other to provide love and
support when the pandemic hit, and we were there for our neighbors when
the floodwaters rose and a storm knocked the power out. Our politicians,
though, they’re nowhere to be found. They’re voting to take away our
health care and basic relief in the middle of a pandemic. All the while
Rand Paul is just trying to make a profit off this pandemic and spreading
deadly misinformation.

7. I believe we can redefine our politics by replacing the old Southern
Strategy with a new one that lifts love and unity over hate and division.
We believe in a movement that ends structural inequity and breaks the
cycle of generational poverty. We believe Kentucky can thrive when we lift
up the voices of hardworking people from the forgotten places, and build a
new coalition of people from the hood to the holler

8. I’m proud to support Medicare for All so we can finally transform our
broken health care system. I nearly died three years ago because I
couldn’t afford my insulin. At that time, I didn’t have enough money to
take care of my girls, make sure they had food to eat, afford my
medication, and make it to the next pay day. I don’t want anyone to ever
have to feel that pain.

9. Our campaign is different. As Kentuckians, we all know what it’s like
to be ignored by politicians. That’s why we’re doing outreach in all 120
counties in Kentucky, from the hood to the holler, and having
conversations with folks from all walks of life. And that’s why we don’t
accept a single cent in donations from special interests, corporate PACs,
or Big Pharma.

10. Finally, I’m running for Senate because the people of Kentucky are my
family. My Grandad taught me that if someone disrespects one of us, they
have disrespected all of us. I am running for Senate because I am sick and
tired of seeing the lives of Kentuckians traded away for profit. We’ve
been disrespected long enough.

I love the Commonwealth of Kentucky. It is hard as hell to run for office
against cynicism and the big money machine, but the people of Kentucky are
my family, and you fight for family.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220412?refcode=em20220412-1752&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1752_346206_g6P0rT&akid=1752%2E346206%2Eg6P0rT ]Peter, my
name is Charles Booker, I am a lifelong Kentuckian, proud husband, father,
and the person who is going to retire Rand Paul this November. Please help
me win this race by chipping in today.

Thank you for being a part of this,
Peter.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220412-1752-footer&t=1022&refcode2=1752_346206_g6P0rT&akid=1752%2E346206%2Eg6P0rT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1752%2E346206%2Eg6P0rT

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
