name: American Defense News
subject: Is Hunter Being Left Out To Dry?
body:
American Defense News And Time for Feds to Investigate China Donations
to U Penn’s 'Biden Center'

name: Team Morse
subject: New fundraising record!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI2OTk5OTEwMjgwODYyNjY0JmM9ZzV5NCZlPTAmYj05NTYxNTE1NDYmZD1zNnU5aThu.VoC0-SOcQxzUKrTjEAl9ZkKPyw2FDn2Ht_Tnv-X40T0)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI2OTk5OTEwMjgwODYyNjY0JmM9ZzV5NCZlPTAmYj05NTYxNTE1NDkmZD1hNmo3aDFo.sS2sZbj6k0aHFyqos1B-LWk1e6-AlDIvb5eeQ4TfKqk)
---
| | | Friend, ****Just take a look at what the support of folks like you has led to here in the 603... **With****$750,000****raised in the first quarter of 2022, Chuck Morse has now hauled in more resources for a Republican U.S. Senate candidate in their first fundraising quarter in**** _New Hampshire HISTORY!_**

---
---
| |
---
| | [KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI2OTk5OTEwMjgwODYyNjY0JmM9ZzV5NCZlPTAmYj05NTYxNTE1NTgmZD1iMng4bzN0.9hxwpQylZvokSl08ZgBCateuci0JIrTiPH-getTGs0s)
---
---
| |
---
| You have helped send the message that the people of New Hampshire are tired of politicians who serve the interests of Washington more than the Granite State. This huge figure has come from more than 800 different donations, and from _every single county in the state of New Hampshire._ From Pittsburg to Pelham, and Hinsdale to Hampton, we are ready for a leader who will fight for the 603 Way, not the Washington, D.C. way! **And get this - the previous record holder was none other than the last successful Republican Senate candidate here in NH. We are poised to do something incredible for our state this November!**

---
---
| |
---
| | [HELP MAKE IT HAPPEN!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI2OTk5OTEwMjgwODYyNjY0JmM9ZzV5NCZlPTAmYj05NTYxNTE1NzcmZD1tNWQ3bjZs.5kTuwq0Kphl-3YM_cZZAi7jtR6yPhX-skNxERdrJao4)
---
---
| |
---
| Take a look at what Chuck had to say about this record-breaking haul:

---
---
| |
---
| _“The response from new supporters across New Hampshire has been overwhelming and humbling. My campaign continues to fundraise and organize across New Hampshire to take on Maggie Hassan, and we are positioning ourselves as the only Republican campaign running that will have the resources and organization necessary to win this fall.”_
---
---
| |
---
| While this figure is a tremendous sign, we can’t forget that Hassan and her powerful special interests are raising BIG dollars as well. This could be the closest and most expensive Senate race in the entire country, and we’ll need to keep up our momentum. **_[Can we count on you to keep this tremendous support going and continue to stand up for the 603? →](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI2OTk5OTEwMjgwODYyNjY0JmM9ZzV5NCZlPTAmYj05NTYxNTE1ODYmZD1xMGM2dTFn.I1rhX8L5JtMPsOX7RWl5uJPxaStU89xhDv0d-oQU6Lc)_**
---
---
| |
---
| | [RUSH IN $6.03](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI2OTk5OTEwMjgwODYyNjY0JmM9ZzV5NCZlPTAmYj05NTYxNTE2MDYmZD1xMXczbjN2.f9tNwomSXO9obMGWzo69asdsrnDKcTCBRIivMQK3u6M)
---
---
| |
---
| | [RUSH IN $50](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI2OTk5OTEwMjgwODYyNjY0JmM9ZzV5NCZlPTAmYj05NTYxNTE2MzAmZD12NGIwZzNq.wvOGSwMUvZ8Jz5hQYDH8AhDpnZUzT9VZzPqhlvWqLgo)
---
---
| |
---
| | [RUSH IN $100](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI2OTk5OTEwMjgwODYyNjY0JmM9ZzV5NCZlPTAmYj05NTYxNTE2NTQmZD1zOHowcThw.FOREpg8qkndO6pWGN_Oo3IlqrY59RnyoDjqhpMeJsKE)
---
---
| |
---
| | [RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTI2OTk5OTEwMjgwODYyNjY0JmM9ZzV5NCZlPTAmYj05NTYxNTE2ODEmZD14MXA0cjNn.FypD89U5IBwWSnaClsYf9D_GAwERou-TWomTeldtVaE)
---
---
| |
---
| Thank you for the support, _Team Morse_

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Hey Team,
Did you see this note from DASS Chair Jena Griswold this morning?
If not, we’re bumping it to the top of your inbox. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
DASS is facing an unprecedented challenge this November – millions of dollars from far-right billionaires and extremist activist groups are propping up ‘big lie’ supporting Republicans nationwide – and we need your help to fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
Give Jena’s note a read, and rush $10 right now to help us hit our critical 1,000 mid-month donation goal and stop the far-right from destroying our democracy! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
Team,
November might seem like a long way off, but it’ll be here before we know it. Critical Secretaries of State races across the country are heating up, and the DASS team and I need your support to win.
Will you rush $10 right now to help us hit our critical 1,000 grassroots gift mid-month goal? Democracy itself will be on the ballot this November, and we can’t win without you. >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
RUSH $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=5&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
RUSH $10 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
RUSH $25 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=25&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
RUSH $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=50&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
ANOTHER AMOUNT >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D&amount=50]
In Colorado: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D] Tina Peters, a big lie extremist has officially qualified for the ballot.
In Michigan: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D] Kristina Karamo held a HUGE rally with Donald Trump and a whole host of other ‘big lie’ extremists, and her campaign is closing in on voting rights champion Jocelyn Benson thanks to the surge in support she got from the MAGA base.
In Wisconsin: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D] ‘big lie’ candidates swept local races last week, setting the stage for a tough fight ahead of us.
Team, it’s clear we have our work cut out for us. We need to mobilize and organize now, before it’s too late. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
And we can only do that with your help. We set an ambitious 1,000 donation goal because we need an unprecedented surge of grassroots support to win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
Democracy is on the line – will you rush $10 right now to help us hit our goal, and save it? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=10&refcode=EM_FR_041222_B4_AC_30D]
Grateful for your support,
Jena Griswold
DASS is a national organization supporting the election of Democratic Secretaries of State who are committed to protecting and preserving voting rights and ballot access for all Americans through fair, honest, open, and accurate elections.
Help us fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda by pitching in today!
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=footer-button&amount=25]

And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future. | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? body:

Team — it's Meg, Finance Director of Team Maggie here. I just left a meeting with our team and wanted to share some updates with you.

I know you've heard from us a lot lately, and that's because there's a lot at stake in this race. Right now, the GOP is spending millions against Maggie to ensure that she loses in November. And if she loses, Democrats could lose the Senate majority. But you already know this race is extremely critical. **Today, I want to share how your grassroots donation helps us win. **

Just last week, folks from all across New Hampshire, like Barbara from Rye, Barry from Manchester, Paul from Nashua, Patricia from Berlin, and hundreds of others donated to our campaign. (Thank you all for your support!) And by the time you read this email, dozens more will have chipped in.

You see, grassroots campaigns like ours can only win with the support of people like you. We rely on your donations to help us hire staff to communicate with voters across the state, run television and digital ads to amplify the Senator’s record of getting results, and mobilize organizers who are putting in tireless hours to defend the Senate.

We couldn't do any of these things without folks like Barbara, Barry, Paul, Patricia, **and** **you** , giving $5, $10, $25 when it matters most.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Richard=20Painter?=
subject: America has a corruption problem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RICHARD PAINTER FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| **Justice Clarence Thomas’s wife Ginni Thomas** texted Trump’s Chief of Staff to plot ways to overturn our democratic election to keep Trump in office and was an organizer of the rally that became the January 6 Insurrection.
---
| | Friend, America has a corruption problem... You know that I have spent years calling out the corruption in our politics. And as your Congressman, I will fight to clean up our government to ensure it is transparent and accountable. Over the last few weeks, this corruption has been on full display: **Insider trading and conflicts of interest in Congress.** Members of Congress continue to trade stocks in companies affected by the bills they vote on.**_Congress should ban Representatives and Senators from trading in stocks of individual companies._** **Justice Clarence Thomas’s wife Ginni Thomas. **Ginni Thomas texted Trump’s Chief of Staff to plot ways to overturn our democratic election to keep Trump in office and was an organizer of the rally that became the January 6 Insurrection. Meanwhile, Justice Thomas participated in cases before the Supreme Court that dealt with the 2020 election results, and was the sole vote to keep Trump’s White House records, which included his wife’s text messages, secret._**Congress needs to pass a law requiring the Supreme Court to have and enforce an ethics code that prevents such conflicts of interest.**_ **Former President Trump continues to raise enormous amounts of cash for his political action committee and his new social media platform.** We know that Trump is Vladimir Putin’s favorite candidate for the White House, but we have no idea where his money is coming from. _**Congress must pass legislation fixing our corrupt campaign finance system and protect our elections from foreign influence.**_ Corruption is one of the biggest threats to our democracy, especially when it targets our elections and the transfer of power. If Republicans take over the House, they will disband the January 6 Committee to keep Americans from finding out the truth about what happened on January 6. We can’t let that happen. As a Member of Congress, I will focus on addressing corruption at all levels while ensuring the House tackles the serious issues facing our country. But I will need your help to hold those in power accountable. Can you help me today so that I can work for you in Congress? [**A contribution of $5, $25, $100 or whatever you're able will bring us one step closer to victory.**](https://gmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b5e28d948d577e19f5422e846&id=bb2932c275&e=8914b14955) Thank you for your consideration. Warm regards,

Richard Painter
Candidate for Minnesota's 1st District
---
| |
---

subject: Comedian Blackmails Congress with Data from Unspeakable 'FanFiction’ Ads
body:
And Montana Stands Up To Biden’s Gun Control

| Team,

I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine, I can assure you it’s a gift.

And while I know our campaign sends a lot of emails your way, I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and why your support is so important to our success.

The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down.

We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money.

You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. Many of you were a part of that victory.

But now we have a new mission: Re-election.

And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again, it’s going to take a similar level of support from people like you.

So please:

**[Can you make a $10 contribution to the Arizona Democratic Party? The amount you give isn’t as important as the number of donations we receive. clean_body: | | | I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time. | | | ?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-im-in-one-of-the-closest-races-in-the-country-3&emailreferrer=email1507885subject1970685&emailsubject=i-have-about-15-minutes | Team, I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine, I can assure you it’s a gift. And while I know our campaign sends a lot of emails your way, I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and why your support is so important to our success. The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down. We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money. You know the rest... we won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. Many of you were a part of that victory. But now we have a new mission: Re-election. And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again, it’s going to take a similar level of support from people like you. So please: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you again. For everything. Mark Kelly For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . What a week it’s been, Peter! A week ago tonight at the Congressional Assembly, I was humbled to secure the Democratic nomination for Colorado’s 8th District. **That we were able to clear the field without having to go through a primary is the clearest signal yet that Democrats are united behind this campaign.** We all understand that we _must_ win this election if we have any chance of holding the House of Representatives, protecting choice, protecting our planet, standing up to big corporations, and lowering costs for working families who are struggling to make ends meet. [**There’s a long, long way to go yet, so can you make a contribution today to keep building on this momentum?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44061500/339922783/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220412mm1coalit_dyc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjI1ZWU0Ni05ZmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quUyKYQ2HEDymtxVhfXYkQ__0VvlIkYy0UWVVDXX1lo=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44061501/339922784/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220412mm1coalit_dyc_allop_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjI1ZWU0Ni05ZmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quUyKYQ2HEDymtxVhfXYkQ__0VvlIkYy0UWVVDXX1lo=)
---
Our coalition is the families I see in my pediatrics practice, more than 65% of whom are on Medicaid.
It’s the scientists and climate advocates who have been sounding the alarm for years, while Congress continues to drag their feet and fails to take action.
It’s the workers, both union members and not, who are fed up with corporations taking advantage of them, suppressing wages while hauling in record profits.
It’s the Latino community — including my own family and the neighbors I grew up with — who have never had their voices represented in Congress, and who face the worst effects of voter suppression in our state.
**Together, this coalition will ensure that working families from Commerce City up to Greeley will have a representative in Congress who will advocate for them — not just the powerful few.**
It’s time for our voices to be represented in Washington — but we need your help to get there. [**A grassroots contribution of any amount goes a long way towards building the kind of resilient, small-dollar power we’ll need to win in November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44061502/339922785/-679993507?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220412mm1coalit_dyc_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjI1ZWU0Ni05ZmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quUyKYQ2HEDymtxVhfXYkQ__0VvlIkYy0UWVVDXX1lo=)

Dr. Yadira Caraveo

| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Send Corey 2022
subject: Are you ready? We're ramping up to fight like never before!
body:
The red wave will be YUGE! I hope you'll join me in my fight to save America.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mprUwxy0SPX8LoPYk-iYGuRsVVCB8PXE0dGUZMfsP73qL5f2H7XDA4Flk8ogP5uDEEIfhSJA8dtYG2jDHiVZcdZ1d_JbZ6qMPl9njNuECFxvtTWi6ULeTgSVTu-y14ARBNAU9CXVNpcb2MfTE3y2_g==&c=Iq7YkDSMkEpitSM3BzvTfJe2ykEveHg2tpbvVMxrobpR7o2ol_CA9w==&ch=b_GaVa2vKQ4hhrvGxyfefgWoFa1dTdqH8WnVv1Awj6jMgGbYqX7Wkg==)
---
Hello fellow patriots!
---
In the coming days, we will announce a list of community engagement events throughout the district. We also have some very big and exciting announcements just around the corner. And will be activating our passionate volunteers soon. A recruitment and leadership meeting will take place next week, location and time to be announced.
One way anyone can help is to donate, but I understand how challenging these times are. We are asking those with the means to commit to a recurring $25/month donation through the primary. This will help us continue to reach, motivate and activate our communities.
---

Corey Gibson

body:
We’re already one week into early voting. Read more >> | | | | [ ](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=c941a7b6a2&e=683c601116)
---
| | | Peter,

The Indiana Republican Primary is being held on Tuesday, May 3rd, but we’d like to encourage you to vote early.

By voting early you can avoid the long lines on Election Day, and help Jennifer-Ruth build an early lead in this race!

Every registered Indiana voter is eligible to vote early. And you can vote Monday-Saturday at your local clerk’s office, now through May 2nd.

**Peter, it’s so important that every one of Jennifer-Ruth’s supporters gets out and votes for her in this primary. Will you sign the pledge to vote and let us know when you plan to cast your ballot?**
---
| [ ](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=be2320ada3&e=683c601116)
---

---
| There’s so much at stake right now, and Jennifer-Ruth needs your help to win the GOP nomination, flip this seat red, and help take back the House. So please, make your plan to vote ASAP!

Thanks for your vital support,

Team Green

name: Gerry Austin
subject: Explanation
body:
Hello Friends,

First, thanks to everyone for your prayers and support.

Saturday, April 9, I posted on Facebook that I walked out of the NC GOP 6th District Convention. Y'all deserve an explanation.

Tina Forsberg is the chair of the 6th District. Before I go further I want it known, i respect Tina.

If you read the entire "comments" thread on my FB post, you will see a conversation between Tina and I. You will also see evidence where I proved the GOP as an organization is showing favoritism toward a candidate at my detriment.

I was raised and I have lived a life to respect rules and others. Some people do not.

If you tell me I have 3 minutes to speak then I respect you when you stop me at 3 minutes and I stop.

What I DO NOT respect is when you allow a specific candidate to continue for 8, 9, or more minutes and you make NO attempt to stop them.

That has been done to me more than half a dozen times.

So, with that in mind, after being disrespected yet again, I left the D6 convention.

If you disagree, I respect that. If you want to speak with me, you can call anytime or respond to this email.

Whatever comes from it, now you know the truth.

Respectfully,

Gerry

**Gerry Austin**

AustinNC@protonmail.com

Sent with [ProtonMail](https://protonmail.com/) secure email.

name: Team Welch
subject: We won’t stop until this is the law of the land
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We need Medicare for All, and we need it now.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=228%2E61531%2EN5pb8r)
Hello,
Health care is a human right.
But right now, across Vermont and the country, people without insurance can’t afford to pay their deductibles. People with diabetes can’t afford their insulin. People can’t afford to take care of their families, all because of our broken health care system.
It’s the most inefficient system in the world, and we all suffer as a result.
[**That’s why it’s so important we band together to ensure Medicare for All becomes the law of the land. We need to prioritize health over profit. Add your name if you agree.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-medicare-for-all/?source=em_20220412_p_t_m4a&t=3&akid=228%2E61531%2EN5pb8r)
Medicare for All would mean a simplified health care system. It would mean lower costs, and fewer barriers to receiving necessary care. Preventive health care would be much easier to get, which means more Vermonters and Americans would get to live longer, happier, healthier lives.
Peter is a founding member of the Medicare for All Caucus in the House, and is ready to fight on Day One to get this done.
But he can’t do this alone—not without a grassroots movement fighting by his side.
[**It’s time for no more uninsured Americans. It’s time to pass Medicare for All. Add your name if you agree.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-medicare-for-all/?source=em_20220412_p_t_m4a&t=4&akid=228%2E61531%2EN5pb8r)

Thanks,
Team Welch

---

name: John Fetterman
subject: Wow, seriously dude?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The whole ad is full of gross misrepresentations, especially the fact that they found a rare photo of me wearing a suit.
#
Derek,
As Democrats, we all know that Republicans *love* to smear Democrats as scary bogeyman “socialists.”
**Well, uh, we recently found out that Connor Lamb’s super PAC is spending nearly <checks notes> half a MILLION dollars in dark money on TV attack ads to do JUST THAT to me.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47260?refcode=em20220412-5325&t=1&akid=5325%2E434096%2EyFxnSl)
_The whole ad is full of gross misrepresentations, especially the fact that they found a rare photo of me wearing a suit_ 🙄
This is a *big* deal, Derek. It’s the FIRST time that a fellow Democrat has weaponized paid media to attack me during this primary. I mean, come on my dude.
**Plus, this ad is SO dishonest it was taken down by a TV network in PA’s biggest media market AND rated “False” by Politifact.**
Call me crazy, but I don't believe that Democrats should be doing the GOP’s job for them — _and certainly not with stone-cold attack lines straight outta the Republicans 101 textbook._ 🤔
**[If you believe the same thing I do, can you please rush $5 now to help me respond to this baseless attack? We gotta raise as much money as possible to show Conor Lamb + his super PAC that these dumb attacks are going to backfire.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47260?refcode=em20220412-5325&t=2&akid=5325%2E434096%2EyFxnSl)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47260?refcode=em20220412-5325&amounts=5&t=21&akid=5325%2E434096%2EyFxnSl)**
Derek, I truly can’t think of a greater contrast to these super PAC attack ads than our people-powered campaign.
I mean, Conor Lamb’s super PAC is *literally* run by D.C. insiders with deep ties to corporate interests + funded by mega-rich donors writing enormous checks.
Meanwhile, just a few days ago we announced raising $3.1 MILLION in Q1 with an average contribution of like $28 and over 23,000 new donors. Plus, unlike Conor Lamb’s campaign, we are up on the airwaves (TV + digital) getting our own *positive* message across.
Let me be clear: **Conor Lamb’s super PAC ad is one last desperate attempt to save a campaign that’s stuck at 10% as of the last poll.**
It won’t work — especially if we can raise a lot of money today online to make it clear these kinds of attacks on fellow Democrats are B.S. and will backfire. For every dollar they spend, we’ll try to raise twice as much to show them what we’re made of.
It’s not an exaggeration to say our campaign would be nowhere without the determination, strength, and love from all of YOU. We’re running this race the right way, and we know we can win with your continued support.
**[Are you with me on that? Then donate $5 now to help us fend off these phony attacks from Conor Lamb’s super PAC and show that they only make us stronger heading into the general election.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47260?refcode=em20220412-5325&t=22&akid=5325%2E434096%2EyFxnSl)**
Before I sign off, I have to tell you how grateful I am.
It’s only because of this community, and because of the deep support we have in every corner of Pennsylvania, that we can brush off these attacks and live to fight another day in the General. Me + Gisele + the whole team are deeply appreciative of all your support, whether it’s been financial, volunteer help, or spreading the word about our campaign. It means the world. 😭
Thank you, again, for having my back. Let’s WIN this together.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220412-5325-footer&t=23&refcode2=5325_434096_yFxnSl&akid=5325%2E434096%2EyFxnSl)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=5325%2E434096%2EyFxnSl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5325%2E434096%2EyFxnSl)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: | | | Peter, We’re coming to you today to share the most effective way to support the Primary Sinema Project and all of the on-the-ground grassroots organizing we’re funding in Arizona: monthly recurring donations. We’re up against Kyrsten Sinema, Peter, and what that really means is we’re up against her millionaire and corporate donors who line her pockets because they know she’ll act in their best interests in the Senate. We’re here to prove that the people are more powerful than Sinema and her millionaire donors. We’re here to show her that her actions DO have consequences and that she won’t be allowed another term. To do that we need your monthly investment. Your monthly investment would help allow our team to plan more strategically. If we know we can count on a certain amount of money coming in each month, then we can make more long-term investments — like supporting more grassroots organizations in Arizona who are leading the fight to hold Sinema accountable. Even committing just $3/month is more helpful to us than one $25 donation, because then we know we can count on that $3 coming in every month. Thank you for being a part of this fight, Primary Sinema Project P.S. If you are unable to commit to a monthly donation at this time, we completely understand. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. name: =?utf-8?B?UGF1bCBkZSBsYSBQZcOxYQ==?=
subject: Building our ground game
body:
Hello, Peter, this is Paul, John’s campaign manager.

I wanted to give you an update about where things are on the ground in TX-23.

The truth is, we’re not quite where I would like us to be — so we are working really hard to expand our presence and build up our ground game in the district.

Will you make a donation now to help us get boots on the ground across TX-23? Texans deserve a representative who will hear all of our voices — but first we have to get him there.

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220412?refcode=em20220412]

Because of the size and distance between those in the district, it will be difficult and expensive to meet people where they are, but it's something this campaign is determined to do because John wants to meet as many people of TX-23 face to face as possible.

We have big plans to knock doors and attend events all over the district. This is how we can talk to voters directly to make sure that we are putting John’s campaign in the best position possible as the general election really starts heating up.

This race is not going to be an easy fight, and the closer we get to November, the harder it’s going to be. But John is no stranger to hard fights — he was a Marine, and he has been fighting for change as a public servant for the past 20 years.

Our team knows that we need to start building now for the fight to come. Will you join us and make a donation right now to help expand our field program and set us up for success as we move forward?

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220412?refcode=em20220412]

Let’s get to work,
Paul de la Peña
Campaign Manager

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220412?refcode=em20220412]

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States
John Lira is a retired member of the US Marines. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Marines or the Department of Defense.

| | Team, It’s going to take all of us coming together to deliver real, transformational change for working people in Massachusetts. I’m so proud of what our campaign has accomplished so far: from criss-crossing the Commonwealth to putting out comprehensive plans that address some of our most pressing issues to building a broad coalition with local and national endorsers, it makes clear the issues at stake in this race and that we’re here to win. And our support continues to grow. I’m proud to report that Our Revolution Massachusetts is the most recent organization to endorse our campaign for Governor, and I’m so honored to have their support. [_**We’re hard at work building a strong coalition that will be crucial to winning this race. Can you chip in $15 to join us and say you’re ready for change in Massachusetts now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44062192/339925744/5769926?refcode=em_20220412_f_s_ourrev&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjlmOWM1ZC1hM2JhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r55RBauCIVUF0TiUzZhx2qATdq0Dckw1Eu48bTHAQy4=) Folks across the Commonwealth — from Springfield to Lowell to Revere and everywhere in between — are facing real challenges. And if we’re going to tackle affordable housing, education, a Green New Deal, better transit, racial justice, and more, we need to work together to get this done. [_**I can’t do it alone. clean_body: Are you with us? | | | | | Team, It’s going to take all of us coming together to deliver real, transformational change for working people in Massachusetts. I’m so proud of what our campaign has accomplished so far: from criss-crossing the Commonwealth to putting out comprehensive plans that address some of our most pressing issues to building a broad coalition with local and national endorsers, it makes clear the issues at stake in this race and that we’re here to win. And our support continues to grow. I’m proud to report that Our Revolution Massachusetts is the most recent organization to endorse our campaign for Governor, and I’m so honored to have their support. = Folks across the Commonwealth — from Springfield to Lowell to Revere and everywhere in between — are facing real challenges. And if we’re going to tackle affordable housing, education, a Green New Deal, better transit, racial justice, and more, we need to work together to get this done. = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. name: Dr. Annie
subject: I’m in this for you, not the political clout – Mace can’t say the same
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
While I’ve been busy working in the hospital and advocating for policies that would truly benefit Lowcountry families, our Congresswoman has been actively working to hurt our community by opposing life-saving legislation.

| While I’ve been busy working in the hospital and advocating for policies that would truly benefit Lowcountry families, our Congresswoman has been actively working to hurt our community by opposing life-saving legislation.

**This month, Nancy Mace voted _against_ capping the cost of insulin – a widely supported measure. I’ve seen firsthand how pressing issues like this one affect working families.**

Mace’s opposition to critical healthcare legislation makes it clear how urgently we need a change of leadership.

[But here’s the thing: Mace just reported her fundraising numbers – _$1.2 million this past quarter_ – and we need to step it up to ensure we don’t fall behind. Help us keep up the strength of our grassroots campaign by rushing a $10 donation before the end of this week→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44062320/339926656/2025654280?amount=10&refcode=AA_EM_FR_1MO_220412_1_1&refcode2=&contactdata=PzZ5/ztXSVn9AP2vpSMSMVSEVvq6TtM+R0RwC2jDOKzJ2K+MsBRo2Ct1+P5xgy2Z&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGNmMmI4Ni1hM2JhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BP8hAX1BRTpDPQxouTYn9Ifc2R9LGZ2V6c_2Re3GjAg=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

Not only that, but her own opponent, Katie Arrington, has given herself half a million dollars to compete and rumor has it Donald Trump, who endorsed Arrington, is coming back to our district to campaign for her.

My opponents will do whatever it takes to gain the endorsement of far-right politicians and rally their conservative voter base, **even if it means neglecting the health and happiness of the people of the Lowcountry for their own political gain.**

This is why it’s so important we keep our momentum high in order to defeat our far-right opponents this November. The Lowcountry deserves better than this.

This month, Nancy Mace voted against capping the cost of insulin – a widely supported measure. I’ve seen firsthand how pressing issues like this one affect working families. Mace’s opposition to critical healthcare legislation makes it clear how urgently we need a change of leadership. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Not only that, but her own opponent, Katie Arrington, has given herself half a million dollars to compete and rumor has it Donald Trump, who endorsed Arrington, is coming back to our district to campaign for her. My opponents will do whatever it takes to gain the endorsement of far-right politicians and rally their conservative voter base, even if it means neglecting the health and happiness of the people of the Lowcountry for their own political gain. This is why it’s so important we keep our momentum high in order to defeat our far-right opponents this November. The Lowcountry deserves better than this. = = Thank you for being a part of my team, Dr. Annie | = | = Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress PO BOX 1431 Johns Island, SC 29457 United States **

subject: WE MADE THE BALLOT!
body:
The Secretary of State has verified our petition signatures and we had 1,744 good ones (we needed only 1500). | | | |
---
| | |
#### Exciting News to Share:
# _Neal Walia is on the Ballot!_
We are pleased to share with you that Neal Walia is officially on the primary ballot for Congressional District One! The Secretary of State has informed us that we had 1,744 good signatures, you can [s](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=5ea2e4d259&e=e67cbb3f92)[ee their report here](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=8f4ab797aa&e=e67cbb3f92).
---

|

|

### We Could Not Have Done This Without
The people power that has already brought our campaign so far!
* Our 33+ Volunteers who gathered petition signatures!
* The Individual Contributions that make up this grassroots campaign!
* The support of our community who helped us prep supplies, host events and beyond!

| [Visit Our Website](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=5ff1575a77&e=e67cbb3f92 "Visit Our Website")

| Neal Walia is now one-on-one with a 25+ year corporate backed incumbent. Whomever wins the primary in June will become the next Representative for Congressional District One here in Colorado. As there is no republican running it is both possible and more imperative than ever that we elect a truly progressive candidate to represent this district.

In Celebration of Our 1,774 Verified Signatures [_**consider donating $17.44 today!**_](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=e4eea13ca8&e=e67cbb3f92)Now that we are on the ballot we need every cent to help GET OUT THE VOTE! Together we have already accomplished so much, and now we can win this District!

By only accepting donations from individuals this campaign is not tied to the funding of big corporations who continue to pollute the environment, stall healthcare as a human right, and price people out of their homes and neighborhoods. Together we can elect the first person of color to ever represent this district. We can elect someone who is a renter, who owes student loan debt, who feels threatened by the rolling back of our basic rights across the nation.

Together we can DO DENVER BETTER!

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Do you have a moment?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
Erica is running in a must-win swing district to defend our Democratic House majority.
#
Hi, it's Elizabeth Warren.
**I am proud to endorse Erica Smith in her campaign for Congress in North Carolina’s 1st District.**
As a single mom, minister, educator, and former state legislator, Erica has been a champion for her community for years, and she’s the progressive fighter we need in Congress.
[**Her primary election is just five weeks away. Can you help elect Erica by making a donation today? Your contribution will make a real difference to get out the vote in these powerfully important final weeks.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48617?refcode=em20220412-1082&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1082%2E3698%2EtFYnRt)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48617?refcode=em20220412-1082&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1082%2E3698%2EtFYnRt)**
Here’s one reason I’m very happy to support Erica: she knows that policy is personal. She knows what it means to work all day to put food on the family table, to fight to survive while being crushed by medical bills and student debt, and to drop out of school because of poor rural broadband access.
And she’s ready to fight back against corporations and special interests that have rigged the rules to benefit the wealthy and well-connected at the expense of working people.
**Erica is running in a must-win swing district to defend our Democratic House majority.** She has a plan to protect this seat and deliver a Rural New Deal that will lift up family farms, raise the minimum wage, unionize the South, and provide universal broadband and healthcare for ALL.
[**I’m fired up to work with her in Congress — but we’ve got to make sure she wins this critical primary election. If you can, please make a donation to support Erica’s campaign today.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/48617?refcode=em20220412-1082&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1082%2E3698%2EtFYnRt)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220412-1082-footer&t=22&refcode2=1082_3698_tFYnRt&akid=1082%2E3698%2EtFYnRt)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=1082%2E3698%2EtFYnRt)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1082%2E3698%2EtFYnRt)

PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Reform Emergency Powers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
We NEED to reform emergency powers and REDUCE the power of the executive branch. | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=f6a980737f&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Republicans,
We must **NEVER** forget what Governor Walz did to our small businesses, our kids, and all of our lives through his heavy-handed lockdowns and mandates. No Governor should **EVER** be able to get away with this abuse of power ever again. _**We NEED to reform emergency powers and REDUCE the power of the executive branch.**_

**A Woman in the Arena**

Throughout Governor Walz’s emergency powers, I was on the front lines battling his tyranny. Why? Because I saw an authoritarian who was abusing his power and doing irreparable harm to our families and especially our kids.

I voted to end Governor Walz’s emergency powers every chance I got and to strip his authority to close our businesses, our schools, and mandate vaccinations.

I sponsored a bill that would have given the legislature veto power over all his totalitarian actions and fought tooth and nail against the Democrats who defended him.

Others stayed on the sidelines. They thought complaining on social media could get the job done but I know the **only way you get things done is by fighting evil and destroying it.**

**_I fought like hell for our rights as a legislator and accomplished a lot but the ONLY way we END this reign of terror is by BEATING Governor Walz!_**
---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=069d8f95a5&e=9d6926af69)
---
| **A Guardian for Your Rights** In the Senate, I **STOPPED** terrible Democrat (and spineless Republican) legislation that would have stripped rights from the preborn, allowed babies to be murdered moments before birth, forced vaccinations on all of our children without parental consent, put mandatory masking into state law, destroyed our medical privacy rights, created socialized medicine and so much more.

They told me I was heartless, that it would be easier for business if our medical information was less private, and that I was killing people.

They relentlessly called me names and told me, a woman, that I was destroying the rights of women. Through all the opposition, I remained steadfast in my determination because this is BIGGER than me.

_**This is about our rights, our kids, our families, and no amount of criticism will shake me from MY conservative principles.**_
---
| **Your Support**

Together we can fight to create a Safer, Better, and Stronger Minnesota!

We have a long road to get through the state convention next month and the general election in November but we can defeat Tim Walz and put Minnesota on the right track.

**If you can help please donate by making a secure donation today at [https://secure.winred.com/michelle-for-minnesota/donate](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=689326a245&e=9d6926af69)**

Sincerely,

[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c5be18b808&e=9d6926af69)
Michelle Benson
[Candidate for Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=bcaafaad2c&e=9d6926af69)

PS
Don’t hesitate to visit my website at [www.michelle4mn.com](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=a37ebfb99b&e=9d6926af69) or to reach out via email: [Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com](mailto:Michelle@MichelleForMNGovernor.com) or by phone at (612) 356-2256 if you have any questions or would like to volunteer to help my campaign.
---
| [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=8b791ceea2&e=9d6926af69)
---
| [VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE](mailto:Team@MichelleForMinnesota.com?subject=I%20would%20like%20to%20volunteer%20to%20help%20Michelle "VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE")
---
| [SUPPORT MICHELLE BY DONATING](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=189a66e730&e=9d6926af69 "SUPPORT MICHELLE BY DONATING")

name: Laura Loomer
subject: McCarthy too weak to take on Biden!
body:
As reported this week, House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, is "not looking to impeach Biden."
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/rF892lVRTd0HdDi892ymc0u763rQ/jpD763qEYAK5J6cMOK9763R7ZQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/rF892lVRTd0HdDi892ymc0u763rQ/jpD763qEYAK5J6cMOK9763R7ZQ)It's inevitable!

We're taking back the House in 2022, and every single Republican Incumbent should have the passion and resolve to stop Joe Biden's Communist Regime and hold him accountable for the rapid destruction of our nation.

But, as reported this week, House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, is "not looking to impeach Biden."

While McCarthy didn't rule it out in the article of course, to save face with the TRUE Republican base, his plan is to do what typical career politicians do . . . **let things get even worse, by not fighting back so the politicians continue to maintain power.**

I'm not going to stand for this, Kevin McCarthy must be forced to lead the impeachment of Joe Biden, and that's why I need your help to get to Congress. Please, [back my campaign today](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/rF892lVRTd0HdDi892ymc0u763rQ/jpD763qEYAK5J6cMOK9763R7ZQ).

McCarthy has proven time and time again that he's unwilling to hold his own party members accountable for siding with the Communists in Congress. Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger - who serve on the January 6th Commission - **are working FOR the Democrats** , and this is not even a concern to Kevin.

The many political prisoners who are being tortured and are rotting away in jail for simply supporting President Donald Trump, are also not of concern to Kevin McCarthy.

**McCarthy is diehard establishment, and I think we can all agree the establishment has done enough damage.**

**The GOP Establishment must be stopped AT ALL COSTS!**

We need a strong voice in Congress who will hold both the Democrats, and the RINO's accountable!

And I'm ready for the job!

We truly need a hostile takeover of the GOP, **and I 'm leading the charge!**

My primary election is rapidly approaching, and I need all the support I can get. [If you haven't already done so this month, please make a donation to support my run for Congress today.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/rF892lVRTd0HdDi892ymc0u763rQ/jpD763qEYAK5J6cMOK9763R7ZQ)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mitchell?=
subject: SWAN FUNDRAISING ALERT: FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN SPIRIT
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends, We’re facing an economic crisis of epic proportions. Inflation is higher than it’s been at any time in recent memory. The supply shortages and long lines of the 1970’s are going to quickly return. This was all avoidable. We had the strongest economy the world has ever seen under President Donald Trump. We didn’t just have record unemployment, we had record EMPLOYMENT! Barely a year of Democrat rule and we’ve lost our energy independence, our economy, and our respect and leadership on the world stage. This has got to STOP! It is going to take strong leadership in Washington, not feel-good talking points. I’m running for Congress to do more than just “vote the right way", I’m running to provide true leadership and direction in DC. But I can’t do that without you. Join the fight by **[donating](https://colonelswanforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0368302df230e4a82cd29bd86&id=fe2094fe5c&e=85e5151e18)** $5, $10, $25, or even $50 to send a strong, conservative leader to Congress. Thank you for your faith and your support. I look forward to serving as your next 10th District representative. Semper Fidelis, Colonel Mitchell Swan

name: Brett Broesder, Democrats Serve
subject: A Senate pick up opportunity in the Show Me State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
We’re proud to be endorsing Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate.

| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44063125/339930151/192917737?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.15_X_footer_X_F1_S1_C1__footer&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.12_b1_ks-sen_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxZDAyOWI0LWE3YmEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_aDHSms_UCh0eOYFqqcoIAb75o8YlxUbUbMH2T0vRrM=)
---
Peter -- this year, it’s critical to protect and expand our Senate majority.

And we have a great opportunity to do exactly that in Missouri.

That’s why we’re proud to be endorsing Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44063126/339930152/-412264004?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.04.12_b1_ks-sen_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.12_b1_ks-sen_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxZDAyOWI0LWE3YmEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_aDHSms_UCh0eOYFqqcoIAb75o8YlxUbUbMH2T0vRrM=) Let me introduce him:
* Lucas is a 13-year Marine veteran, national security expert, and antitrust advocate running to take Missouri's open U.S. Senate seat back for working people.
* After three deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, Lucas was stationed at the Pentagon, where he served on the Joint Staff to contain the threat of nuclear and chemical weapons from around the globe.
* He later represented the United States in arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia.
* After active duty, he became the National Security Director for the American Economic Liberties Project, where he fought back against the corporate monopolists and corrupt politicians who strip our communities for parts while undermining our security.

Whether it’s protecting our safety and security at home -- or safeguarding our freedom abroad -- Lucas has a proven track record of getting things done.

**[Peter, it’s time to send him to the U.S. Senate. Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

To help level the playing field, Democrats Serve was born. Since launching in May 2021, of the 29 endorsed candidates who have appeared on a ballot so far, every single one has won their election.

For the 2022 midterms, the PAC has made endorsements nationwide in competitive elections, including: U.S. Senate Candidates Cheri Beasley (NC), Val Demings (FL), and Sarah Godlewski (WI); U.S. House Candidates Christina Bohannan (IA-01), Matt Castelli (NY-21), Jasmine Crockett (TX-30), Val Foushee (NC-06), Kara Hahn (NY-1), Jonathan Logemann (IL-17), Seth Magaziner (RI-02), Karin Norington-Reaves (IL-01), Ruben Ramirez (TX-15), and Tony Vargas (NE-2); Incumbent House Democrats Carolyn Bourdeaux (GA-07), Jahana Hayes (CT-05), Andy Kim (NJ-03), Tom Malinowski (NJ-07), Tom O'Halleran (AZ-01), Katie Porter (CA-45), Mikie Sherrill (NJ-11), Abigail Spanberger (VA-07), Elissa Slotkin (MI-08), Lauren Underwood (IL-14), and Susan Wild (PA-07); Gubernatorial Candidate Katie Hobbs (AZ); and Attorney General Candidate Aramis Ayala (FL).

If you’d like to support Democrats Serve, you can [click here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44063136/339930162/-1840301555?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.02.15_X_footer_X_F1_S1_C1__footer&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.12_b1_ks-sen_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxZDAyOWI0LWE3YmEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_aDHSms_UCh0eOYFqqcoIAb75o8YlxUbUbMH2T0vRrM=) to make a donation.

clean_body: We’re proud to be endorsing Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate. | = Peter -- this year, it’s critical to protect and expand our Senate majority. And we have a great opportunity to do exactly that in Missouri. That’s why we’re proud to be endorsing Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate. = Let me introduce him: Lucas is a 13-year Marine veteran, national security expert, and antitrust advocate running to take Missouri's open U.S. Senate seat back for working people. After three deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan, Lucas was stationed at the Pentagon, where he served on the Joint Staff to contain the threat of nuclear and chemical weapons from around the globe. He later represented the United States in arms control negotiations with NATO and Russia. After active duty, he became the National Security Director for the American Economic Liberties Project, where he fought back against the corporate monopolists and corrupt politicians who strip our communities for parts while undermining our security. Whether it’s protecting our safety and security at home -- or safeguarding our freedom abroad -- Lucas has a proven track record of getting things done. = | = = = = = = We cannot let Republicans win this open seat. The Republican frontrunner in this race -- former Missouri governor Eric Greitens who resigned in 2018 following sexual assault allegations -- is facing a wave of newly publicized allegations that include assaulting his ex-wife and kids, according to Politico. Missourians deserve better. That's why Lucas Kunce -- who has a deep commitment to public service and a track record of fighting for all Missourians and Americans -- is a needed voice in the U.S. Senate. = Let's get this done! name: Joe Kent
subject: Worse than Liz Cheney???
body:
Dear Patriot,
Can you imagine a "Republican" member of Congress worse than Liz Cheney?
She exists. Her name is Jaime Herrera Beutler, and I'm running against her in Washington State's 3rd Congressional District.
Not only did she vote for President Trump's impeachment and Pelosi's January 6th Committee, but her "greatest hits" include voting for:
- Certifying the fraudulent 2020 General Election.
- Halting construction of President Trump's border wall.
- Amnesty for illegal aliens.
- The vaccine database.
- Red flag laws to take away your guns without due process.
- Funding for Planned Parenthood.
- Keeping Obamacare in place.
- Stopping President Trump's troop withdrawal from Syria.
Will you help me defeat her with a donation today at [https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA)?
The last bullet point above is personal to me. Like me, my wife also wore our nation's uniform and was killed in Syria two months after President Trump first tried to withdraw our troops. As a member of Congress, I will dedicate myself to keeping our country's young men and women out of war zones with no direct national interest.
While Jaime Herrera Beutler stabbed President Trump in the back, I have President Trump's back and he has mine.
I was honored to receive President Trump's endorsement!
Will you join him in supporting my campaign with a contribution at [https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA)?
I spent 20 years fighting for this country in our special forces throughout the Global War on Terror. I am honored to have served 11 combat missions. And I'm ready to continue that fight in the halls of Congress. Please help me get there with a contribution at [https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA).
Thank you and God Bless,
Joe Kent
PS - You read that right. A Republican WORSE than Liz Cheney. Help me defeat Jaime Herrera Beutler by donating today at [https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA).

As the father of a type-1 diabetic, Dan knows firsthand how expensive prescription drugs are. That’s why Dan introduced legislation to cap the price of insulin at $35 because, regardless of your insurer, no one should be forced to ration or skip their life-saving medication because they can’t afford it.

Now, that legislation has passed the House!

Dan is dedicated to helping lower costs for mid-Michigan families on things like prescription drugs, gas, and more. Not only that, but he recently pushed through funding for local economic development projects in our community—including projects that will provide affordable housing for veterans, clean up blight and fund after school programs.

Peter,

When I ran for governor of California as a Republican, the racist liberal media called me **“the Black face of white supremacy”** – something they would _NEVER_ say if I was a Democrat.

Now, the racist liberal media is suggesting that Elder for America-endorsed candidate, **Republican Herschel Walke** r, is leading in the race for Georgia’s U.S. Senate seat primarily because he’s black.

The Left and their friends in the media continue to demonstrate that they only care about black candidates doing well and even making history so long as they’re Democrats.

Not only does this expose the true racism that lies behind their deceptive attempts to convince black voters that they care about them, **but it also spits in the face of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s "Dream" that we judge each other not _“by the color of [our] skin but by the content of [our] character.”_**

The Left doesn’t believe in this. They only care about minorities if you’re a Democrat.

[**I need your help to fight back against the racist and hypocritical Left and particularly against their latest racist attacks against our candidate Herschel Walker in Georgia.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=050908da9c0a46b5a971dc335107e193&_e=b7VhAmbGtmc8BTKPm1YXZsEAJ586z9JBb5GaDvLexBO5dJ4FHLXzQObQDuNKXo7A2gD7vpFBvzcritN1a3ZePrqlmtr6a0EoJYyne8AtLRAdUZXKEiO3bGHbCdVLKJ-DJS86A_VSvg_kblOJsyv6pw-Y984kfBv1WbeeXTmQaUEWVkHTleEMouTIxEZPt6ACPLr5eG-KGDMJxB47cdmGyzEXIqySms3fQjOoZoMPRslK7mfdqMA0bj3FraePc9ksMGa2rBbymwXOUdbmDFYpRjGSlXjjjyaa5iWZJLhKU3K2HW4QxOPPfQBDTshPi8ra768yJmipHK2qyyYiovenSD8TZ32wgrzDsauJ9ZU2rCSzTCxV8DxmvWrEaEVbUsrCdSm6aNBFEkT52MPFCAUplO2_YYtwiGykt8ymk3G2ZVa1IOhwa9m_O_tY0p8oYeLI)

Hey Peter \-- I'm leading in this race right now, which is great news for the voters ready to flip WA-03. But the lead is actually the most vulnerable spot to be in. When competitors see you as a real and valid threat, they get an extra boost that spurs them on. So we can't be complacent! To maintain my lead and keep building our momentum through the primary and into the general election, I need you with me every step of the way. Flipping this seat will do three things: grow the House majority, defeat an out of touch GOP incumbent, and stop a MAGA-fueled conspiracy theorist from getting into Congress. Can I count on you now to pitch in and keep me in the lead so I can defend our democracy? Here's a link to donate: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brent-hennrich-for-washington](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdG1fUgG8aFKTw4TdAFcV3OYIkIXLeXYGdiD76HGOclWZYG428h3SLdZNmun5o9X48BqdmWlrZ6R8-JvAYShd9bWroeMRQWDK9aMk_hKdTrJr62V2BJPEDUIbZANwZCRl5MDRE8g52S0opzYnZpa_9d-ZRQpACZo-qIWETtHxg7wC1m5_aD9WRA7Rt2_dwWOflDT2v58G0pUvpUqRDIWK_CnCO38RA5YIg47X_ddTY-v8VCTmyLa1J4HCDlYzjBSTlAobgaUlp5AJAeXASPJyqj1_wvQmxVOCRERrIS_ZUzQU0DtS2HYagPhn4AFVnQHjK6chBsVp4BeKCxh78bk8T/3l5/iqOXYPbdS6O1ImslNZfZnA/h1/kbopZLrsuH5bJdOh1JLjnsKuHobnzfbpJ3DYrfXBF8E)** We're in for a tough fight, but if we have the resources to execute our outreach plans - direct mailers, signs, digital ads, hopefully even TV - we WILL win. name: Jeremy Hunt
subject: My father the pastor

clean_body: | | | Have you heard the news? The Democratic House Majority PAC is spending $1 million on TV ads promoting one of my opponents, Carrick Flynn – who has already benefited from $5M+ in support from billionaire Sam Bankman-Fried. This is the party organization that's supposed to be helping Democrats beat Republicans, not other Democrats. It is extremely concerning to see the Democratic establishment influence a primary in support of just one man when our field has so many strong women and women of color. It is unprecedented and deeply inappropriate.= = It's important that Oregonians know that someone is trying to buy this seat. We won't let them. Oregon Democrats will not be sold to the highest bidder. = It's outrageous that House Majority PAC would come in for an inexperienced candidate when I've been endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, Oregon League of Conservation Voters, and SEIU. I have a record of delivering for Oregon families. Fight back now: Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Thanks for standing with me against this gross attempt by a billionaire to buy this election. Working together, I know we can win. name: Marisa Wood
subject: Survey: What issues are you thinking about?
body:
Legislation to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks is on the table. Work is being done to stop fossil fuel companies from price gouging. What do you think we should be focused on? | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. When I announced my campaign to unseat Kevin McCarthy, I made a promise that I would be present in this community. That means checking in with supporters about our shared priorities. **My opponent Kevin McCarthy never made that promise -- and if he did, he's broken it at every turn.**

There's a lot of important policy being considered in Congress: Legislation to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks is on the table. Work is being done to stop fossil fuel companies from price gouging.

_Where's McCarthy been?_ Defending Trump, propping up the worst elements of his party, and attending fundraisers to oust Liz Cheney for defying him. I kid you not.

**[Needless to say we are doing things differently. As we inch closer to the June Primary, I want to get your take on what's important. What do you think we should be focused on? Please take my one-minute survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44068090/339975719/1246292705?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjFkMzAzYS1kMGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=taayNHy7_ZZMpKxBjxs-VCu5Pc_Y5bbq6M9InFva8h0=&emci=5d436133-d0ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5f1d303a-d0ba-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)**

name: Sarah Palin
subject: I announced my candidacy for the U.S House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.
Friend,

**Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska.**

I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C.

America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing.

I can’t do this without your support.

That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an **Official Founding Supporter**.

clean_body: America is at a tipping point. | Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. Friend, Recently I announced my candidacy for the U.S. House seat representing Alaska. I first entered politics 30 years ago, when I was elected to city council in Wasilla. I still live in Wasilla; my family is here; my son goes to school here. My heart will ALWAYS be in Alaska, even when I’m representing you in Washington, D.C. America is at a tipping point. As I’ve watched the far left destroy our country, I knew I had to step up and join the fight. And now I’m asking you to do the exact same thing. I can’t do this without your support. That’s why for a short time, when you make your next contribution of ANY AMOUNT, you’ll automatically cement your name as an Official Founding Supporter. This is your chance to go down in history. YOU are the reason I’m running, and YOU will be the reason we win. At this critical time in our nation’s history, we need leaders who will combat the left’s socialist, big-government, America-last agenda. This country was built by heroes, and the radical left dishonors their legacies by opening our borders to illegal immigrants, mortgaging our children’s future, and selling out our nation’s interest to the highest bidder. I’m in this race to win it and join the fight for freedom alongside other patriots willing to sacrifice all to save our country. I just have one simple question for you: WILL YOU JOIN ME? Thank you & God Bless America. Sarah Palin | Paid for by Sarah for Alaska. | P.O. BOX 871235 WASILLA, AK 99687 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

| | | Hi there, [_My average donation this month is $23. Can you match that by chipping in now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44068122/339975813/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDZhN2Y3Zi1kM2JhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G-gqPeKPjKj3oKlrtow_Zd57OT9QMWtrIWZku_MVxmY=) I remember last year when the “experts” were telling us not to worry: the inflation was just transitory. Well, here we are and inflation is at 8.5%, the highest it’s been since 1981. Grocery prices are up 10%. While the Biden administration is calling it “Putin’s price hike,” let’s remember that the inflation started well before the Russian invasion. What could Congress and the White House be doing right now? 1️⃣ Well, to combat inflation, FDR issued an executive order creating an agency for price controls. 2️⃣ It’s within Congress’ authority to issue monthly checks to keep Americans afloat. 3️⃣ It’s within Congress’ authority to create a federal jobs program putting millions to work in good-paying jobs. Don’t believe the hand-wringing: Congress and the President are NOT helpless to help you. They are CHOOSING not to help you. Why? Their donors don’t want them to. If I were in Congress right now, I’d be pushing for monthly checks and a jobs program. What could I do as just one person in Congress? Well, I could write op-eds, go on the news, and hold demonstrations for these policies. I could put out a call for people to join me. Who knows how many would show up? Thousands, tens of thousands, hundreds of thousands, or more? We don’t know, because no one in Congress is doing this right now. I’m not going to be a talking-head representative. I’m going to be a direct-action representative. clean_body: | | | Hi there, = I remember last year when the “experts” were telling us not to worry: the inflation was just transitory. Well, here we are and inflation is at 8.5%, the highest it’s been since 1981. Grocery prices are up 10%. While the Biden administration is calling it “Putin’s price hike,” let’s remember that the inflation started well before the Russian invasion. What could Congress and the White House be doing right now? 1️⃣ Well, to combat inflation, FDR issued an executive order creating an agency for price controls. 2️⃣ It’s within Congress’ authority to issue monthly checks to keep Americans afloat. 3️⃣ It’s within Congress’ authority to create a federal jobs program putting millions to work in good-paying jobs. Don’t believe the hand-wringing: Congress and the President are NOT helpless to help you. They are CHOOSING not to help you. Why? Their donors don’t want them to. If I were in Congress right now, I’d be pushing for monthly checks and a jobs program. What could I do as just one person in Congress? Well, I could write op-eds, go on the news, and hold demonstrations for these policies. I could put out a call for people to join me. Who knows how many would show up? Thousands, tens of thousands, hundreds of thousands, or more? We don’t know, because no one in Congress is doing this right now. I’m not going to be a talking-head representative. I’m going to be a direct-action representative. If you can, please help me do that by donating here, because my average donation is $23 so every dollar you give counts: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Donald Trump’s visit to North Carolina
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=175%2E5257348%2EOUNAPD ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek,

Donald Trump just whipped up an adoring crowd into a frenzy at another
right-wing MAGA rally in North Carolina this weekend — and it won’t
surprise you to learn that personal attacks against me were once again a
part of his routine.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=175_5257348_OUNAPD&akid=175%2E5257348%2EOUNAPD ][IMG]

“Russia, Russia, Russia, remember? Whatever happened to that one? And then guys
like the watermelon head Schiff, he goes back, and then he goes, Ukraine,
Ukraine, Ukraine. That turned out to be another hoax. Remember that?... I would
have had a problem because these people are horrible liars, Shifty Schiff gets
up to a microphone, this is a terrible thing for our country...”

Let us not forget: Trump attempted to extort Ukrainian President Zelenskyy
for dirt on President Biden by withholding military aid from that country.
In so doing, Trump made it clear to Putin that the United States didn’t
care about Ukraine, its people, or their democracy — and helped to pave
the way for the atrocities that Putin is now carrying out in Ukraine.

Joined at the North Carolina rally by the now-infamous Rep. Madison
Cawthorn and right-wing Senate candidate Ted Budd, Trump is sidling up to
the starting line of his next presidential run while boosting the
Republican efforts to reclaim control of Congress. These two things are
not unrelated: Trump knows that if he loses again in 2024, he will need a
Republican majority in Congress to overturn the results (just as he tried,
but failed to do in 2020).

As primary election season heats up, we're going to be seeing a lot more
of Trump and the QAnon cadre coming together for rallies every single week
in battleground states.

Leveling false and lunatic charges, spreading misinformation, and engaging
in pure fearmongering and demagoguery, Trump and his cronies only seek to
incite outrage and loyalty from their radical right-wing base.

Derek, we can't let Trump and his MAGA base control the
narrative about the upcoming midterm election. We need to fight back and
help Democrats who are running honest but hard-hitting campaigns.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&refcode2=175_5257348_OUNAPD&akid=175%2E5257348%2EOUNAPD ]Can you pitch in right now to help my re-election campaign fight for
our priorities in Congress and to support my Democratic colleagues running
nationwide?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=1006&refcode2=175_5257348_OUNAPD&akid=175%2E5257348%2EOUNAPD ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=1007&refcode2=175_5257348_OUNAPD&akid=175%2E5257348%2EOUNAPD ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=1008&refcode2=175_5257348_OUNAPD&akid=175%2E5257348%2EOUNAPD ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=1009&refcode2=175_5257348_OUNAPD&akid=175%2E5257348%2EOUNAPD ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=1010&refcode2=175_5257348_OUNAPD&akid=175%2E5257348%2EOUNAPD ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/apr2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20220412_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&refcode2=175_5257348_OUNAPD&akid=175%2E5257348%2EOUNAPD ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you. Your support makes all the difference.

— Adam
