body:
Before the April 5th election, we saw the same dark money groups that raised Derrick Van Orden $900,000, flood our local elections, attempting to tip the scale towards extremist candidates.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44065718/339941305/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.04.12_b1_dvo-raised_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjgwYTQ0OS1iNGJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sXVxxhg6HmGHiFJlutqCAaGSp2YI54IFLy0sRsCSM9k=)
---
Friends --

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Checking in after today’s shooting
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Friend —
Earlier today, ten individuals were shot on a subway platform in the Sunset Park neighborhood of Brooklyn. Six more people were injured.
I am saddened and horrified by this catastrophic event, and am hoping for a quick recovery for all who were injured. No one should ever feel unsafe in public spaces.
I have long advocated for common sense gun control measures in both New York state and on the federal level. Each year, far too many lives are lost to gun violence because there are simply too many guns on our streets, and not enough regulation of their use.
I’ll reach back out soon to discuss specific measures that I’m supporting which will protect New Yorkers from gun violence, but in the meantime, I hope that you and your loved ones are safe.
Thank you for reading,
Alessandra

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=697%2E59515%2EvrCCSN).

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: we need the child tax credit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I’m working every day to reinstate these tax credits.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44066273/339943571/-1925218157?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220412-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTJhZTAzOC1iNmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ba6aCP-MfoI9ZOBMWntWWj2GHkFMA-5Gw0qBm5wbRQs=)
---
| Last year, I met with parents in my district to talk about the Child Tax Credit. These monthly payments assisted the families of sixty-one million children across the country, with low-income families spending nearly all of their payments on food, rent, utilities, clothing, and school supplies.

So many of the parents spoke to me, full of emotion, not about school supplies or new shoes they could buy, but about something much bigger — about the importance of having extra money available so they could start saving for their kids, about being able to look to the future.

But the Child Tax Credit ended in December, leaving America’s kids and families in desperate need of real support. **Now, I’m working every day to reinstate these tax credits, for good this time — because it’s unacceptable to allow even a single kid to fall back into poverty.**

I won’t lie: it’s an uphill battle. If Republicans take back control of the House in 2022, the Child Tax Credit and so many other programs that benefit American families will be on the chopping block. **To keep Democrats in the House majority and keep me in Congress advocating for our nation’s children,[_please rush a contribution of $5 or whatever you can spare right away._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44066274/339943572/-1925218157?refcode=BLU-SJC-20220412-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTJhZTAzOC1iNmJhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ba6aCP-MfoI9ZOBMWntWWj2GHkFMA-5Gw0qBm5wbRQs=)**

clean_body: I’m working every day to reinstate these tax credits. | = | Last year, I met with parents in my district to talk about the Child Tax Credit. These monthly payments assisted the families of sixty-one million children across the country, with low-income families spending nearly all of their payments on food, rent, utilities, clothing, and school supplies. So many of the parents spoke to me, full of emotion, not about school supplies or new shoes they could buy, but about something much bigger — about the importance of having extra money available so they could start saving for their kids, about being able to look to the future. But the Child Tax Credit ended in December, leaving America’s kids and families in desperate need of real support. Now, I’m working every day to reinstate these tax credits, for good this time — because it’s unacceptable to allow even a single kid to fall back into poverty. I won’t lie: it’s an uphill battle. If Republicans take back control of the House in 2022, the Child Tax Credit and so many other programs that benefit American families will be on the chopping block. To keep Democrats in the House majority and keep me in Congress advocating for our nation’s children,= | | | = | = | = | = | = Grateful for your support, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress 660 Pennsylvania Ave SE Suite 202 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

body:
Governor Youngkin sent exciting news from Richmond this morning. This November, we could have the opportunity to defeat not just Jennifer Wexton, but | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c96a5adf190f/top-to-bottom?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d538832f6d&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

We got exciting news out of Richmond this morning.

[Governor Youngkin is pushing to require the Loudoun County School Board elections to be held THIS YEAR, instead of in 2023.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=0fbd3d511b&e=fc83fb200d)

This is amazing news. Not only will we have the opportunity to replace the woke and corrupt school board, it also means that I could be running on the same ticket as our Republican School Board candidates.

In one swoop, we can get rid of Jennifer Wexton _and_ replace the school board that has ignored parental rights, silenced our voices, and pushed woke ideology on our children.

This November, everything could be on the line. I'm going to need your help to bolster our ticket of Republican candidates across the 10th district and defeat the radical Democrats top to bottom on the ballot.

[Will you make a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to fund our Republican cause and flip the 10th district top to bottom?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=954a9b3622&e=fc83fb200d)

I'm counting on you to bring the change that we need to our community. Democrats from the local to federal level are destroying the country that we love, and this November is our opportunity to put an end to it.

I'm excited about this opportunity, and I hope that you'll join me in this movement.

Dear Friend,

Inflation is out of control! It has risen 8.5% in the last year alone, and sits at the highest level since 1981.
With costs rising, it's even more difficult for families to afford to put gas in their cars, buy groceries, and pay the mortgage.
It's unbelievable that with all of this going on there are actually people running for governor proposing billions of dollars in tax hikes and new government spending.
Our next governor must continue to fight to make our state more affordable by standing up to tax increases and pushing for tax cuts for every Maryland family.
---
[](https://u21639199.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=DRhu97MwZOafZz0axKBSuHM4TyUiRDjO7WRT-2Bn4igr193XMreDNS7fl2A4g9SL86dSacSVNK-2BxllmgmQHJKf0KjLIRfyPHjmyY6MkUuiyOg6YkzX8qzxXJRdYIPEeK8-2Fs-2FY94peGl-2BkszlZ2XKvYNQ-3D-3DqdiM_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Jx47dwcKyzyPDuzgWF5m44gQM-2F92iksvcywHJGiRJMK5qLpzaJ4o26FklEKOXVuLYs6dDVHJkDIb0nxpG-2Bp9SkLhzUvYH9XHY9C-2BDOnp7b72bZkMmS30QHqOI1PC7fY9MnRmeCPCmwnINVlXYNIqIE3frgjSIrkehMwXhH4wniGlaU4MArJJtLMdxC1R2UydBEHCGgykCH0Na-2Fh-2FE4JtrUoDY2rMu3KOiYaZVTMIrNvJikEb7ce4J7hi2LNf1i1LdK6zqLlrjbW6agcjZMJ-2FuMv3dg7P-2FBQku4YHVU8jfIBTDyUQ9WZjQZUkj8tEle2ZZyy8Dy8adnBHgiGWuUQqdSjVDSOkXUL6tvkS1YjFraTRG5SCJrUvsDAlTOghvBvGH46AEuF3gfycltHUJJJ5bICsmJOJXbKsH0TC33yHsG14IhtEEvHh0CzDgjK4AClNRrWFxKilXP4rpBpxU6vcPOMB621TgjCfEWTSti58DZbvoi7-2BizrG-2FPRoT0ilJPT-2FBe-2BXU5wAhWivlzQfyDVhdpTggnMWKrYa2wEJk01FPnbuQPDHhcVPy6RouObR6lkA6597o86wEcgb2Tps9MqAIp-2B5a4CC-2FvDG3F5uznl2kITdCyTYrRvdAJzTMVPskXTRZn-2F-2BdDmEsjhTKdF1YKshMn4sG22zNPJ4Fb9Ab6XjHCDZuKwgw2G5FcgrgSgOrGChBc6wJ16MR26ux-2FJhOkgutx0joy6Dh3wIV7ZVY8Ut-2BQLcmf4teWINF00CCvdbEs5i3N-2Bu-2FNLSdU2x2-2FFS3rukcFdDiBTWplqT9-2BJJsR776m2MTVDMY8sBSW53cCRUIE8BKF-2B9PkkfRaeEr9-2BBur9qyA-3D-3D)
---
**I know what it's like to be a mom on a budget.** And as your governor, I promise to do everything I can to make Maryland more affordable for you and your family.
While my Democratic opponents are focused on how quickly they can raise your taxes with pie-in-the-sky policy proposals, I am focused on creating jobs and fighting for tax cuts.
Everything I do as your governor will be to make sure you and your family have every opportunity to prosper and can afford to live and retire in Maryland.
That, I promise you.
Thank you,

name: Ted Cruz
subject: 31 donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
We need your help before midnight to stop the left from buying this election.

name: Team Oakley
subject: Support Black Women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

A few weeks back, I had the privilege of participating in a panel hosted by Black Women Run DC — a panel highlighting five Black women running to make transformational progressive change.

And let me tell you, it was absolutely incredible to sit with other progressive Black women candidates and discuss our plans to make history, transform our country, and fight for those who’ve been left behind by a corrupt system.

This year, more Black women are running for office than ever before. And this event showcased just how driven, qualified, and determined Black women are to undo the damage of the past and carve out a new future for our communities.

But here’s the problem: Black women receive the least campaign donations of any group running for office. And, like it or not, it’s hard to win victories for our communities when the establishment and their corporate donors are standing against you.

We need to uplift Black voices, elect Black women, and deliver on the kind of representation, action, and progress that can only be achieved by Black women in office. And we need your help to do it. Click here to chip in $27, support my campaign, and help elect the FIRST Black woman to represent NJ-10. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=412event]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=412event] Express Donate $27 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=412event] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=412event] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=412event] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=412event] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-april2022?refcode=412event]

Thanks!
— Imani

Friend,

I just got out of a meeting with my team to discuss an upcoming dinner in DALLAS, and I told them I wanted to invite YOU to join me.

This isn't any ordinary trip, Friend. This is a _very exclusive dinner with VIP guests ONLY_ , and I can't think of anyone else I'd rather share this special evening with than YOU.

_The cost of your flight, hotel, AND meal will be covered._

All you have to do is contribute $45 or more, and you'll automatically be entered to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: The pandemic
body:
brought out the worst in government
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wf1QYlxj4cYItO-bdFZvp22S6bjTqanM5_IbF7L51wltMFgHjNoRK2bNrWKkgUvuAV3pRFIt6Ymr1IvPhe8bCqJpRLT-sSNN8EiWO02bztcMBdd_gALB0Wcxxmu_ddEScODlK25kSsZtKPwlQ8WV0kVqyJmDE-jU&c=_YgjYn_9eZmO21L5T_XIYWofaKpqC7Vz4a51eLyq4gp4CaKg6k1bbA==&ch=soaOEbCluNft12xMJOJ8lL4-HYQ4G1_-ZonjHT-uKLeR9CvZDOHheA==)
---
|
---
| Double standards and the worst in government
---
| |
---|---
|
The COVID pandemic brought out the worst in government and the effects of mask and vaccine mandates, lockdowns, and the lingering damage to business is something we must remedy and soon.

We still are seeing the excessive control of citizens being exercised especially in our major cities.

Young children are still needlessly being masked in many schools. The least vulnerable group in America are the last to be able to go mask-free. It's simply madness.

The haves and have nots are being treated differently--[just look at New York City](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wf1QYlxj4cYItO-bdFZvp22S6bjTqanM5_IbF7L51wltMFgHjNoRK8nSAax9GKxDdXLsDZhyttM5OJiWm4xd2n2OdU32CJ9p5WeltmV6jqM7vdEGm4DsTNV_aMK3JvPzqhTusZH6jduTGD9LObZ04f4hUUGVcwyUNOhrYVDbVmZ3xz2Kku3RglU2z7In4TAWB5WPYgfmJgdKe8znnaAINWmFv76px1stkgkMdyN6Lb8=&c=_YgjYn_9eZmO21L5T_XIYWofaKpqC7Vz4a51eLyq4gp4CaKg6k1bbA==&ch=soaOEbCluNft12xMJOJ8lL4-HYQ4G1_-ZonjHT-uKLeR9CvZDOHheA==) where a mayor has issued an edict that allows famous, wealthy professional athletes to play vaccine-free in local stadiums while still requiring vaccines for public union employees and firing those who fail to vaccinate.

Is this the America we want? I feel confident in saying Coloradans do not want to eradicate common sense in the name of a nebulous "public safety" banner. Even more importantly we cannot allow government, at any level, to arbitrarily take away fundamental rights of our citizens.

But while we have seen that indoor mask mandates have little effect on stemming the spread of COVID, the threat of reinstatement looms and we must stop it. [In Philadelphia a local health official ordered a return](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wf1QYlxj4cYItO-bdFZvp22S6bjTqanM5_IbF7L51wltMFgHjNoRK8nSAax9GKxDvK4NBhMrZBAu7hP7Ua30HCTJQq_I0fH0cZXGjk5V1iPZxrX7AqjnjJmcVudTHfV_vbUOKKCyPVubrSL9I7TR4saUDcXHSooZqJD69FVlQ6JOXQe_Ivklhd45TObaAcW2_AwpDoHsBAMTODEBEbmgnHv3L-cYlG4aAoEJoqh8nLW8ZcFEVz2kdKgiPNd9kOpM&c=_YgjYn_9eZmO21L5T_XIYWofaKpqC7Vz4a51eLyq4gp4CaKg6k1bbA==&ch=soaOEbCluNft12xMJOJ8lL4-HYQ4G1_-ZonjHT-uKLeR9CvZDOHheA==) to an indoor mask mandate this week.

At the bottom of all of this is a grab for power. Liberals have long advocated for greater control of our lives and COVID provided a big foot in the door to secure control.

Today it's a mask mandate or a lock-down order for COVID but having felt the power that in some instances amount to martial-law, undoubtedly in future crises, power-hungry leaders will cite measures used during COVID to justify limits on freedom.

We cannot let this happen in Colorado or for our fellow Americans. Let us be the leaders in restoring liberty and passing laws that put limits on government. Radical leftist city councils, mayors, governors, and non-elected bureaucrats cannot simply ignore citizens' rights for the sake of their desire to control. We must remember that the US Constitution is the supreme law of the land and is never suspended. We must return to the rule of law and the correct due process. We must never again allow our Constitutional protections to be infringed upon by unelected bureaucrats in the name of public safety.

Citizens should never have to show proof of medical attention--their vaccination card--which goes against the law regarding privacy of medical information.

This is especially galling considering illegal immigrants are pouring across our border and even when captured are released into our country without having to prove vaccination for COVID or anything else.

At the same time, the government is extending the requirement to wear masks on American airplanes while lifting health restrictions at the border.

We have to push back.

Freedom is our focus. Coloradans expect us to protect their rights and that is why I am going to Washington.

clean_body: brought out the worst in government | | | | == | | Double standards and the worst in government | | ---|--- | The COVID pandemic brought out the worst in government and the effects of mask and vaccine mandates, lockdowns, and the lingering damage to business is something we must remedy and soon. We still are seeing the excessive control of citizens being exercised especially in our major cities. Young children are still needlessly being masked in many schools. The least vulnerable group in America are the last to be able to go mask-free. It's simply madness. The haves and have nots are being treated differently--== where a mayor has issued an edict that allows famous, wealthy professional athletes to play vaccine-free in local stadiums while still requiring vaccines for public union employees and firing those who fail to vaccinate. Is this the America we want? I feel confident in saying Coloradans do not want to eradicate common sense in the name of a nebulous "public safety" banner. Even more importantly we cannot allow government, at any level, to arbitrarily take away fundamental rights of our citizens. But while we have seen that indoor mask mandates have little effect on stemming the spread of COVID, the threat of reinstatement looms and we must stop it. == to an indoor mask mandate this week. At the bottom of all of this is a grab for power. Liberals have long advocated for greater control of our lives and COVID provided a big foot in the door to secure control. Today it's a mask mandate or a lock-down order for COVID but having felt the power that in some instances amount to martial-law, undoubtedly in future crises, power-hungry leaders will cite measures used during COVID to justify limits on freedom. We cannot let this happen in Colorado or for our fellow Americans. Let us be the leaders in restoring liberty and passing laws that put limits on government. Radical leftist city councils, mayors, governors, and non-elected bureaucrats cannot simply ignore citizens' rights for the sake of their desire to control. We must remember that the US Constitution is the supreme law of the land and is never suspended. We must return to the rule of law and the correct due process. We must never again allow our Constitutional protections to be infringed upon by unelected bureaucrats in the name of public safety. Citizens should never have to show proof of medical attention--their vaccination card--which goes against the law regarding privacy of medical information. This is especially galling considering illegal immigrants are pouring across our border and even when captured are released into our country without having to prove vaccination for COVID or anything else. At the same time, the government is extending the requirement to wear masks on American airplanes while lifting health restrictions at the border. We have to push back. Freedom is our focus. Coloradans expect us to protect their rights and that is why I am going to Washington. | | | | == | | | Stand with Erik Today | I'm asking for your support so that I can represent you in Washington and help turn the tide of failed Democratic policy. Please donate today. | == You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker and express your concerns about how the government is failing us. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | == | Together we can stand against bad policy and for our future. | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, CO 80163 (720) 464 4488 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |
